Name: agap2 Italia
Description:
agap2 è una multinazionale di consulenza operativa specializzata nel mondo dell’ingegneria e dell’IT, parte del Gruppo MoOngy. Fondata nel 2005 in Portogallo, oggi è presente in 11 paesi europei e conta più di 7.500 risorse.

Dalla volontà di ampliare ulteriormente gli orizzonti, nel 2018 nasce agap2 Italia con il suo HQ a Milano, sedi anche a Parma, Roma e Brescia, e un’operatività estesa in tutto il territorio italiano.

We are proud to share:
• +700 membri;
• 32M€ di fatturato;
• 35 anni la nostra età media;
• 100% equal opportunities employer.

Perché agap2?
Entrare in agap2 significa inserirsi in una realtà in continua evoluzione, nella quale si è pronti ad apportare il proprio know-how in progetti di respiro internazionale ed entrare a far parte di un team dinamico e ambizioso, dove il desiderio di superare se stessi, i propri limiti e la voglia di lavorare insieme sono valori essenziali. Inoltre, agap2 offre un percorso di crescita professionale e personale che permetterà di sviluppare sempre nuove competenze e capacità.

The Competitive Advantages of Global Corporations – Now accessable for companies of all sizes.

While small and medium-sized enterprises struggle with high costs, skilled labor shortages, and complex regulations, global corporations have long leveraged international resource structures to maximize their efficiency. Personnel Expenses (30-70% Savings): We build qualified international teams for you in areas such as IT, customer service, or back office. Tax Optimization: Global Advance teams and associated companies analyze corporate structures and implement proven, legal tax models that leverage global tax distribution, to reduce tax burdens to a minimum. We provide companies with the same tax advantages utilized by gigantic corporations.

Strategic Manufacturing Relocation: Whether founding, logistics, or suppliers management—we accompany the entire process of relocating manufacturing operations to strategically advantageous locations in Asia, South America, or Eastern Europe to secure the long-term competitiveness.

Name: MAC Logistic
Description:
A MAC Logistic foi fundada por profissionais altamente capacitados e experts em logística integrada, com o objetivo de oferecer soluções para todas as etapas da cadeia logística.

Com ênfase no atendimento às necessidades dos clientes e na excelência em servir, a MAC Logistic expandiu rapidamente suas operações para vários países latinos.

No ano de 1998 abriu, na cidade de São Paulo o seu primeiro escritório no Brasil, iniciando um ciclo contínuo de crescimento em todo o país e passando a determinar a partir do Brasil as suas principais ações a nível mundial.

 No Brasil, a MAC Logistic consolidou-se em importantes cidades, como São Paulo, Belo Horizonte e Vitória, atendendo todas as modalidades logísticas através de equipes próprias, motivadas e com alto nível de conhecimento.

A partir de 2010 a MAC Logistic no Brasil passou a ser a principal controladora do Grupo, tornando-se a matriz mundial da corporação, fortalecendo ainda mais suas ações globais através de uma ampla rede de agentes presentes em mais de 150 cidades ao redor do mundo.

Conheça o grupo MAC Logistic! Nos sentiremos honrados em atendê-los e principalmente, apoiar o desenvolvimento dos seus negócios, através de projetos logísticos customizados, com o foco no cumprimento de prazos e através de uma visão sistêmica de toda a cadeia logística.

Our corporate value system revolves around our core principles of social and environmental responsibility for developing sustainable plans.

This success is achieved through close interaction of our multidisciplinary engineering teams with active participation and feedback from clients and stakeholders.
	Dam and hydropower projects

RevCats is a consulting firm specializing in talent acquisition strategy, process design, and recruiter training. With over 25 years of recruiting industry experience, we bring insider knowledge from the agency world—but instead of acting as a staffing firm, we help companies eliminate the need for one.

Our focus is on building self-sufficient recruiting organizations. We partner with clients to optim

In conflict and disasters the recovery of the deceased is a key pillar in the operational response. Ensuring that this is carried out professionally, and in line with cultural and religious beliefs is essential. Forensic Action International brings with it over 25 years of experience in the planning, and operational recovery, analysis and identification of the deceased in conflict and disaster.

Advocating for better accounting for casualties and respect for the deceased, and putting the needs of communities at the heart of planning and response is at the centre of what Forensic Action International aims to achieve by working at an international, regional, and national level. 

Whether it is planning and designing programs to search for, recovery, and identify missing persons, to ensuring better preparedness for the operational response of agencies tasked with the essential role of recovery and recording of the casualties in conflict and disasters, Forensic Action International stands ready to provide its advice and experience to better prepare those involved.

Name: Zambia Safety Awards
Description:
Zambia Safety Awards (ZASAA) | Building a Safer Zambia, Together

The Zambia Safety Awards (ZASAA) is a national initiative dedicated to recognizing and celebrating excellence in occupational safety, health, and sustainability.

ZASAA honors individuals, organizations, and industries that demonstrate exceptional commitment to creating safer, healthier, and more sustainable workplaces. From mining and construction to manufacturing, agriculture, healthcare, and beyond, the Awards highlight Zambia’s collective efforts toward building a culture of safety and wellbeing.

More than an award ceremony, ZASAA serves as a platform for empowerment, collaboration, and continuous improvement, bringing together leaders, professionals, and changemakers from across sectors to share best practices and inspire innovation.

Our mission is to:

Recognize outstanding achievements in workplace safety and health

Promote collaboration across industries

Raise national awareness about safety, health, and sustainability

ZASAA is proudly organized by SMTS Zambia, a leading indigenous training provider, in collaboration with HSENations, a trusted HSE consultancy with a strong African footprint. Together, they bring unmatched expertise and credibility, with previous events attracting thousands of participants and generating significant regional impact.

Join us as we celebrate Zambia’s safety champions, and continue the journey toward a safer, healthier, and more sustainable nation.

Name: Veiligesportvloer
Description:
De sportvloer, het belangrijkste toestel van uw accommodatie! 

Iedereen die gebruik maakt van de sporthal, gymzaal, fitness en buitensportlocatie verdient een veilige sportomgeving.

Bij de overgang van oplosmiddelhoudende naar watergedragen coatings op sportvloeren ontstonden veel klachten over verminderde grip, gladheid en zelfs blessures.

De toewijding van eigenaar André van Gerwen om dit probleem aan te pakken heeft ervoor gezorgd, dat sinds 2014 Veiligesportvloer een begrip is in het adviseren, keuren en revitaliseren van alle soorten en merken sportvloeren. 

Wij werken met een speciale aanpak, gebaseerd op de Cirkel van Sinner. Dit is een combinatie van voornamelijk handelingen, reinigingsmiddelen en tijd. Een revitalisatie gaat verder dan een reguliere schoonmaakbeurt en maakt echt het verschil en herstelt de sporttechnische eigenschappen zoals stroefheid en glanswaarde van de sportvloer.

Onze metingen laten duidelijk het verschil zien vóór en na het onderhoud en grafieken en rapporten maken deze resultaten makkelijk te begrijpen voor beheerders en beleidsmakers.

Met het Certificaat Inspectie en Onderhoudsadvies versterken we onze samenwerking en zetten we een belangrijke stap richting een toekomst waarin sportveiligheid centraal staat. Daarom zijn we trots dat Kiwa ISA Sport ons werk erkent en onze missie ondersteunt: “een veilige sportvloer voor elke sporter."

Gevestigd binnen de slimste vierkante kilometer van Nederland, Brainport Eindhoven, staan wij klaar om u van dienst te zijn met op maat gemaakte diensten voor elke sportvloer. 
inspectie, keuring revitalisatie sportvloerrenovatie hout sportvloerbelijning sportvloerreparatie MJOP onderhoudsplan reinigingsmiddelen en -machines  workshops sportvloeronderhoud sportvloerbescherming

Name: Hoodo | Last Mile Operations
Description:
Most dealerships do not struggle because their people do not care.
They struggle because the last mile of work is messy, invisible, and held together by emails, texts, spreadsheets, and memory.

That last mile is where inspections, recon, repairs, paperwork, and delivery prep all collide. It is also where promises get broken, vehicles get delayed, and teams get frustrated.

Hoodo exists to fix that.

We work with dealership teams to understand how work actually gets done after the deal is signed and before the keys are handed over. We start by observing real workflows, identifying where things slow down or fall apart, and helping leaders see what is actually happening on the floor.

Our approach is practical and low pressure. We begin with audits and diagnostics, not software rollouts. The goal is clarity first, so any changes are grounded in reality and earned by evidence.

When teams have clear ownership, visibility, and follow through in the last mile, everything improves. Vehicles move faster. Fewer things fall through the cracks. Customers feel taken care of. Teams spend less time chasing updates and more time doing the work that matters.

Hoodo helps dealerships fix the last mile so trust can be rebuilt and work can feel manageable again.

Name: Merlin Hunter
Description:
Merlin Hunter, established in September 2023, quickly gained recognition within two years, notably at the London Business Show, for its innovative investigative approaches and strong track record of success.

Merlin Hunter operates at a powerful intersection of purpose, driven by the profound human need for connection and resolution. 

What you love: The inherent desire to help others, the satisfaction of bringing closure to families, the intellectual challenge of piecing together fragmented information, the emotional reward of reuniting loved ones. There's a deep sense of empathy and a drive to make a tangible difference in people's lives. 

What the world needs: The undeniable need for support and expertise when a person goes missing. Families experience immense distress and uncertainty, and a dedicated agency provides a crucial service in a vulnerable time. Law enforcement may have limitations due to resources or jurisdiction, highlighting the essential role of specialised missing person agencies. 

What you are good at: Investigative skills, meticulous research, interviewing techniques, understanding human behavior, networking with various resources, providing emotional support to families, navigating complex and sensitive situations. The ability to remain objective while maintaining empathy is key. 

What you can be paid for: Providing investigative services to families, corporations, or other entities seeking to locate missing individuals. This could involve private investigations, corporate tracing, or working with non-profit organisations on specific cases. Funding can also come from grants, donations, or government contracts in some instances.

In essence, we find our "reason for being" to be the compassionate pursuit of truth and the commitment to bringing hope and resolution to those facing the anguish of a missing person.

Name: SiMLQ
Description:
SiMLQ - from Data to Action!

SiMLQ automatically constructs data-driven process Simulators (digital twins) by leveraging event log data, Machine Learning and Queueing theory. The resulting simulation model allows process managers to optimize resource allocation, boost productivity, and reduce costs. SiMLQ unlocks the full potential of data by allowing for quick deployment of simulation models and testing of process-improving actions. SiMLQ focuses on congested systems, where queueing (waiting) occurs. Examples of such systems range from customers waiting to be served, to inventory waiting for processing or transportation, to payments and invoices waiting to be generated or cleared, to cloud computing tasks waiting for available resources. SiMLQ’s capability to quickly adapt to such diverse applications illustrates its scalability. SiMLQ’s unique ability to work with incomplete event data (symptomatic of most real-life event logs), quickly generate effective simulations, and evaluate impact of actions on key performance metrics makes it unparallel in the industry. We Turn Data into Actions.

Name: Spanish Women Worldwide Leadership
Description:
Spanish Women Worldwide Leadership was founded by Mercedes González Pérez in Toledo, after a series of digital sponsorship tutorials, with the European Leadership and Spanish Leadership Internet Ideas Incubators in Germany. The objectives of this Internet Incubator of ideas are the following:

1 Operations consulting on all leadership issues.
2 Women's leadership, women's spirit, in support of women who have suffered.
3 Creating awareness and innovation.
4 Conferences. Coaching, etc.

The purpose of Mercedes González Pérez is to provide resources and tools to transform suffering into a host of possibilities. She herself has had a life of pain and traumatic experiences that, as she spreads, have been her best school.

At the time of founding Spanish Women Worldwide Leadership, Mercedes underwent surgery on   her hand. Days later, her father suffered a heart attack and had to undergo life-or-death heart surgery. He is still convalescing.

But Mercedes González Pérez https://www.linkedin.com/in/mercedes-gonzalez-management-innovation-leadership-entrepreneurship-ai-madrid-venturecapital/ has not given up. On the contrary, she manages the pain and turns it into self-improvement and empowerment.

It is in this way that Mercedes González Pérez intends to change the world. Follow it and you will be able to verify that sometimes in the difficulty lies the simple and in the simple, the open doors for the development of skills and leadership that will lead you to your life purpose.

Mercedes González Pérez usually says that all the bad or good things that happen to us in life are teachers who come to give us a necessary lesson. Sometimes even diseases are signs that we must stop and observe the messages of our body.

Overcoming and reinventing yourself is already a habit in the life of Mercedes González Pérez, and she wants it to be so in yours as well.

Mercedes González Pérez wants to send her message to the world because she knows that she could promote humanity.

Name: The Raytom Group L.L.C.
Description:
Founded by Veterans of Public Safety and the Armed Services, the Raytom Group’s mission and founding principal is to provide relevant, efficient, and practical training to elite men and women who are tasked with the perilous duty of keeping the public safe.

The Raytom Group conducts all training and consulting services through Mobile Training Teams (MTT’s). Our MTT Instructors are specialists in the field of EMS, Combat Medicine, Fire Services, Wilderness Medicine, Tactical Medicine, Registered Nursing, Law Enforcement and Incident Command Systems. We pride ourselves on coordinating with stakeholders from Federal, State and Local municipalities to develop and deliver on-site accelerated, measurable, and certifiable training.

The Raytom Group’s instructional staff has delivered specialized accelerated training to over 5000 providers from hundreds of public safety agencies across the world.

To ensure that graduates of our program receive the most out of their training experience, all courses are customized to meet specific unit tactics, department/agency culture, and S.O.P’s. This is accomplished in part by training in the provider’s environment and through extensive course planning with project stake holders.
Location: San Francisco California, Boerne Texas, Franklin Tennessee with global field offices serving Latin America and the Middle East

Description:
At TECH SCM, we specialize in SAP Implementation & support and supply chain consulting. We have project and asset management tool which have been developed internally. All the major SAP Operational modules, which include SAP MM, PP, SD and WM modules are covered by our services. In addition, we provide supply chain consulting services, where our main goal is to streamline all phases of the supply chain, from planning and purchasing to production and distribution. Our project and asset management solution additionally enables clients to manage their projects and assets more successfully, from planning and budgeting to execution and maintenance. Clients can make informed decisions and fully utilize their resources because of the tool's real-time visibility into project and asset performance.

Finally, our training and certification  services include supply chain management and SAP modules, giving our clients the information and, they need to make the most out of their technological investments.
To satisfy the unique demands of each customer, we provide customized training programs in addition to traditional classroom and online training choices.
We at TECH SCM are dedicated to providing top-notch services that assist our clients in achieving their business goals and staying one step ahead of the competition. We stand out from the competition thanks to our broad experience, comprehensive industry knowledge, and client-focused philosophy.

Investimos significativamente nos mais modernos equipamentos do mercado de controle de qualidade e proteção radiológica na área médica, odontológica, veterinária, radiofarmácia, indústria e segurança, ensino e pesquisa, com os melhores veículos para o transporte de materiais radioativos. Agregamos a tecnologia da informação com uso de sistema ao cliente via web e aplicativo de celular para gestão dos processos de manutenção dos equipamentos, testes de qualidade e relatórios gerenciais, além de sistema de rastreamento do transporte com pedidos via web e acompanhamento da entrega.

Atuamos com seriedade, responsabilidade e competência para satisfação completa do cliente, benefício para a sociedade e segurança ao meio ambiente, com profissionais altamente especializados e com larga experiência, equipamentos de ponta com tecnologia da informação.

Somos pioneira e única no segmento com este escopo completo de serviços com ISO 9001:2015.

Name: Provenio Consulting
Description:
Provenio Consulting Inc. | Safety Training & Consulting That Works

At Provenio Consulting, we deliver safety training and consulting that’s as tough as the industries we serve. Your team is too important for generic videos or box-checking compliance. That’s why we bring hands-on, real-world expertise to keep your workplace safe, efficient, and ready for the big jobs.

Why Choose Provenio?
Real-World Trainers: Our team of veterans, first responders, and industry pros—like our founder, who learned safety on the farm, as a machinist, and as a firefighter—knows your hazards. We’ve lived them. From pinch points to robotics safety, we teach what matters.

Engaging Training: Forget boring slideshows. We light fires, demo PPE, and walk through risks like bad rigging or silo gas. Our OSHA, HAZWOPER, and CPR courses empower your crew to work smarter and safer.

Business Impact: Our systems cut injuries, lower insurance costs, and get you on high-dollar projects where safety is non-negotiable. We’ve helped clients save money on OSHA fines and secure grants.

Mission Beyond Profit: Inspired by our founder’s Haiti mission, our business mission is to build a business that builds businesses in impoverished communities.

Who We Serve
We partner with construction, manufacturing, warehouses, government, and other firms to create bulletproof safety programs. Whether you’re a safety manager in Minneapolis or a CXO in Chicago, we tailor solutions to your risks.

Get Started
Ready to make safety your edge? Message us for a free consultation to assess your needs, or visit www.provenioconsulting.com for OSHA-compliant training and consulting that delivers.

#WorkplaceSafety #SafetyTraining #OSHACompliance #ProvenioConsulting

Contact Us: DM us or email brad@provenioconsulting.com

Name: Quick.EAM
Description:
O cenário industrial está cada vez mais tecnológico — mas adotar novas tecnologias, por si só, não garante resultados expressivos. Para transformar verdadeiramente a operação, é preciso inteligência aplicada, previsibilidade e capacidade de adaptação contínua.

Foi com esse propósito que nasceu a QuickEAM: desenvolver produtos digitais e oferecer serviços que realmente impactam a gestão de ativos nas empresas. Unimos inovação e propósito para que tecnologia e pessoas trabalhem em harmonia, criando uma nova forma — mais eficiente, estratégica e sustentável — de operar.

Nossa atuação se apoia em três pilares fundamentais:
— Eficiência Operacional: Redução de falhas e custos com metodologias preditivas e processos bem estruturados.
— Decisões Baseadas em Dados: Aplicação de IA e Machine Learning para ampliar a previsibilidade e dar suporte à gestão estratégica.
— Sustentabilidade e Impacto: Apoio à construção de operações mais seguras, rentáveis e ambientalmente responsáveis.

Entre nossos produtos, estão:
— Gestão de Planos Padrões (GPP)
— Assistentes de IA Personalizados
— Soluções Preditivas com Machine Learning e RAG
— Soluções de Mobilidade para Operações em Campo

Também oferecemos serviços especializados, como:
— Consultoria em Gestão de Ativos Empresariais
— Revisão de Planos de Manutenção e Dados Mestres

Além disso, oferecemos treinamentos para empresas e profissionais que desejam se atualizar e ganhar protagonismo no setor industrial, com conteúdos alinhados ao mercado, exercícios práticos, aplicação em SAP-PM e as metodologias mais relevantes do setor.

Mais do que fornecer tecnologia, aceleramos mudanças que geram valor real e duradouro, ajudando empresas a enfrentar desafios complexos com inteligência, estratégia e sustentabilidade.

Name: Smart Learning Factory - Skopje
Description:
The Smart Learning Factory – Skopje (SFLS) was established in 2023 and situated at the Faculty of Mechanical Engineering, “Ss. Cyril and Methodius” University in Skopje. It is run by a team from the department of Industrial Engineering and Management. 
The SLFS originates from the Learn4SMEs project “Learning Factory for Improving Digital Competitiveness and Industry 4.0 Readiness of SMEs in Balkans” financed by EIT-Manufacturing, co-funded by the European Union where Technical University Wien and Festo Learn Zentrum guided the process. 
The main goal of the SFLS is to create a physical simulation environment for learning production concepts where students and people from the industry can learn new technologies and further develop their skills, focusing on Lean Management and Industry 4.0. For now, the SLFS is equipped with a Smart Kanban supermarket, smart Poka Yoke station, working station, transporter, 2d machine vision and a SCARA robot.
The Smart Learning Factory – Skopje is envisioned as:
- Showroom to discover new technologies for Lean and Industry 4.0
- Laboratory for experimenting with new technologies and scenarios
- Training center for upskilling and reskilling future industry skills
- Center for developing industry-specific solutions

Our Services Include:

1. Impact Reports – Transform data into professional, community-facing reports paired with internal recommendations for growth.

3. Outcomes Measurement – Build systems to track meaningful outcomes, not just outputs.
4. Program Evaluation – Collect and analyze data to assess program effectiveness and improve performance.
5. Grant Mapping & Writing – Identify funders, build a pipeline, and craft competitive proposals.
6. Academic Research Partnerships – Connect researchers and Veteran-serving organizations to build authentic, impactful collaborations.

From one-time projects to multi-year partnerships, VetREC delivers high-quality, Veteran-centered consulting that helps nonprofits, VSOs, and researchers grow their impact and funding capacity.

Ciò che rende il nostro lavoro speciale è il tocco umano che mettiamo in ogni progetto. 
Crediamo che la vera innovazione nasca dal dialogo, dall’ascolto e dalla capacità di cogliere l’essenza di ogni realtà. Lavoriamo fianco a fianco con imprenditori e aziende, non come semplici consulenti, ma come partner autentici che camminano al loro fianco, fornendo supporto strategico e creativo.

La chiave del nostro successo è l’intuizione: quel dono speciale di saper vedere lontano, di anticipare tendenze e opportunità che possono fare la differenza. 
Con In2ito Marketing, le aziende trovano non solo soluzioni, ma anche una guida fidata che le aiuta a orientarsi in un panorama in continua evoluzione. Il nostro obiettivo è chiaro: non solo raggiungere risultati, ma costruire un percorso che rifletta l’identità unica di ogni cliente, valorizzandone i punti di forza e trasformandoli in un vantaggio competitivo.

In2ito Marketing è tutto questo: sartorialità, intuito e un approccio umano che trasforma il marketing in uno strumento per guardare lontano, costruire futuro e generare valore.

Margherita Pisoni e Giulia Travaglia, fondatrici di In2ito Marketing, uniscono visione strategica e creatività per creare progetti innovativi e di successo. Con percorsi professionali complementari, fanno della cura dei dettagli e del valore umano il cuore di ogni loro progetto.

Name: projektretter.jetzt
Description:
Stell dir vor…
Deine Fertigung läuft reibungslos, die Maschinen sind optimal ausgelastet, und Verschwendung ist kein Thema mehr. Du und dein Team arbeiten effizient und fokussiert, ohne unnötige Verzögerungen oder Ausfälle. Die Produktivität steigt, und du kannst dich endlich auf das konzentrieren, was wirklich zählt – dein Unternehmenswachstum und zufriedene Kunden.

Kein ständiger Kampf mehr gegen Engpässe und Verluste. Keine frustrierenden Projekte, die aus dem Ruder laufen. Stattdessen strukturierte Abläufe, klare Prozesse und ein Team, das optimal arbeitet.

Was ich mache
Als Projektretter helfe ich Unternehmen, ihre Produktionsabläufe zu optimieren und Verschwendung nachhaltig zu eliminieren. Ich analysiere deine Prozesse, decke versteckte Effizienzbremsen auf und entwickle maßgeschneiderte Lösungen, die die Produktivität deines Unternehmens spürbar steigern. Meine Mission ist es, deine Ressourcen bestmöglich zu nutzen und dich von allem zu befreien, was deine Fertigung ausbremst.

Fragen, die wir in der Zusammenarbeit beantworten
Wo verstecken sich ungenutzte Potenziale in deinen Abläufen?
Welche Prozesse kosten dich Zeit, Geld und Ressourcen, ohne dass du es merkst?
Wie kannst du die Auslastung deiner Maschinen und deines Teams maximieren?
Wie erreichst du nachhaltige Effizienzsteigerungen, die nicht nur kurzfristig wirken, sondern langfristig Bestand haben?
Gemeinsam erarbeiten wir klare Antworten und setzen sie in die Praxis um – mit sichtbaren Ergebnissen für dein Unternehmen.

Mehr erfahren
Du möchtest wissen, wie ich dir helfen kann, deine Fertigung auf ein neues Level zu bringen? Schau dir meine bisherigen Projekte an oder lass uns in einem persönlichen Gespräch herausfinden, wie wir gemeinsam die Verschwendung in deinem Unternehmen eliminieren können.

Schreib mir einfach eine Nachricht – ich freue mich darauf, von dir zu hören und deine Herausforderungen anzugehen!

Name: Desarrollo Organizacional
Description:
Desarrollo Organizacional por Mónica V. Petrochelli

Nací en la provincia de Córdoba, me crié en la Patagonia Argentina, y este momento de mi vida, estoy viviendo en el sur de Italia.

Me formé como Psicóloga Social, especializándome en el área empresarial.  Desde el año 2010, dirijo una consultora que tiene como misión ofrecer a los equipos de trabajo en empresas y organizaciones de todo tipo, herramientas y enfoques que les permitan también cumplir con su misión.

La consultoría que ofrecemos es sistémica, un método de intervención y acompañamiento que pone el foco ”la solución” y permite a través de un marco y metodologías específicas, vislumbrar patrones que estén atentando contra los resultados y encontrar modos posibles de resolverlos, con una mirada que contemple a todos los que son parte de la organización. 

Desde este marco, se desarrollan los servicios que ofrecemos:

-	Programa Intensivo para líderes.
-	Consultoría Sistémica. 
-	Programa: Potencia tu liderazgo al máximo.
-	Configuraciones o constelaciones laborales.

CONFIGURACIONES LABORALES:
La metodología es práctica, rápida, concreta y reveladora, acompañando al consultante en el logro de sus objetivos ya sea personales, grupales u organizacionales, y en momentos de mayor complejidad, contribuye a mirar las situaciones desde lógicas no-lineales, generando también posibilidades extraordinarias.

Lo llevamos a cabo según lo que se necesita a partir de lo que cada cliente necesita resolver, decidir, saber, despejar o encontrar nuevas posibilidades.

A quiénes les aportamos valor?
A directivos, dueños, socios, líderes en general que deseen tener equipos y gestiones exitosas, a partir de nuevos paradigmas y metodologías.

Name: ALH Geofísica

El conocimiento, la innovación tecnológica, el trabajo en equipo y el compromiso ferviente de creer en lo que hacemos, son los pilares en los que se fundó nuestra compañía. Esto nos ha llevado a adquirir una enriquecedora experiencia de más de 30 años en diferentes países de Latinoamérica, brindando soluciones en diversas áreas a nuestros clientes.

¿Por qué elegirnos?

Name: NextGenSkilledTrades
Description:
NextGenSkilledTrades is dedicated to reshaping how the skilled trades are seen, supported, and pursued. Founded by Darryl Gratrix, a manufacturing leader with 25+ years of hands-on industry experience, the initiative exists to close the skilled trades gap by building awareness, changing perceptions, and connecting the next generation with real opportunities.

Through daily storytelling, speaking engagements, and partnerships with educators, associations, and employers, NextGenSkilledTrades highlights the impact of trades careers, not just as jobs, but as pathways to purpose, creativity, and long-term success.

We believe the future of manufacturing, construction, and essential services depends on visibility. That means reaching students early, equipping parents and educators with the right knowledge, and helping employers attract and retain talent.

From leveraging social media to spark conversations, to collaborating with industry leaders on innovative outreach tools like virtual reality training and career pathway programs, NextGenSkilledTrades is committed to modernizing how trades careers are presented and promoted.

At its core, the mission is simple: inspire belief in the next generation, and give them the tools, mentors, and opportunities to succeed.

 Follow along for stories, strategies, and solutions that drive skilled trades forward. Together, we’re not just filling jobs, we’re building the future.

Here are a few ways that we help companies secure their position in the market and enhance their business operations with trade consulting: 
 Interpreting regulations, scope, and application to your business and shipping needs.
 Reviewing your trade compliance program to find areas that need improvement in policies and procedures.
 Classification of your import/export shipments to ensure seamless delivery.
 Jurisdiction determination of your products and services.
 Assisting in all export and import compliance needs.
 Drafting, reviewing, and overseeing licenses and agreements.

Your business is unique, and you need trade compliance consultants to go above and beyond for your success. Our hands-on approach will take your compliance program from good to great as we take action on everything from large-scale, primary operations and even subtle tweaks with day-to-day activities.

We offer a wide range of trade compliance services like: 
 International Trade Compliance Consulting
 OFAC Restricted Party Screens
 Import & Export Training
 Trade Compliance Managed Services
 Trade Compliance Audits
 Trade Compliance Program Development
 Voluntary Disclosures
 Classification Projects

Are you ready to be 100% confident that you are abiding by all ITAR, EAR, and trade compliance regulations? Let us help your company comply with ITAR, EAR, and other import/export regulations today!

Name: Ecuador Top-Notch Management Worldwide Leadership
Description:
Ecuador Top-Notch Management Worldwide Leadership fue fundada en Loja, Ecuador por la experta y líder ecuatoriana Johanna Montalvo Vázquez tras un ´programa de patronazgo y sponsorización digital de European Lidership de Alemania, que es la Web 2.0 líder en el mundo digital. 

Las líneas de negocio que ofrece Johanna Montalvo Vázquez con estos servicios son las siguientes: 

 	Acompañamiento en toma de decisiones basadas en la calidad. 

Tomar decisiones puede ser un proceso complejo, e implica cierta incertidumbre es por ello que para producir los efectos deseados deben ser fundamentadas en el análisis y evaluación de datos e información

 	Identificación y resolución creativa de conflictos entre el trabajo, el individuo y la dirección. 

Los conflictos no deben ser solo vistos como una crisis sino como la oportunidad de un cambio creativo encontrando, una solución pacífica a los desacuerdos que se presentan. 

 	Identificación de errores comunes y especiales de la empresa y sus colaboradores y como resolverlos a través de la mejora continua.

Errar es humano, la calidad se basa en la mejora continua a través de una correcta identificación de los errores y sus causas. 

 	Asesoramiento en escucha activa y comunicación asertiva con clientes y colaboradores para identificar oportunidades de mejora en la calidad.

Una correcta comunicación es la columna vertebral de toda organización; la comunicación debe enfocarse el mensaje que quiero que el receptor escuche. 

 	Acompañamiento en la resignificación ante la presencia de crisis.

Lo que marca el éxito es nuestra respuesta frente a una crisis y el plan de acción. 

 	Determinar el contexto motivacional del colaborador.

Un adecuado contexto motivacional aumenta la producción, cada personas somos un mundo de emociones que nos potencian.

Description:
A Portos do Norte, SA é uma empresa privada de capitais moçambicanos com sede em Nacala e com delegação em Maputo.

A Portos do Norte é membro fundador da AOPM – Associação dos Operadores Portuários de Moçambique e membro da APLOP – Associação dos Portos de Língua Oficial Portuguesa.

A Portos do Norte é uma empresa especializada na operação e gestão de terminais portuários, sendo atualmente responsável pela prestação de serviços onshore, que actua há 10 anos no Porto de Nacala, na sequência de uma parceria estabelecida com o CFM. Os serviços prestados incluem a prestação de serviços de estiva, manuseamento de cargas e aluguer de equipamento portuário, investindo na melhoria da prestação dos seus serviços como forma de contribuir para o crescimento do porto. 

O principal objectivo do Porto de Nacala é apoiar o crescimento económico na região da SADC e facilitar a exportação de bens provenientes de Moçambique, Malawi e Zâmbia através do Porto de Nacala, em Moçambique.

Name: TUV MEA Branch
Description:
At TUV MEA (Middle East & Asia), we stand at the forefront of Industrial Quality, Safety, Inspection Services, Training, and Consultancy. With a commitment to excellence, we bring a wealth of experience and expertise to empower your business with the highest standards of quality, safety, and operational efficiency.

Our Core Services:

ISO Audit and Certifications: 
ISO audits are systematic assessments conducted to evaluate an organization's adherence to International Organization for Standardization (ISO) standards. Certifications are conducted to review and ensure that the organization meets specific ISO standards, signifying their commitment to best practices, quality management, environmental sustainability, and other critical benchmarks.

Inspection and Testing: 
Inspection services involve the meticulous examination of industrial equipment, structures, and processes to identify potential defects, ensure compliance with safety standards, and enhance overall reliability. Testing activities encompass a wide range of assessments, including materials testing, product testing, and performance testing, to validate the quality and functionality of components within industrial processes.

Training Programs: 
Training programs are designed to upskill and educate personnel involved in industrial processes, ensuring they are well-versed in safety protocols, industry regulations, and the latest technologies. These programs contribute to the development of a highly competent workforce capable of adapting to evolving industry standards and technological advancements.

Consultancy Services: 
We are also providing the consultancy services in the industrial sectors for Quality Systems, Safety Systems, Environment Management, Technical Systems, Supply Chain Management, Aviation Systems and Oil & Gas including the expert guidance and strategic advice aiming to optimize their processes, navigate regulatory landscapes, and enhance overall operational efficiency.

Name: Durably - Matchmakers in Sustainability
Description:
Durably is an impact-driven company that matches passionate people with companies and organisations that see sustainability as a key element of their business model.

We support companies in their journey towards sustainability, envisioning a green growth model. We have developed a unique 3-step methodology covering the operational, tactical and strategic levels to establish and implement their ESG policy within the required regulatory framework. 

1. Discovery journey: mapping.

The journey to sustainability should be a journey and begins with discovery. We scan and map your current status on ESG and determine your starting point. 

2. Voyager Track: Project Planning

Following on from the Discovery Track, we help you define smart ESG goals by identifying priorities, setting appropriate KPIs and a clear timeline.  We apply a Green Growth Model canvas, seeking a pragmatic balance between economic and sustainable growth.  Our aim is to deliver and/or assist you in the next step towards a CSRD compliant sustainability report. 

3. Navigation Track: Implementation 

We match the ideal sustainability professional to your ESG programme, taking into account your specific resource requirements. Our "Durablys" can range from sustainability directors, ESG coordinators, project implementers executing your ESG programme, to sparring partners to help you make strategic decisions, on an on -demand basis.  By leveraging our extensive partnership network, we are able to help you in a very pragmatic way with any sustainability question or need.

Durably believes that any company that focuses on sustainable goals will create new business opportunities.  Sustainability should be seen as a solution and an accelerator for economic growth, not just another issue to be dealt with.

Name: Quant | Consultora de riesgos financieros
Description:
AYUDAMOS A FINANCIEROS Y TESOREROS A ALCANZAR SUS METAS EN LA GESTIÓN DEL RIESGO DE DIVISAS. 

- - - - - - - - - -

-> MONITOR FOREX: solución para la gestión del riesgo de divisas.

Los departamentos financieros se enfrentan a una problemática común: la falta de una herramienta específica para gestionar el riesgo de divisa. Esto provoca costes de oportunidad, horas de dedicación poco productivas y la falta de generación de KPIs relevantes para la toma de decisiones.

- Nuestra solución Monitor Forex facilita:

1.Generar ahorros gracias a un mayor control de la situación.
2.Ahorrar horas de trabajo y evitar errores humanos.
3.Generar informes automáticos con los KPIs adaptados a tu negocio para aportar información de valor a tus reuniones.

Se trata de una solución creada a partir de la experiencia multisectorial de Quant en la gestión del riesgo de divisas, donde un excel con programación avanzada, potenciado con Power BI, empodera a los directores financieros y tesoreros para facilitarles y resolverles sus problemáticas en la gestión del riesgo de divisas.


-> CONSULTORÍA ADVISORY: si quieres nos incorporamos a tu equipo.

Gracias a nuestra especialización y experiencia multisectorial en la gestión del riesgo de divisas hemos desarrollado un formato de consultoría “advisory” que resuelve las necesidades de los directores financieros y tesoreros que quieren gestionar en solitario el área de divisas.
 
Nuestro conocimiento y experiencia nos convierte en una “herramienta de utilidad” para apoyarles en cuestiones técnicas, análisis de casuísticas, planteamientos estratégicos, opinión independiente, abordar situaciones complejas, e incluso ayudarles a preparar reuniones internas.

El ahorro de costes de oportunidad, el ahorro de horas de trabajo y el seguimiento del riesgo y los kpi´s más relevantes son los objetivos de nuestro apoyo.
- - - - - 

Nuestros valores van con nosotros: experiencia, capacidad técnica, dedicación y compromiso.

Name: Green Chemistry Serbia
Description:
Globalni program za zelenu hemiju i inovacije / Global Greenchem Innovation and Network Programme

Šta je Globalni program za zelenu hemiju i inovacije?

Naša vizija je da povežemo globalnu zajednicu zelene hemije i inženjeringa, podstaknemo primenu principa zelene hemije u naučnim istraživanjima i inovacijama i pružimo obrazovanje o principima zelene hemije. Fokusiramo na generisanje znanja i primenu zelene hemije na svim nivoima tehnološkog razvoja i inovacija. Ovaj program postavlja ambiciozne ciljeve koji su od suštinskog značaja za životnu sredinu, ljudsko zdravlje i našu budućnost.

Podstičemo razvoj zelene hemije i inovacija

Zelena hemija predstavlja motor zelenih inovacija i ciljanog dizajna. Tehnologije koje smanjuju prisustvo opasnih hemikalija u našem okruženju brzo napreduju i donose korist celim društvu. Ipak, veliki potencijal zelene hemije i zelenog inženjeringa još uvek nije u potpunosti iskorišćen, uprkos očiglednoj motivaciji i potrebi. Da bismo ubrzali ove promene, ključno je podizanje svesti i pružanje podrške lokalnim kapacitetima.

Globalni program za zelenu hemiju i inovacije (Global Greenchem Innovation and Network Programme - GGINP) ima za cilj da ojača zdravo upravljanje industrijskim hemikalijama i njihovim otpadom kroz bolju kontrolu, smanjenje i/ili eliminaciju otpada, a posebno da osnaži rešenja zelene hemije za dugotrajne organske zagađivače (POP hemikalije) i zamenu žive kroz izgradnju kapaciteta, inovacije i stvaranje globalne mreže zelene hemije koja podstiče vidljivost, podršku i implementaciju.

Name: EXPERTISE MEUBLES ET OBJETS
Description:
Expertise Meubles et Objets ce sont 3 missions principales :

1/ Expertise lors de successions ou de donations :

Expertise et inventaire des meubles, objets, bijoux et voitures présents dans la succession ou la donation avec valorisation de ces derniers.
Expertise en valeur marchande servant de base à l’assiette fiscale de taxation du notaire lors de la succession, au partage équitable en présence d’héritiers ou lors de donation.
Conseil et accompagnement des particuliers et familles dans ce cadre : tendances du marché, choix de conservation ou de revente du patrimoine détenu, accompagnement à la revente, préconisation de restauration et de conservation.

2/ Expertise en valeur agréée d’assurance :

Expertise et inventaire des meubles, objets, bijoux et voitures présents chez l’assuré. Expertise en valeur assurance.
60 à 70 % des objets de valeur détenus par les particuliers sont mal assurés et sont sujets à de nombreux risques : dégâts des eaux, transport, vols, incendies, etc. 
La valeur agréée consiste à faire effectuer une expertise en amont par un professionnel. De cette manière, le montant de la garantie est fixé, quoi qu’il arrive par agréement entre l’assureur et l’assuré.

3/ Galerie :

Proposer en vente directe des meubles et objets issus d’achats auprès de particuliers ou de maisons de ventes aux enchères en apportant une garantie sur l’origine et sur l’estimation.
Travailler en qualité d’apporteur d’affaires auprès d’une sélection de Commissaires-Priseurs sur des œuvres plus exceptionnelles !

Name: Mevrouw Blaauw
Description:
Ik help ondernemers met het verbeteren van hun processen  en samenwerkingen. Zet hierbij de klant centraal en zorg dat ze passen bij de medewerkers en de cultuur van het bedrijf. Hierdoor zorgen we ervoor dat jouw bedrijf groeit door van nog meer waarde te zijn voor je klant. Ik maak impact en impact creëer resultaat.

Ik zorg ervoor dat jij en je team, meer tijd overhouden, door effectief van A naar B te gaan en met de processen die ik in jouw organisatie ontwikkel Hierdoor ontstaat overzicht, helderheid en worden verantwoordelijkheden nog duidelijker waarmee er eigenaarschap wordt gecreëerd.  Het resultaat is dat er groei ontstaat in de organisatie voor zowel voor je bedrijf als de medewerker.

Trajecten:
Groei en klaar voor de volgende stap. 
Je bent lekker gestart met je onderneming en je groeit lekker door. Maar doe je nu de juiste dingen? Voegt dat waar jullie elke dag druk mee zijn, waarde toe voor je klanten? Worden er regelmatig zaken niet (goed) opgepakt en heb je het gevoel dat je heel hard werkt, maar je geen idee hebt of je nog de juiste dingen doet? Is het tijd om eens goed te kijken of je nog impact creëert voor je klanten?

Groei door naar een efficiëntere organisatie (Black Belt)
Met behulp van de Lean methodiek gaan we opzoek, naar verspilling in je organisatie en gaan deze omzetten naar waarde. We volgen de stappen van het DMAIC of A3 en zorgen voor een proces die in de flow loopt en alleen maar waarde toevoegt. 

Groei door continue verbeteren. 
Je hebt een team met medewerkers die mooie verbeter ideeën hebben, maar hoe zorg je er nu voor dat ze ook de juiste dingen doen? Hierin kan ik je team begeleiden. 

Ik doe wat nodig is om te zorgen dat jij en jouw medewerkers waarde toevoegen. Door ze in te zetten op hun talenten creëer ik impact voor jouw klant, de medewerker en je bedrijf. 

Ik geef je krachtige tools, Je kunt op mij rekenen.

Our team of Consultants are all industry trained specialists who have extensive ‘hands-on’ experience across a diverse range of Lift, Moving Walk and Escalator equipment, having held various technical field positions with some of the major global Elevator Manufacturing Companies (Boral Elevators, KONE Elevators, KONE AG Switzerland, Otis Elevator Company, Schindler Lifts, Johns and Waygood Limited and TK Elevators).  Our Consultants bring together over 500+ years of combined industry experience.

LML Lift Consultants Pty Ltd Headquarters and Vertical Ambition interactive training centre is located at 1/28 Enterprise Drive, Rowville in Victoria. 

Our services include; Performance Based Maintenance Contracts, Maintenance Audits and Reports, New and Modernisation design and specifications, Project Management, and various other optimisation services. 

LML Lift Consultants are a proud sponsor and partner of the Elevator Escalator Safety Foundation (EESF), which is a recognised charitable organisation in the United States  and disseminates safety material to the public in order to eliminate preventable accidents on Lift and Escalator equipment.

The objectives, criteria and motivations of this 3i platform (non-profit) are:

- Digital transformation of companies:

Even being in the 5.0 world, the truth is that most companies did not make the transition from the 1.0 to the 2.0 world well because they neither used a structured method nor did they worry about digitizing customers and suppliers. We correct that error with a cognitive ladder that goes from world 1.0 to world 5.0, rung by rung, of said ladder.

- Communication and contribution of ideas:

Linkedin is the platform where ideas that transform the world are generously shared and whoever is integrated into our page will receive everything they need to develop personally and professionally.

- Leadership:

From our web 2.0 we promote a human and humanistic leadership, which complements diverse profiles in teams and departments of companies and people.

- Training:

We believe that all growth, including digital growth, must be approached from a deep sense of responsibility. For this reason, as in all vital aspects, it is the individual and corporate responsibility to be permanently trained, starting from the origin and projecting it towards the future.

- Globalization:

After the pandemic, digitalization has accelerated worldwide, so there are no limits or borders in all the fundamental concepts indicated above. Now it is more necessary than ever to develop them to expand all activity on a global level.

Name: Civic Consulting Alliance
Description:
Civic Consulting Alliance is a nonpartisan nonprofit that brings together dedicated staff and pro bono expertise from the business community to help government and civic leaders take on the Chicago region’s most pressing challenges. For nearly 40 years, we’ve served as a cornerstone of the civic ecosystem, enabling leaders to deliver systems-level solutions that create a more vibrant, equitable, and prosperous region for all.

In the past five years, Civic Consulting Alliance has provided an average of $20 million in high-impact pro bono consulting services annually. We align public, private, and social sector efforts around shared goals, providing the capacity, insights, and strategic support needed to move ideas into action. Our mission is rooted in a simple but powerful belief: when cross-sector partners work together, we can get big things done for the region and its people.

We organize our work into four interconnected focus areas that are critical to improving quality of life: Economic Vitality, Education, Health, Safety & Justice. Our work is designed to address root causes, scale sustainable solutions, and build the capacity of civic institutions to respond to complex challenges. Our project teams comprise in-house experts and pro bono consultants from leading firms, who deliver results in areas such as strategy, implementation, process improvement, and organizational design.

What sets Civic Consulting Alliance apart is our ability to build trust across sectors and serve as a neutral partner in times of transformation. Our long-standing relationships within the government, civic, philanthropic, and private sectors allow us to forge collaborations that might not otherwise happen. We bring deep institutional knowledge, cross-sector fluency, and proven management consulting experience to every engagement.

Together with our partners, we help shape the future of the Chicago region to ensure that all residents can thrive.

Name: Cosain Consultancy
Description:
We are the industry leaders in safety consultancy, training and development. We can provide bespoke services to you and your company's needs.

High Risk Consultancy: Since our formation, we have successfully deployed News Safety Consultants with news crews to every conflict zone worldwide. Our success is having the ability to deploy rapidly, ground truth, understanding our clients need to get the story in the safest way possible, integrating as part of a team and knowing the role of every team member and assisting when possible. 

New Safety Advisors: In recent years the domestic threat to journalists has increased dramatically. Many news agencies identified the benefits of employing security operatives as ‘back watchers’ on public order and domestic stories within the UK and we provide this. 

Hostile Environment Training: With the mandatory Hostile Environment Training for journalists who deploy on high risk tasks, we run bespoke courses. Many of our team are trained and qualified instructors, some with good foreign language skills. We ensure that our instructors regularly deploy bringing currency to our training. 

Executive Protection: Throughout the years we have been involved in many projects supporting our clients in the corporate sector. Our clients have come from a range of backgrounds, including foreign royal families, diplomats, celebrities, CEO’s of leading international companies and Ultra-High-Net-Worth clients. We understand the need for utmost discreet & professional services in tune with the professional etiquette needed for our clients. 

Logistical Support: We have the ability to transport valuable equipment for our clients anywhere across the globe with the utmost safety. 

Audits: We carry out audits for our clients and partners on a regular basis, including reviewing security on foreign Bureaus, producing dynamic risk assessments and overhauling storerooms for efficiency.

Name: IMPACT EVOLVE
Description:
Scaling shouldn’t feel this hard.

As your product takes off, your operations start to bend under pressure. Systems buckle, teams burn out, and what used to work suddenly doesn’t. Disconnected systems, fulfilment delays, and constant firefighting.

That’s when businesses call us.

We’re not traditional consultants. Too many diagnose but don’t deliver. Or they deliver but can’t scale. We do both.

Every member of our team has lived the reality of scaling founder-led brands. We’ve run £100m+ supply chains, led launches, and fixed the cracks growth creates. We know what it takes to turn operational pain into performance. 

We help ambitious, product-based brands (£0–200m) move from spreadsheet chaos and siloed systems into connected, optimised operational platforms and playbooks that scale reliably and profitably.

Whether it’s 3PL design, system refinement, or team structure, we deliver change you can measure, not just advice you can read.

Growth isn’t luck. It’s clarity.

That’s what we build.

Name: EVConsult
Description:
Our dream is to create an emission-free world. This will involve stopping the emission of harmful substances in order to enjoy clean air. We contribute towards this by harnessing our passion for electric mobility.

Transition to zero-emission transport
Our enthusiasm for a sustainable world goes hand in hand with our extensive knowledge and experience in the field of electric mobility. We provide companies and government bodies with optimal support in their transition to zero emission mobility

We offer support with formulating strategies and provide project management in the dynamic world of electric mobility. What’s more, we orchestrate EV projects and processes from start to finish.

We have been active in the field of electric mobility since 2008. This makes us the first and largest independent electric mobility consultancy in the world. While based in the Netherlands and Belgium, our ambitions extend worldwide because energy transition is not linked to particular regions. We have, to date, carried out a large number of international EV projects in countries including the United Kingdom, Germany, France, India, Israel and Morocco. By operating actively in the EV sector from the start, we have built up the knowledge and expertise needed to provide sound, independent consultancy services.

In our efforts to stay ahead of the latest developments, we invest in scientific research and innovation. In order to accelerate developments in electric mobility, we have joined forces to conduct pilot projects and offer research programmes with universities such as the Delft University of Technology, the Eindhoven University of Technology and the VU University in Amsterdam. Together with our research partners, we test the latest technological and social innovations in the world of e-mobility. We also serve as a bridge between market and research parties, connecting them within the context of a range of projects focusing on creating future-proof EV solutions.

Name: Drone Education Services
Description:
We offfer you tailored services.

Level One has been developed to ensure our clients understand the core legal framework and responsibilities required to fly drones commercially under Part 107 of the Federal Aviation Regulations.  

A Basic Workflow Review is one of our most important services.  We take a look under the hood of how you currently operate your drone program — even if it’s informal — and identifying whether your processes are safe, efficient, and compliant.  We examine the end-to-end steps you use for planning, executing, and managing drone missions, and then identify the gaps or risks in those steps.

We then review your internal written policies, procedures, and supporting documents to make sure they reflect legal requirements and promote operational safety.

Finally, we provide you with a Recommendations Report after we've conducted assessments.  We then disclose to you whether your program needs further review, workflow evaluation, and policy development.   It’s a clear, client-facing document that outlines our professional guidance for bringing your drone operations into compliance, efficiency, and best practice.  The report helps answer:  “What should we do next?”

Level Two builds on Level One by formalizing your drone operations.  We’ll develop custom standard operating procedures (SOPs), a detailed scorecard from MOCK Inspection, an audit-specific Corrective Action Plan (CAP) template, a staff training guide, a ready-to-use Digital Audit Folder, and two hours of live training to ensure everyone is aligned and compliant.

Level Three is our premium package, a turnkey solution for building, managing, and sustaining a compliant drone program.   In addition to everything in Level Two, we’ll provide you with a customized Operations Manual, set up fleet and personnel registries, and conduct an on-site field observation day, incorporate internal risk management SOPs, develop a Remote ID compliance plan, and provide six months of support.

Description:
Your trusted partner in delivering Effective Service transformation.

Using our proven Effective Service consulting, training and solutions we help business leaders better connect their people, processes and technology to deliver more effective service for less.

Our clients come to us because they need help setting up or executing a service improvement project or transformation programme. They value our experience and expertise in delivering service transformation programmes that span the end-to-end business, and are interested to know how we can help them identify, quantify and tackle service waste in their organisations, ensuring they are addressing the root causes of high cost/poor CX before automating processes or investing in digital.

Who are our Clients?
We are typically contacted by Customer Service Directors, COOs, CX Directors and Transformation Directors of UK-based consumer regulated businesses.

What are their typical challenges? 
Often needing to reduce costs whilst improving service, they may be tempted to reach straight for technology solutions, but lack insight into the existence, extent and impact of service waste across their contact centre, back-office and field operations. By eliminating the "bad costs," of service waste first, they can enhance customer experience and business performance, and ensure any future technology investments deliver real value.

What clients get when working with us
They can expect us to provide a comprehensive data-led review of current customer contacts and journeys, highlighting opportunities to remove bad costs by making service more effective. This process establishes a clear baseline for beginning a transformation journey and will add significant value to existing digitisation and automation programmes.  Our clients typically achieve a 20%+ reduction in contact volumes, up to 40% reduction in operating costs, and significantly improved satisfaction scores.

Name: SatuSolusi Consultancy
Description:
SatuSolusi helps foreign and Indonesian businesses launch, secure, and scale their operations in Indonesia with clarity, compliance, and confidence. We provide end-to-end consulting and managed services across four core areas — Legal & Investment, Accounting & Tax, HR & Talent, and Marketing & Sales — delivering an integrated approach that simplifies complexity and drives sustainable growth.

In Legal & Investment, we guide clients through company establishment, PT PMA registration, licensing, due diligence, and regulatory approvals. Our experts ensure your structure is compliant, your risk is managed, and your market entry is efficient — so you can start operations with confidence.

In Accounting & Tax, we handle monthly bookkeeping, payroll, and all statutory submissions, including income tax, VAT, and LKPM reports. We also implement Odoo ERP to automate accounting workflows and improve financial visibility, helping businesses maintain precision, efficiency, and full compliance with Indonesian tax laws.

Our HR & Talent team supports every aspect of employment in Indonesia — from drafting compliant contracts and registering BPJS programs to managing payroll, leave, and performance systems. We also assist in sourcing and onboarding qualified local talent, ensuring teams are aligned, compliant, and productive from day one.

In Marketing & Sales, we help companies position and grow their brands in the Indonesian market. From go-to-market strategy and digital localization to Odoo CRM and marketing automation, we connect your business to the right audience through data-driven strategies and clear communication.

By combining regulatory expertise, bilingual support, and technology-driven systems, SatuSolusi enables businesses to operate efficiently and confidently in Indonesia’s dynamic market.

SatuSolusi — simplifying compliance, empowering growth, and building sustainable businesses in Indonesia.

Name: Centre for Development Management (CDM) Consulting
Description:
The Centre for Development Management (CDM) is a registered private partner consulting and learning centre offering policy and technical advice, business development, capacity building and strategic development management services in rural development, education, gender, HIV and AIDS, Children, Youth organizational development, IEC, natural resources management, GIS/GPS and agriculture. Established in 2003, the Centre was established to support poverty reduction efforts by providing affordable but high quality local technical assistance in social and economic development as guided by the Millennium Development Goals (MDGs) and the Malawi Growth and Development Strategy (MDGS), the over-arching policy instruments at the national and regional level. 

Over the past 20 years, the CDM has worked with a number of national, regional and international organisations, some of which include: The Malawi Government, USAID, the National AIDS Commission, The Department for International Development (DFID), Sunbird Hotels, UNICEF, UNFPA, UNAIDS, various Government Ministries, Save the Children, Family Health International, GIZ, World Vision International, Catholic Development Commission, Plan International, AusAID, LTS International, International Institute for Environment and Development, CARE Malawi, CARE Rwanda, NEDICO Harare, UNICEF Swaziland, Microfinance Opportunities (Washington), USAID, ECORY Netherlands and many other organisations.

Nosso método é uma jornada guiada em três etapas:

1. O Diagnóstico da Operação: Tudo começa com um mergulho profundo na sua realidade. Mapeamos seus fluxos de trabalho, identificamos os gargalos que geram custos e as oportunidades de automação. O resultado é um plano de ação claro, com ROI projetado e prioridades definidas.

2. A Implementação da Solução: Com o plano em mãos, partimos para a execução. É aqui que nossa expertise em Automação (RPA), Business Intelligence (BI) e uma Gestão de Projetos (PM) impecável entram em ação de forma integrada. Nós orquestramos a solução, garantindo a entrega no prazo e no orçamento.

3. A Parceria Estratégica: A entrega não é o fim. Como seu parceiro de longo prazo (vCTO as a Service), acompanhamos seus resultados, garantindo que sua operação não apenas funcione, mas evolua em um ciclo de melhoria contínua.

O resultado é uma operação mais lucrativa e uma equipe mais engajada.

Pronto para dar o primeiro passo? Agende seu Diagnóstico de Eficiência gratuito.

Dans le monde public, le cabinet est un trait d’union entre élus, habitants et administration. Funambules entre vision stratégique et ultra-réactivité au quotidien, les femmes et les hommes du cabinet sont au service des élus et du territoire. Ils ont un rôle de conseil pour impulser, sécuriser et valoriser l’action, avec une exigence : la loyauté.

Pour innover, impacter ou tout simplement sortir la tête de l’eau, l’aide extérieure est souvent pertinente, apaisante et gagnante. C’est là qu’intervient le cabinet décalé ! « Être décalé », c’est cerner rapidement les enjeux d’une situation pour proposer un service singulier, dédouané de tous préjugés ou les freins internes.

De la stratégie à la production, le cabinet décalé vous accompagne en sortant du cadre… Pour simplifier votre quotidien d’élu, de collaborateur de cabinet ou de cadre administratif, sécuriser vos projets emblématiques ou dépoussiérer votre communication, nous sommes à votre écoute !

iidis es una iniciativa privada orientada a generar tendencias dirigidas al bien común y el cambio de paradigma centrado el buentrato y el cuidado mutuo dentro de nuestro ecosistema social, natural y virtual mediante el diseño, desarrollo, implementación y evaluación de propuestas de alto impacto para niños, niñas, adolescentes, jóvenes y personas en situación de vulnerabilidad; para conseguirlo promovemos cambios significativos a nivel personal, interpersonal, organizacional, estructural y social, con incidencia en los agentes con capacidad de toma de decisiones, especialmente Administraciones Públicas, inversores sociales y entidades del Tercer Sector; creamos las condiciones necesarias para el desarrollo y consolidación de sinergias, alianzas estratégicas y redes de colaboración a todos los niveles y diseñamos espacios y herramientas que faciliten todas estas dinámicas. 

Somos expertos en acompañar a personas y entidades que trabajan con la infancia, tanto en el ámbito deportivo, educativo y sanitario como social y cultural para conseguir que sus actividades se realicen en un contexto generador de buen trato.

Capacitamos a todos los agentes clave para la prevención y en su caso intervención frente a situaciones de violencia que puedan sufrir los niños, niñas, jóvenes y adolescentes en el ámbito de su actuación y a llevar a cabo esta bajo criterios de buentrato. Hasta la fecha, iidis ha colaborado con más de 450 entidades, organizaciones, administraciones, universidades y empresas en España, Italia y Portugal (https://iidis.net/) y formado a más de 10.000 personas de manera presencial y online a través de su plataforma de Comunidades de Práctica, Aprendizaje e Innovación Abierta (https://kreacomunidad.org/)

Name: ROAR Creative & Consulting Agency
Description:
OWNER/DIRECTOR BIOGRAPHY:
Selena Mills
Founder / Senior Knowledge Translation Communications Consultant & Lead Designer, ROAR Creative
Project Manager & Strategic Communications, The Centre for WISE Practices in Indigenous Health, Women’s College Hospital

Selena is a mix of disenfranchised Cree (Mirasty, Merasty, and Mirasty-Bird), and French Canadian-Settler (Charlebois), living in Barrie and direct descendant of the Woodland Cree peoples of Lac La Ronge, Treaty 6. A people and purpose-driven shapeshifter-interdisciplinary, she’s an innovative digital renegade with over two decades of experience:
●	Senior Indigenous Knowledge Translation consultant, communications strategist, and community partnerships builder 
●	Film, TV, The arts, Healthcare, Education
●	A Digital Publishing Awards & National Magazine Awards nominated writer and editor with acclaimed publications producing content for acclaimed publications for over 15 years
●	Third-party and B2B content creation, brand building, and digital illustration
●	Social strategy development and management, substantive copy editing, packaging (print and digital), master of curating content
●	Community-centered production and project management
●	video content and digital storytelling production
●	Digital illustration
●	Developing online education tools
●	Implementing innovative UI & UX website design

Selena helps dream clients create engaging and impactful content that delivers ROI conversions and builds community. This fulfils her core personal purpose of doing so as a relentless truth-teller, advocate for Indigenous told stories and leadership, “Indigenomics” and the representation of the diversity of Indigenous nations and perspectives in various capacities. Self-taught and academically trained, Selena has manifested a solid career positioned as a trailblazer in digital media, supporting the rematriation movement and Indigenous trailblazers; while kindly disrupting colonial healthcare institutions and the media.

Name: LASINDE
Description:
Un proyecto innovador ligado a mi propósito personal (ikigai) de aplicar el conocimiento adquirido durante más de 20 años y en más de 10 países en el ámbito de la innovación.

Se centra en diseñar e implementar experiencias alrededor de la innovación abierta en colaboración con un equipo de personas apasionadas de diferentes países y disciplinas.


Busca trasformar personas, organizaciones y territorios, creando experiencias únicas que activen la chispa de la innovación: capacitación experiencial, reflexión estratégica futura, generación de conexiones, innovación personal, comunidades de conocimiento para lograr resultados de impacto.

En LASINDE creemos en “la innovación con sentidiño”, somos creativ@s e innovador@s, pero sin dejar de ser metódic@s y riguros@s. 
Hacemos que las cosas pases, sin que sea acartonado, gris y aburrido. 

¿Cuál es nuestro método?  

ACTIVACIÓN+EVOLUCIÓN+CONEXIÓN

ACTIVACIÓN: Creemos que la innovación sólo surge cuando nos activamos en sentido figurado o real, saliendo de nuestra zona de confort o haciendo que ésta sea diferente. A diario, todos vemos las mismas cosas, pero cada persona construye su propia realidad, esto no es ajeno al diseño de las políticas públicas y los proyectos en el ámbito de la innovación. 
A través del método LASINDE ayudamos a nuestros aliados a mirar con otros ojos activando una nueva realidad más abierta, sostenible e inclusiva.
EVOLUCIÓN: En un mundo en donde la incertidumbre es la única certeza sólo tendremos éxito si hacemos suficientes iteraciones de nuestras organizaciones y de nosotros mism@s para responder al propósito de nuestros usuarios. Nuestra capacidad de evolucionar,en este nuevo entorno, pasa por convencer e integrar al mayor número de personas vinculándolas a proyectos transformadores dentro y fuera de las organizaciones.
A través del método LASINDE  ayudamos a agitar las organizaciones y prepararla para la planificación y gestión en entornos cambiantes, a través de un “hackeo” de los sistemas

Bem-vindo à Omena Consultoria, onde desbravamos o universo dos dados no cenário de seguros, atendendo desde pequenas Insurtechs até as gigantes referências do mercado! Na Omena, sua empresa não apenas lida com dados; ela desbloqueia o potencial oculto por trás de cada informação.

Na nossa jornada, oferecemos:

Análise Diagnóstica de Dados: Desvendamos os segredos enterrados em seus processos operacionais, proporcionando insights valiosos para aprimorar cada faceta do seu negócio.

Análise Preditiva: Prevemos o futuro do seu relacionamento com clientes, identificando aqueles com maior probabilidade de cancelamento, descobrindo os leads mais aquecidos e personalizando a oferta certa para cada perfil.

People Analytics: Desvendamos o potencial humano em sua equipe, proporcionando o conhecimento necessário para impulsionar o desempenho e a satisfação no trabalho.

Dataviz: Transformamos dados em arte visual, criando dashboards inteligentes que contam a história do seu negócio de forma clara e impactante.

Inteligência Artificial e Machine Learning: Libertamos sua equipe de tarefas manuais repetitivas, permitindo que se concentrem em atividades que verdadeiramente potencializam o capital intelectual da sua empresa.

Na Omena Consultoria, não oferecemos apenas soluções; proporcionamos uma visão de futuro, onde seus dados são a chave para desbloquear inovações e conquistar o próximo patamar no mundo dos seguros. Vamos transformar dados em estratégias, e estratégias em sucesso!

Export Development: Access new international markets and optimize supply chains.
Market Expansion: Develop strategies to penetrate untapped local or global markets.
Profitability Enhancement: Identify cost-saving opportunities and reduce waste.
Operational Efficiency: Streamline processes to improve productivity and efficiency.

E o melhor de tudo é que a empresa não para de evoluir, buscando sempre novas soluções e tecnologias para aprimorar seus serviços.

Name: CMP Solutions
Description:
CMP Solutions specialise in services for businesses in Ireland, primarily (but not exclusively) in the manufacturing industry.  We are a one-stop shop for the design and implementation of sustainable solutions in the following areas:

•	Cost Reduction: Sustainably cutting your costs by up to 80%, helping you to achieve your short term goals and long term growth.

•	Process Engineering: Optimising your processes from design to commercialisation, improving quality and service by up to 90% while minimising cost and time constraints.

•	Design Solutions: Design of prototype and bespoke tooling using CAD, 3D printing and other design methods to 100% error-proof your processes.

•	Problem-Solving & Continuous Improvement: Advancing your company’s competitive edge by as much as 80% through continuous improvement programs, problem-solving and the use of root cause analysis tools, all based on Six Sigma principles.

•	Lean & Operational Excellence: Eliminating non-value activity, standardising work practices, implementing processes and enhancing productivity cumulatively result in the highest standards of operational excellence.

•	Leadership & People Development: Delivering highly effective people leaders at all levels of your company that maximise employee output and empower them to push towards achieving your organisation’s strategic goals and long term vision.

•	Quality Engineering: Protecting your business from potentially fatal product quality and compliance risks, while ensuring the highest standards of quality and customer support through our range of quality services.

Almoxarifados e estoques

Logística interna e externa

Compras e relacionamento com fornecedores

Aplicamos ferramentas como Lean, Kaizen, 5S, FMEA, MSA, CEP e APQP, além de técnicas de análise de dados, KPIs e gestão por indicadores. Também atuamos na estruturação de fornecedores e contratos, com foco em compliance e performance.

 Se sua empresa precisa de mais organização, controle e resultados nos processos logísticos e de suprimentos, a Inacio Process Solution pode te ajudar a evoluir com inteligência e segurança.

Name: Hope Circuits Institute
Description:
The Hope Circuits Institute provides universities and diverse organizations with the resources and support necessary to re-wire their systems with a focus on human and ecological flourishing. 

Hope Circuits Institute offers a wide range of programming, from university-wide talks to strategic visioning with boards and senates, hope summits with diverse thought partners from across campus and the sector, book clubs, workshops with faculty, co-creative focussed on student engagement, and systems change management.

The project is animated by a series of books and workbooks; the first in this series is Hope Circuits: Rewiring Universities and other Systems for Human Flourishing (McGill-Queen’s University Press, 2024). 

Through the Hope Circuits Institute, Dr. Jessica Riddell convenes gatherings - on campuses, through associations, and across the PSE sector - to build the mindsets necessary to adapt and lead at a time of paradigmatic shifts in higher education and in society more broadly.

Aucune adhésion financière n'est nécessaire, juste suivre le profil et le #oncraintdegun sur Linkedin pour participer à l'action si le thème vous touche en plein cœur!

Le signe de ralliement au mouvement est le , certaines personnes intègrent ce signe sur leur profil Linkedin juxtaposé à leur nom. Il signifie en langue des signes "je vous aime" pour montrer le soutien à chaque personne, chaque cause que nous défendons.

Derrière ce compte un auteur Aymeric GUEGAN dont le profil est accessible sur Linkedin également. Il est en charge de relayer ce que la communauté lui demande de soutenir. Dans les QPV on le surnomme le bonhomme du TURFU c'est son laisser passer!

Name: Systemapic
Description:
Systemapic helps growing businesses get their systems under control.

Most teams come to us when things start breaking at scale
too many tools, manual work everywhere, unclear processes, and no real visibility into what’s actually happening.

We help fix that by building simple, reliable operating systems around operations, CRM, and automation that teams can actually use day to day.

Our work usually includes cleaning up how data flows between sales, operations, support, and reporting, setting up the right CRM structure, automating repetitive work, and adding visibility so founders and managers can see what’s working and what’s not.

The goal isn’t “more automation.”
The goal is clarity, consistency, and systems that don’t fall apart as you grow.

Over the years, we’ve delivered 60+ system implementations across different industries, helping teams cut manual work, reduce mistakes, and save $500k+ in operational costs.

What we typically help with

• Designing simple, scalable operating systems
• CRM setup, cleanup, and migrations
• Automating day-to-day operational workflows
• Making data easier to understand with dashboards and reports
• Improving how teams actually use their tools
• Ongoing system improvements as the business grows

We work closely with founders and internal teams and stay hands-on throughout. We don’t just build something and disappear. We help make sure it actually sticks.

If your business has outgrown spreadsheets, patchwork tools, or messy processes, we help you put the right systems in place and keep them running properly.
