Name: Ouse Prevenir
Description:
A Ouse Prevenir é pura iniciativa voltada à promoção de uma cultura de prevenção mais humana, consciente e corajosa.

Inspirada por vivências reais e pelos princípios da Saúde Integral, da Engenharia de Resiliência e da Segurança Psicossocial, nossa atuação busca fortalecer o autocuidado, a saúde mental e a evolução da cultura de SSMA nas organizações.

Produzimos conteúdo, experiências e reflexões que conectam pessoas e empresas ao que realmente importa: cuidar antes que adoeça, ouvir antes que silencie, agir antes que machuque.

 Nosso foco é provocar mudanças com empatia, ciência e escuta ativa.
 Atuamos com foco em lideranças, profissionais de campo, equipes de SSMA e todos que acreditam que prevenir também é amar.

 IMPACTO GERADO ATÉ AQUI
Com uma abordagem acessível, técnica e profundamente humana, já impactamos diretamente mais de 1.000 colaboradores em todo o Brasil (e também fora dele), por meio de palestras, rodas de conversa e workshops realizados em ambientes presenciais e virtuais.

Atuamos junto a lideranças, equipes operacionais e times de SSMA nos seguintes setores:

 Varejo e Distribuição – Fortalecendo o cuidado nas relações e o uso consciente dos EPIs, com foco em emoções, diversidade e a ciência da proteção individual.
 Tecnologia e Telecomunicações – Estimulando o autocuidado e a atenção plena como ferramentas de resiliência em contextos de alta pressão.
 Educação Corporativa – Provocando reflexões profundas sobre saúde mental e liderança com propósito, alcançando líderes de diversas regiões do país.
 Energia e Infraestrutura – Com ênfase na disciplina operacional e na construção de ambientes mais seguros e humanos, integrando autocuidado à prática diária.
 Indústria Alimentícia – Engajando grandes equipes em torno da prevenção ativa, da atitude segura e do compromisso com a vida.

Cada encontro é uma semente plantada.
A colheita? Um novo olhar para a prevenção: mais consciente, mais humano, mais potente.

 Ouse prevenir

Name: Commarec
Description:
Our goal at Commarec is to provide logistics managers and business owners with end-to-end services that ensure smooth and efficient warehouse operations. We don’t just focus on individual processes – we optimize the entire warehouse system, from workforce management and packaging materials to advanced technologies.

Why do we do it?
We believe that stable logistics are the key to successful business scaling. Today, it’s not enough to just “fix problems” – companies need solid foundations that enable growth without inefficiencies, unnecessary costs, or operational bottlenecks. Our mission is to help businesses build these foundations – maximizing performance while keeping costs low.

Our approach
We are more than external consultants; we become part of your team, helping you strategically manage logistics so that it becomes a pillar of growth, not a barrier.

Knowledge sharing as a core mission
Our owner Martin Komarek believes that logistics must continuously evolve, and knowledge should be passed on to future generations. That’s why, at Commarec, we actively invest in education through training, mentoring, and expert articles. Our Commarec Academy helps managers and warehouse teams expand their skills and prepare for future challenges. We regularly share our expertise with the wider public, striving to elevate logistics in Czech companies to a world-class level.

Nuestro enfoque combina tecnologías innovadoras, un profundo conocimiento técnico y la capacidad de ofrecer soluciones personalizadas que optimizan la eficiencia operativa y mejoran la toma de decisiones.

Nuestras Líneas de Negocio:
- Consultoría Especializada: Ayudamos a las empresas a mejorar su productividad mediante técnicas estadísticas multivariantes y visión artificial, adaptándonos a las necesidades específicas de cada cliente sin depender de software comercial.
- Formación a Medida: Capacitamos a los equipos para crear una cultura empresarial orientada a los datos, proporcionando habilidades técnicas necesarias para abordar desafíos en análisis y extracción de valor de los datos.

Diferenciadores Clave:
- Software Propio: Ofrecemos flexibilidad y rapidez en la entrega de soluciones personalizadas.
- Expertos de Renombre Internacional: Nuestro equipo participa en los principales foros del mundo, garantizando soluciones a la vanguardia de la tecnología.

Nuestra Misión es empoderar a nuestros clientes con herramientas avanzadas y conocimientos técnicos que les permitan optimizar procesos, mejorar productividad y formar equipos preparados para liderar en un entorno empresarial competitivo y orientado al dato.

Kensight transforma los datos en decisiones inteligentes y resultados medibles.

Para cualquier consulta, puede ponerse en contacto con nosotros en la dirección de correo electrónico support@kensight.es

Y puede saber más sobre nosotros en www.kensight.es

Name: İstanbul Eurasia Consulting Group
Description:
Consultancy on Crutical Raw Materials, Renewable Energy and Mining
Istanbul is a central point within a vast geography, reaching approximately two billion people within a range of 3 to 5 hours. It serves as a starting point that could provide solutions to the challenges arising from global-scale developments. Currently, we present solutions to the geopolitical issues that national or international companies operating within the European Union and the United States may face in the sectors of environmental protection, renewable energy, and technology production and trade. Turkey's early-stage critical raw material and mineral exploration activities, as well as its high potential in renewable energy production, in themselves offer solutions to our clients' challenges. Additionally, as a result of Turkey's state policies and its bilateral relationships with other nations, North and West African countries, Central Asian countries, and Balkan countries are forming a market for the supply of necessary industrial raw materials and the production and trade of renewable energy. This market is crucial and essential for fulfilling the projections of European countries and the US in the fields of renewable energy, environment, and technology. Meeting the goals of these countries to reduce carbon emissions and become carbon neutral is impossible without critical raw materials. Istanbul and Turkey play a significant role in meeting these demands as an important center. Geologically, Turkey is situated in the middle of the Tethyan Belt, one of the richest belts in the world in terms of critical raw materials and minerals. This is one of the main motivations for us to provide consultancy services based in Istanbul.

Name: HAZMAT Advisor
Description:
Welcome to HAZMAT Advisor! 
Our mission is to provide expert advice and guidance on hazardous materials management to ensure the safety of individuals and communities.
We are proud to offer a wide range of services to meet your hazardous materials needs. Our services include:
1. Hazardous Materials Training: Our team of experts provides comprehensive training on the safe handling and management of hazardous materials.
2. Hazardous Materials Transportation Planning and Packaging/Labeling: We help you plan and execute the safe transportation of hazardous materials, including proper packaging and labeling.
3. Hazardous Waste Management and Emergency Response Planning: We provide expert guidance on the safe management and disposal of hazardous waste, and help you develop emergency response plans.
4. Signs and Posters for Hazardous Materials: We offer a range of signs and posters to help you clearly identify hazardous materials and promote safety in your workplace or community.
As a leading source of information on hazardous materials, we aim to educate and inform the public about the dangers associated with these materials and how to properly handle and dispose of them. Our team of experts has extensive experience in the field and stays up-to-date on the latest regulations and best practices.
Whether you're a first responder, a hazardous waste professional, or simply someone looking to stay informed, we have the resources and knowledge to help you. From articles and videos to live Q&A sessions, we provide a variety of ways for you to learn and engage with us.
Join us on this journey to promote safety and responsibility in the handling of hazardous materials. Don't forget to like and share our page with your friends and colleagues! We look forward to serving you.

Name: OM SERIOS
Description:
Asistentul tău personal în achiziția unei locuințe
Cumpărarea unei locuințe este una dintre cele mai importante decizii financiare din viață. Cu peste 20 de ani de experiență în intermedierea creditelor imobiliare și peste 2.000 de tranzacții încheiate cu succes, OM SERIOS este alături de tine ca asistent personal în acest proces complex.

Atunci când cumperi o locuință prin credit bancar, interacționezi cu multiple părți implicate:
 Banca – care îți oferă finanțarea
 Brokerul de credite – care îți prezintă opțiunile disponibile
 Notarul – care certifică tranzacția
 Agentul imobiliar sau dezvoltatorul – care îți oferă proprietatea
 Asiguratorul – care protejează investiția ta

De cele mai multe ori, aceste servicii sunt fie separate, fie strâns conectate prin colaborări care pot crea conflicte de interese. În acest context, OM SERIOS îți oferă un consultant dedicat, care acționează în interesul tău, te reprezintă și te ghidează pas cu pas, asigurându-se că:
 Ai acces la cele mai bune oferte de finanțare și imobiliare
 Eviți timpi morți și birocrație inutilă
 Beneficiezi de o comunicare clară și eficientă cu toți actorii implicați
 Nu ești influențat de interese ascunse sau colaborări părtinitoare

Noi ne ocupăm de tot procesul, astfel încât tu să te concentrezi pe ceea ce contează cu adevărat: alegerea locuinței perfecte pentru tine și familia ta.

 Contactează-ne acum și hai să facem primul pas spre noua ta locuință!

Name: Jus de Productivité | Entrepreneur : Libère-toi de l'opérationnel

Et si ta boîte pouvait tourner sans toi… même pendant 3 semaines ?
Il fut un temps où, si je n’étais pas là, tout s’arrêtait.
Urgences à gérer, décisions à valider, relances non faites, reporting incomplet… bref, impossible de m’absenter sans que ça coince.

Puis un jour, je suis parti 3 semaines en vacances… sans un seul appel urgent.
La différence ?
J’avais identifié et optimisé les process qui me coûtaient le plus en temps, argent et énergie.

Depuis, j’aide les dirigeants de PME à faire la même chose :
 Audit Express (1h30 à 2h) pour détecter leurs 3 process les plus coûteux
 Plan d’action en 10 jours avec solutions concrètes : simplification, délégation, automatisation, IA
 Implémentation sur mesure avec résultats en moins d’1 mois

Certaines agences se limitent à connecter des outils. D’autres te livrent un rapport et te laissent te débrouiller.
Nous, on va plus loin : on repense les process, on les simplifie, et, si tu veux, on les automatise en s’occupant aussi de l’implémentation.
Résultat : plus de temps, plus de marge, et une entreprise qui tourne sans toi.

 Ce que ça donne concrètement :
+20h/mois libérées pour un cabinet de conseil → focus 100% business
+4 points de marge pour une PME industrielle → sans embaucher
60% d’erreurs critiques en moins dans une agence → plus de stress, plus de contrôle
Des dirigeants qui peuvent s’absenter 2 à 4 semaines… sans que rien ne s’arrête

 30+ PME accompagnées en France et en Suisse
 Objectif : te libérer de l’opérationnel, remonter tes marges et te rendre ton temps

 Prochaine étape : un appel de 30 min pour voir si l’Audit Express Process PME peut te faire gagner +20h/mois dès ce trimestre. (Seulement 5 places/mois)

Description:

Name: RecOps Collective
Description:
RecOps Collective was founded in late 2022 with a two-fold mission and one simple idea: Make Recruiting Operations Accessible to All.

We achieve this by helping companies of all stages and sizes modernize their Recruiting through process improvement, correct tooling, and more. We also provide community and support to the broader TA/RecOps community and are leading voice in the space.

We specialize in the following:  
• Recruiting Philosophy - We'll work with you to establish your Recruiting philosophy and persona as well as your DEIB strategy.
• Tools - We'll help assess your tools to ensure you have a modern Recruiting tech stack that works for your company and create your tech roadmap.
• Enablement - We'll design bespoke trainings and documentation for your internal team and your stakeholders so they know the best ways to partner with recruiting.
• Data - We'll help you define your analytics so that you have insights, not just numbers.  We'll build your dashboards and so much more.

To support the community, we provide the following:
• Resources specific to the everyday scenarios TA/RecOps professionals face
• Content on broader TA/RecOps philosophies
• Community

Name: SPARECARE
Description:
SpareCare offers Technology based Products & Solutions to the Automotive Industry to deliver optimal Investment, Increased Revenue, Enhanced Profitability and Improved levels of Customer Satisfaction.

The Indian automobile Industry will stay buoyant for years to come. Customers expect world class technology, Quality products and continuous introduction of new models. Shortened lifecycle of products will result into adding more Spare Part-lines to thousands of existing ones. Managing ever increasing part lines is challenging and complex though exciting domain to explore. Its management needs expertise to deliver against the expectations.

SpareCare is led by Industry Experts having a collective experience of 100+ person years in delivering excellence in the entire value chain of AfterSales in Automotive Industry. 

Prowess of technology and our domain expertise infused in our platforms ensures that the customers gets:
•	Optimal level of Inventory of each of the part.
•	Blocking Accumulation & Liquidation of SAD (Slow And Dead) Parts
•	Targeted levels of OTIF (on-time in full) availability of Spare Parts to workshop/ customers using Proprietary Tech platform offering solution customized to the need of each of our customer.
•	Smart Inventory Audit (SIA) for Accurate reporting of inventory Quantity and Quality.

Our platform can be customized for use by other business verticals like FMCG & Retail. The innovative solutions that we offer are the result of our investment into cutting edge technologies like Big Data, Analytics & AI/ML.

Name: Enabl3
Description:
We stand for digitisation in the pharmaceutical industry

We at ENABL3, will enable, hand-hold and support YOU to digitise your end-to-end shop-floor related processes – from goods receipt of your raw materials, through all intermediary manufacturing and packaging stages, right up to final shipping. We are specialists for development, design, execution & validation of the electronic batch record for the pharmaceutical industry. Enabl3 is a focused company and concentrates on a very niche segment. In short, we ENABLE pharma manufacturers to have a smooth journey in digitisation.

Enabl3 DOO holding is headquartered in Belgrade, Serbia, with a subsidiary, Enabl3 GmbH in Cologne, Germany and Enabl3 Systems Consulting Private Limited in Pune, India. Enabl3 is an organization with energetic and highly skilled consultants and designers. Our goal is to offer our customers the best possible advice in digitalizing their manufacturing process for them to attain the “smart electronic batch record of the future” - and to accomplish that, we are at their side from the first step, to implementation through to onward connectivity.

Our team has vast experience in the deployment of MES solutions around the globe. We are motivated and thoroughbred MES (Manufacturing Enterprise Systems)/MOM (Manufacturing Operations Management) consultants with niche expertise in the regulated pharmaceutical Industry. We are working with major pharmaceutical giants, providing harmonised global core solutions that are applicable across multiple sites. We also provide special custom-tailored solutions for small single sites. We have successfully deployed within the different types of manufacturing environments, namely, Biologicals, Solid dosage forms, Sterile forms, Packaging and also chemical API production.

Description:
"Новата Енергийна Реалност" е компания, основана от Nick Stefanov, чиято цел е да направи рационализации в енергийното поведение на бизнеса и домакинствата.

Чрез възможностите на информационните технологии се стремя да направя моето познание и прозрения ДОСТЪПНИ до по-широка аудитория потребители на електрическа енергия.

Като се възползваме от разнообразието и достъпността на различни дигитални форми и канали, разяснявам сложният "modus operandi" на електро-енергийната екосистема на обикновен и достъпен език. За да могат Хората да изградят Своята Собствена Енергийна Реалност. 

*modus operandi - е латинска фраза, която приблизително се превежда като –"начин на действие". Това са навиците на индивида да работи или функционира, особено в контекста на бизнес или личното си поведение. Това са неговите оперативни способи, включително използваните помощни средства, участието на посредници, агенти и други обвързващи взаимоотношения, в тяхната пълнота.

Name: MIC - Mejoramiento Integral Consultores
Description:
MIC nace de la disrupción.

Proponemos una nueva forma de implementar procesos de Mejora Continua, con el propósito de acercar este servicio a empresas medianas y pequeñas. Nuestra intención es darles la oportunidad de estandarizar sus procesos, creando un impacto positivo en sus operaciones y los resultados generales de la compañía.

Nuestra metodología es funcional, adaptable y asequible a organizaciones en crecimiento que, por su tamaño y procesos, buscan implementar la Mejora Continua de forma modular y en períodos cortos de tiempo.

Si bien nuestro foco son las empresas en crecimiento, en MIC, tenemos la capacidad y experiencia para atender a grandes empresas de forma integral, analizando sus procesos de principio a fin, a través de consultorías y asesoramiento en Mejora Continua con estándares de clase mundial.

Hemos creado el camino para moldear las mejores prácticas y adaptarlas a empresas pequeñas y startups. Con este logro, apostamos por el desarrollo sostenido y exponencial de estas compañías, dentro y fuera de Colombia.

Somos un equipo actualizado en las tendencias que entiende los negocios de forma dinámica y, de esa misma forma, proponemos soluciones flexibles para cada uno de nuestros clientes.

Por esa razón, nuestras consultorías en Mejora Continua son enfocadas desde diferentes ángulos, según la necesidad real y actual de cada empresa.

Y, con el objetivo de alcanzar resultados visibles y cuantificables en corto plazo, maximizando los beneficios y recursos de la empresa, proponemos un enfoque sistémico sobre el problema principal y la mejor manera de implementar el proceso de Mejora Continua, según su situación actual.

Además, como parte de nuestra propuesta, hemos desarrollado herramientas tecnológicas que ayudan, de forma online, a detectar ineficiencias en los procesos y elevar la productividad dentro de las plantas de producción.

Si deseas mejorar y estandarizar los procesos de tu compañía, Escríbenos!

Name: Qualité
Description:
Qualité é uma palavra em francês que significa "qualidade" em português. É usada para descrever o nível de excelência ou as características de algo em termos de sua classe, padrão ou valor.

A qualidade se refere à medida em que um produto, serviço ou processo atende ou excede as expectativas e requisitos estabelecidos. É a busca pela excelência, consistência e a satisfação do cliente. A gestão da qualidade envolve o controle e a melhoria contínua para garantir que os produtos ou serviços atendam aos padrões desejados, resultando em maior eficiência e satisfação do cliente. 

Portanto, "Qualité" indica que nossa empresa se concentra em oferecer soluções que melhoram a qualidade dos processos em diversas áreas. Isso pode ser especialmente atraente para clientes que procuram melhorar a eficiência, a precisão e a excelência em seus processos empresariais ou operacionais.

Description:
Liberal Economics Worldwide Leadership was founded by the Spanish polymath Francisco Faba in Madrid after a year and a half of leadership trainings by Frankfurt based European Leadership led by the Deusto school Basque-Spanish economist Jorge Zuazola.  In turn, Jorge Zuazola facilitated Francisco´s contact with Lorenzo Bernaldo de Quirós, Spain´s most prominent liberal economist, to ultimately found Liberal Economics Worldwide Leadership.
Economic liberalism is a political and economic philosophy that emphasizes the importance of individual and economic freedom. Milton Friedman and Friedrich Hayek were two influential economists who played major roles in the development of liberal thought and the discipline of economics. Friedman was a leading economist of the twentieth century and a prominent member of the Chicago School of Economics. He was awarded the Nobel Prize in Economics for his work on monetary theory and was known for his defense of laissez-faire capitalism, his opposition to state intervention, and his defense of freedom . Hayek, on the other hand, taught at the University of Chicago from 1950 through 1962 and is considered one of the most influential individuals to shape what is now understood as neoliberalism . He worked principally on political philosophy rather than economics during his time at Chicago, with The Constitution of Liberty (1960) being the end result . Both Friedman and Hayek’s respective concepts of freedom have been among the most influential tools used to promote free-market economics around the world
Economic liberalism is a political and economic ideology that supports a market economy based on individualism and private property in the means of production.

Name: The Caring Company B.V.
Description:
Customer contact in an SMB is fundamentally different from that in large organizations or multinationals.

In an SMB environment, customer contact requires different strategic choices. Budgets and teams are smaller, resources are limited, and managers are expected to do more with less. Leading people, shaping processes, and keeping costs under control all come together in one role.

At The Caring Company, we see many organizations where customer contact evolves based on assumptions rather than expertise. Day-to-day operations take over, leaving little room for strategic direction. The result is familiar: increasing pressure on teams, missed KPIs, and rising costs.

It’s not surprising. Customer contact is still often viewed as a cost center instead of a strategic pillar of the organization. And without a clear foundation, problems tend to repeat themselves.

The Caring Company helps SMBs bring structure, focus, and strategic clarity to customer contact, so it becomes stable, sustainable, and aligned with the organization’s goals.

We do this through our own developed method: the Contact Framework.

The Contact Framework is not a lengthy or expensive consultancy program, because that simply doesn’t fit SMB organizations.
Instead, it’s a practical and strategic program, designed to enable customer contact managers to get customer contact under control, and keep it that way.

Curious to learn more?
Visit https://thecaringcompany.nl/contact-framework/

You can also book an introductory meeting there.

Name: Nautilus Solutions
Description:
Hello, I am Angie Cox, the insightful and virtuoso clinical communicator.  

Have you ever had a moment in life that occurred out of the blue & even though you knew there must be a hidden message in this experience you can’t quite identify the actual impetus?  It took a twenty-year journey, but I have finally labeled the purpose behind my adventure in the Chattahoochee National Forest.  As a young college grad, I was alone & lost for several hours.  In the conifer-covered forest, there was no one to help me.  In fact, several people feel this way about healthcare today.  

If you have ever visited a hospital, you have undoubtedly encountered a complex system linked to an over-burdened workforce and under-represented customer base.  Working inside of healthcare is equally frustrating, with a lack of time to truly interact with patients and their families, leading some to lose sight of why they were drawn to healthcare in the first place.  Seeing the forest for the trees becomes difficult, especially on the inside; thus, bravely pivoting away provides a new perspective and creates the possibility of fixing that which is broken. 

Making this broken system better is our mission.  Building stronger authentic relationships, bringing innovation with integrity into the workplace, and creating a better understanding between those communicating outside and inside are our forte.  We are in the business of bringing compassionate hearts & extraordinary minds together for a greater purpose than initially imagined.

 Adequações operacionais e documentais e muito mais...

Contamos com uma equipe especializada, formada por um Profissional Credenciado em Aeronavegabilidade (PCA) e um consultor com formação em Sistema de Gerenciamento de Segurança Operacional (SMS) pela ICAO, prontos para atender empresas e operadores de todos os portes. Dentre outros colaboradores especializados.

Estamos prontos para apoiar desde operações privadas até táxis aéreos e serviços especializados.

Name: Diversify at work
Description:
Diversify zorgt voor neurodivergente diversiteit en inclusie binnen jouw bedrijf. We zorgen ervoor dat werknemers met ADHD, autisme, hoogsensitiviteit, … . kunnen zijn wie ze zijn. Resultaat? Meer focus en creativiteit op de werkvloer. Een win-win voor jou en je team dus.

Zo gaan we te werk
Jouw bedrijf naar een hoger niveau tillen door in te zetten op de sterktes van diverse teams. Dat is ons doel bij Diversify en we doen dat met trainers en consultants die zelf tot deze groepen behoren. 

Waarom? Omdat diversiteit in denken en voelen namelijk een verrijking voor elk bedrijf is. Zo krijgt elke werknemer de juiste plek binnen je team en is die vrij om zichzelf te zijn. 

Waarvoor je bij ons terecht kan
  Neurodivers communiceren
  Mentale gezondheid 
  Selectieprocedures
  Processen op de werkvloer
  LGBTQ+

Samen maken we het verschil door het te omarmen.

Neem vrijblijvend contact op
  carla@diversifyatwork.be

Name: Soluzione Delega
Description:
Soluzione Delega nasce da un’esigenza reale, condivisa da centinaia di PMI italiane: costruire un’organizzazione solida, capace di operare in autonomia e favorire la crescita sostenibile dell’impresa nel medio-lungo periodo.

Operiamo attraverso un sistema integrato di interventi strutturali che combina:

 Consulenza operativa e strategica, con focus su organizzazione aziendale, delega e performance dei reparti, 
 Strumenti e modelli operativi proprietari, validati su decine di casi studio, 
 Percorsi formativi verticali per imprenditori, manager e team interni, 
 Un software gestionale dedicato al monitoraggio del progresso organizzativo

Grazie a un team multidisciplinare con esperienze in business management, operations, HR, project governance e digital innovation, forniamo interventi ad alta applicabilità, concreti e misurabili, orientati a generare impatto immediato e duraturo.

Ci rivolgiamo a PMI in fase di ristrutturazione, crescita o transizione manageriale che desiderano:

 Strutturare in modo chiaro ruoli, funzioni e flussi operativi, 
 Delegare attività chiave con indicatori di performance precisi, 
 Favorire l’emersione di figure manageriali interne
 Implementare sistemi di controllo che garantiscano continuità ed efficienza

Ogni imprenditore sogna un’azienda capace di funzionare in autonomia, dove processi chiari, persone competenti e procedure operative precise garantiscono efficienza, qualità e crescita costante, ed è proprio per questo che abbiamo fondato Soluzione Delega!

Name: elefante RevOps
Description:
We help ambitious businesses grow - on purpose!

At elefante RevOps, we believe scaling a business shouldn’t feel like chaos.

Too often, growth is reactive - driven by urgency, pieced together with tools, and held up by overworked teams. We help growth-focused operators - founders, GTM leaders, and RevOps pros - build clarity, alignment, and systems that scale.

Our approach is called Revenue Architecture: a structured, scalable way to align your teams, tech, and data around intentional growth. Because real scale doesn’t come from hustle - it comes from precision, process, and systems that work even when you’re not in the room.

Founded by Colten and Garo, elefante RevOps blends global inspiration with deep operational expertise. From Chiang Mai to Rio, their journey shaped a vision rooted in balance, curiosity, and impact.

In less than a year, we became a HubSpot Diamond Solutions Partner, helping companies build smarter, grow sustainably, and scale with confidence.

We don’t just optimize operations - we empower people to lead growth that lasts.

Name: Aspira Brilla Crece México (ABCMéxico)
Description:
ABCMÉXICO - Aspire Bright Climb Mexico

Welcome to ABCMÉXICO, a Certification and Evaluation Center dedicated to accelerating your career growth. Incubated by ICEMéxico and accredited as a Microsoft Certification Center, ABCMÉXICO offers a holistic approach to skill development and professional advancement, specializing in official certifications for workplace skills and Microsoft products.

Certifications for Success with Official Recognition:
ABCMÉXICO is authorized by the National Council for Standardization and Certification of Labor Competencies (CONOCER) and backed by the Ministry of Public Education (SEP). Our certifications in standards such as EC0366, EC0217.1, EC0076, and EC0301 are nationally recognized, enhancing your career prospects. These certifications align with the National System of Competencies, ensuring your skills are valued across various sectors.

Tailored Career Development:
Utilizing the Microsoft Pyxoom assessment, we evaluate your current skills and compare them with the requirements of your target role. This personalized approach helps close competency gaps and prepares you for managerial or executive positions.

Microsoft Certifications to Boost Your Profile:
As a Microsoft Certification Center, we offer in-demand certifications like Microsoft Excel, providing a competitive edge and increasing your chances for higher salaries and leadership roles.

Key Benefits:

	•	Official recognition from SEP and CONOCER
	•	Development of cross-functional and leadership skills
	•	Enhanced career opportunities
	•	Customized training plans

At ABCMÉXICO, we believe in your potential to Aspire, Brighten, and Climb. Start today and elevate your career!

Name: Kohl-SportConsulting
Description:
Mit Kohl-Sport Consulting unterstütze ich Unternehmen in den Bereichen Sportplatzbau und Bau von Sportanlagen. Ich berate und begleite Projekte von der Planung über die Ausführung bis hin zur Abnahme. 

Meine Arbeit umfasst insbesondere die Bereiche Polyurethan-Systeme und EPDM-Granulate, die ich als Werkstoffe im Sportstättenbau erfolgreich positioniere. Dabei verbinde ich technisches Know-how, jahrzehntelange Erfahrung und ein ausgeprägtes Verständnis für die Anforderungen von Projekten.

Ein wichtiger Bestandteil meiner Tätigkeit ist auch meine Arbeit als Sachverständiger und Gutachter. Ich überprüfe Bauprojekte auf Qualität und Konformität, unterstütze bei der Lösung von technischen Herausforderungen und helfe, eventuelle Streitigkeiten durch eine neutrale, fachkundige Bewertung zu klären.

Für Galabau-Betriebe kann ich durch folgende Leistungen einen konkreten Mehrwert bieten:

- Technische Expertise: Fundiertes Wissen über Materialien und deren Anwendung – speziell im Sportstättenbau.

- Beratung und Projektbegleitung: Von der Planung bis zur Abnahme stehe ich als Partner zur Verfügung, um Projekte effizient und erfolgreich umzusetzen.

- Qualitäts- und Kostenoptimierung: Unterstützung bei der Auswahl der richtigen Materialien und Prozesse, um Zeit und Kosten zu sparen, ohne Abstriche bei der Qualität zu machen.

- Netzwerk und Branchenkontakte: Mit einem weitreichenden Netzwerk unterstütze ich Unternehmen dabei, die richtigen Partner und Lieferanten für ihre Projekte zu finden.

- Gutachterliche Tätigkeit: Sicherstellung, dass Bauprojekte den Anforderungen entsprechen, und Unterstützung bei technischen Bewertungen sowie bei der Behebung von Problemen.

Name: ImportDesk
Description:
Servizio chiavi in mano per import in Italia.

ImportDesk è nato per aiutare a risolvere i problemi negli acquisti, ridurre i costi e i rischi, per garantire alle aziende continuità di produzione e disponibilità di materiali e componenti.

ImportDesk è una collaborazione fra gli esperti in internazionalizzazione Patrol International e OBICONS. Il nostro obiettivo è aumentare la marginalità del tuo business, aiutarti a non dipendere da un unico fornitore, farti agire a livello mondiale e sfruttare tutte le risorse disponibili globalmente per la tua azienda.
Abbiamo sviluppato dei pacchetti servizi per aiutare le aziende con ufficio acquisti consolidato a ottimizzare gli acquisti internazionali tramite un’analisi approfondita del commercio mondiale dei prodotti d’interesse fornendo loro i dati indispensabili per valutare i produttori esteri. Il nostro servizio è destinato anche alle PMI italiane che non hanno mai importato, proponendo loro un ufficio acquisti internazionali in outsourcing.

Integra una squadra di professionisti nel tuo organico da subito, o rafforza il tuo reparto acquisti. 
• Troviamo il prodotto o la materia prima che ti servono: cerchiamo i produttori in tutto il mondo, chiediamo preventivi, verifichiamo le questioni doganali per l’import in Italia, calcoliamo i costi;
• Verifichiamo l’affidabilità, negoziamo le condizioni: controlliamo insieme qualità del prodotto e affidabilità del produttore, trattiamo le migliori condizioni contrattuali per te;
• Organizziamo tutti i passaggi: dall'ordine alla consegna: seguiamo il tuo ordine e organizziamo trasporto e import in Italia come se fossimo il tuo reparto d'acquisti interno.

A tua disposizione database mondiali, analisti del commercio globale, buyer, consulenti doganali, esperti in logistica internazionale.
Abbiamo unito la nostra esperienza e il nostro know-how per offrire alle aziende italiane la soluzione per aumentare i ricavi tramite acquisti internazionali e import in Italia.

Andrew Thomson is an internationally recognised Consultant Clinical Embryologist and Scientific Director, best known for his work in IVF clinic design, laboratory optimisation, and quality management. QA consulting services

o Author and manage Deviations, CAPAs, Investigations, Change Controls, Risk Assessments, Product Complaints, service agreements and contracts, and Quality Agreements.
o Manage the development and implementation of e-QMS, such as Veeva Vault QMS, Quality Doc, and LMS modules.

QC consulting services
o Review and approve master and executed QC test methods, forms, validation protocols and reports, and QC data packages.
o Author SOPs, test methods, and develop testing workflow based on FIFO principles.

QI consulting services
o Review current processes, identify gaps and waste, design and implement new efficient processes.

Project Management consulting services
o Develop project timelines and Gantt charts via Microsoft Project and Smartsheet
o Develop project presentations and flowcharts for project teams and senior management teams.

Leadership Training
o Provide leadership and team building working sessions to executives, senior managers, and entry-level managers.

Our custom learning management system has over 150 courses available online and live online to meet your training needs. Name: PowerPro360
Description:
PowerPro360 helps organizations achieve reliability by focusing on your electric power system's two most important factors: equipment and people. Through effective asset management and expert training and education, we deliver the confidence, protection, and preparation you need to maximize system-wide reliability for your electric power system.

• Asset Management: Manage every asset of a power distribution system with clarity, certainty, and confidence. Our asset management program, AssetPro, helps businesses plan, trend, forecast, and prioritize tasks to effectively manage the health of their electrical system maintenance programs and equipment assets. AssetPro is based on ANSI NETA Standards to help you manage thousands of electrical components in your power distribution system.

• Electric Power Training: Train the people who work on the power distribution system to maximize safety and reliability. We provide must-have training with flexible formats and pricing for anyone who manages or maintains electric power systems, substations, or transformers. Our custom learning management system has over 150 courses available online and live online to meet your training needs. Our training advisors will help you set up and track a training plan for your entire corporation. 

• Based in Tallmadge, OH, PowerPro 360 has decades of experience in electric power reliability. Our dedicated staff of reliability professionals and training experts work to bring you solutions for electric power reliability’s greatest challenges. When it comes to your electric power distribution system, we can help you make sense of what you need for your equipment and your people. PowerPro360 is a Good Place Holdings organization and a sister company of SDMyers, Inc.

Description:
Blerdz Unite Media LLC is a Black-led creative agency and cultural media company at the intersection of community, storytelling, and technology. We empower creators, brands, and organizations through social strategy, content production, event marketing, and digital experiences that center Blerd culture.

Our mission is to amplify Black nerd voices, simplify digital strategy, and create spaces where culture and creativity thrive in online or offline.

We specialize in:

Social Media Strategy & Management – Custom plans that drive real engagement and grow aligned audiences.

Brand Identity & Visual Design – Cohesive, culture-rooted branding that connects across platforms.

Video Editing & Content Production – High-quality visuals and storytelling that elevate creators and campaigns.

Web Design & Development – Responsive, accessible websites built to convert and tell your story.

Cybersecurity Advisory – On-demand or subscription-based protection for your brand’s digital assets.

Discord & Community Services – Moderation, infrastructure, and engagement strategies for digital communities.

We proudly collaborate with the Blerdz Unite Stream Team, a network of Blerd creators pushing culture forward through content, collabs, and gaming. Together, we also provide convention coverage to spotlight creators at the heart of the movement.

As part of our larger mission, we produce the Block Party, a premium virtual convention connecting fans and creators in anime, gaming, cosplay, and more.

Through our nonprofit initiatives, we also lead the BU Opportunity Grant . A direct investment into rising Blerd creators, helping them access conventions, equipment, and growth opportunities.

Whether you’re a brand, organization, or creator  we’re here to help you grow. All while staying rooted in culture and community no matter what. 


Culture. Community. Power.

Description:
EmailKarma is a consulting firm that specializes in email delivery, privacy, and authentication. We have been in operation since 2007, helping organizations of all sizes to improve their email practices and comply with relevant laws and regulations.

In addition to our consulting services, we are also committed to educating the broader email community about email marketing best practices. We regularly produce educational content, including articles, blog posts, and webinars, to help organizations understand the latest developments in the email industry.

One area where we have a particular focus is Canada's Anti-Spam Law (CASL) and its US counterpart, CAN-SPAM. We provide a range of resources and services to help organizations understand and comply with these laws, including consulting services and educational materials.

At EmailKarma, our goal is to help organizations of all sizes improve their email practices and maximize the effectiveness of their email marketing efforts. Whether you're just starting out with email or are looking to take your email program to the next level, we can help. 

Contact us today to learn more about how we can assist with your email needs.

Sustainability Focus: We integrate sustainable practices into our recommendations, helping you achieve environmental goals while optimizing operations.

Facility Management Strategy & Planning: We help you develop a comprehensive FM plan, ensuring your facility is managed efficiently and effectively throughout its lifecycle.
Operational Optimization: We identify areas for improvement in your current operations, leading to cost savings and increased efficiency.

Name: EmailKarma
Description:
EmailKarma is a consulting firm that specializes in email delivery, privacy, and authentication. We have been in operation since 2007, helping organizations of all sizes to improve their email practices and comply with relevant laws and regulations.

Our team of experts has extensive experience in a range of areas related to email, including SPF, DKIM, DMARC, and BIMI. We provide consulting services to help organizations understand and implement these technologies, as well as other best practices for email marketing.

In addition to our consulting services, we are also committed to educating the broader email community about email marketing best practices. We regularly produce educational content, including articles, blog posts, and webinars, to help organizations understand the latest developments in the email industry.

One area where we have a particular focus is Canada's Anti-Spam Law (CASL) and its US counterpart, CAN-SPAM. We provide a range of resources and services to help organizations understand and comply with these laws, including consulting services and educational materials.

At EmailKarma, our goal is to help organizations of all sizes improve their email practices and maximize the effectiveness of their email marketing efforts. Whether you're just starting out with email or are looking to take your email program to the next level, we can help. 

Contact us today to learn more about how we can assist with your email needs.

Name: UrgentOps
Description:
UrgentOps provides full-spectrum operations support for charter schools. Since 2017, we’ve helped schools stabilize during transitions, meet complex compliance deadlines, and build sustainable systems that free leaders to focus on students.

We understand the realities of school operations — tight budgets, limited bandwidth, and the constant pressure to deliver results. Our team of seasoned professionals steps in wherever you need us most.

Fractional & Interim Operations Leadership
When a key team member leaves or your school is growing faster than your systems, we provide fractional or interim Directors of Operations to ensure continuity and stability while strengthening core processes.

Compliance Reporting Services
We manage the full cycle of state and authorizer reporting — including BEDS, Level 0 and 2, staff certification, student data, and required submissions — ensuring accuracy, timeliness, and peace of mind.

Staffing & Recruitment Support
We help schools find and retain the right people. From job postings and screening to onboarding and certification tracking, we simplify hiring and ensure compliance at every step.

Coaching & Culture Work
We coach operations leaders to grow from doers to thought partners—building confidence, strategic thinking, and strong communication with executive leadership. We also support schools in rebuilding trust, clarity, and alignment across teams after periods of change.

Projects & Training
From safety manuals to departmental redesigns, we deliver customized projects and practical trainings that strengthen systems and build team capacity.

Whether your school needs urgent stabilization, expert compliance management, or long-term operational partnership, UrgentOps delivers reliable, experienced support built specifically for the charter school environment.

Name: RGN IMPACT
Description:
A Certified B Corporation driven by a purpose from Sustainable to Regenerative Businesses 

FROM ME TO WE: from Sustainable to Regenerative

WE ARE RGN!!

WE are working on radical Impact Business Models in our economy, in our society.

WE want to help regenerate ecosystems, not only environmental but also economic and social.

WE believe that things can be done differently. 

WE are working to transform industries, to decarbonize them, and focus on people & planet doing business.

WE help business leaders make the hard transition to impact business models with a focus on people, society, and the environment.

WE love to train management teams in sustainability fields

We are dedicated to impact investment issues as we are part of the best impact investment funds in Spain, Latam and Europe.

WE were born with a #BCorp soul. Our founder, Leo Gutson has been working for +10 years (since 2013) as an ambassador for Sistema B (B Corp in Latin America).
Also, Leo is one of the co-leaders behind the B Corp movement in Spain since 2015, now B Lab Spain Foundation.
He has advised more than 100 companies in the B Corp certification and re-certification process.
----------------------------------------------
From ME to WE: From Negative, to NetZero to Regenerative (NetPositive)

OUR FORMULA:

RNG = Strategic Impact Consulting x Training x Impact Investment (looking for Impact Unicorns*)

* Impact Unicorns:

+1.000 millions valuation (Economic)
+1.000 people impacted  (Social)
+ 1.000 MtCO2e avoided  (Environment)

Name: AMV Licitações
Description:
Nossa missão é fornecer soluções especializadas para que sua empresa aproveite ao máximo as oportunidades no mercado de licitações, expandindo suas possibilidades de negócios.

Com mais de 16 anos de atuação e uma experiência consolidada tanto no setor governamental, como pregoeiros, quanto do lado empresarial, contamos com uma equipe experiente e dedicada. Já atendemos mais de 50 clientes satisfeitos em diversos estados do Brasil, acumulando resultados sólidos e estratégias eficientes.

Como Atuamos:
Nossa equipe de consultores possui profundo conhecimento em todas as etapas do processo de licitação, desde a identificação das melhores oportunidades para o seu setor até a preparação e revisão de propostas. Estamos prontos para auxiliar na documentação necessária, incluindo certidões de habilitação e cadastramento no SICAF, além de revisar propostas existentes para garantir precisão e alinhamento com os requisitos específicos de cada licitação.

Oferecemos também programas de treinamento personalizados para capacitar a sua equipe, aprimorando suas habilidades e preparando-a para uma atuação competitiva. Com orientações estratégicas, ajudamos sua empresa a se posicionar de forma destacada, valorizando seus pontos fortes e aumentando suas chances de sucesso no ambiente das licitações.

Nosso objetivo é ser o parceiro confiável que ajuda sua empresa a alcançar novos patamares no mercado de licitações.

Name: BNI KOI+
Description:
Desde 2014 BNI PLUS ALAQUÀS funciona como grupo de networking generando negocio entre sus miembros a través del marketing por referencias del método BNI. 
Los miembros de nuestro grupo nos ayudamos a facturar más cada semana gracias a las oportunidades de negocio que compartimos. Desde que empezamos, hemos facturado más de 11MM € gracias a las referencias de otros compañeros. 
El pilar básico de nuestra forma de trabajar es GIVERS GAIN: los que aporten negocio a los compañeros, recibirán negocio. Todo ello basado en relaciones de confianza profesional entre los miembros del grupo y referencias de negocio de calidad.
Únicamente puede haber un miembro por cada actividad representada en el grupo. De esta forma se evitan los conflictos y se potencian las sinergias.
El marketing por referencias, tal y como lo trabajamos, permite acceder a una red global de contactos que aumentan, sin ninguna duda, la calidad y la cantidad de nuestra facturación.
El grupo está en constante crecimiento y estamos ampliando las actividades que tenemos representadas. Si estás interesado en conocer esta forma de hacer negocios, no dudes en ponerte en contacto con nosotros y asistir a una de nuestras reuniones.
Nos reunimos todos los jueves por la mañana en la Asociación Comarcal de Empresarios de Alaquàs:
https://goo.gl/maps/cMNca5SV7dCdzGGb7

Nuestro nombre responde a la forma en que entendemos el análisis de la realidad social: creemos en la polimatía (la sabiduría que abarca conocimientos diversos) porque los problemas sociales son complejos, multidimensionales, resultado de la combinación de múltiples factores de diversa naturaleza que interactúan entre sí. Unsere Mission ist klar: Wir bieten maßgeschneiderte Lösungen für Unternehmen, öffentliche Einrichtungen und Privatkunden – von professionellen Sicherheitskonzepten über Gebäudedienstleistungen bis hin zu technischer Überwachung und Logistiklösungen.

Als anerkannter Ausbildungsbetrieb fördern wir aktiv Nachwuchstalente. Derzeit bilden wir über 50 Auszubildende in verschiedenen Bereichen aus – darunter Fachkraft für Schutz & Sicherheit, Servicekraft für Schutz & Sicherheit und Kaufmann/-frau für Büromanagement. Unsere hohe Ausbildungsqualität zeigt sich in herausragenden Prüfungsergebnissen: Jährlich werden einige unserer Azubis für ihre Leistungen ausgezeichnet, und sogar der beste deutsche Prüfungsteilnehmer zur Fachkraft für Schutz & Sicherheit kam aus unseren Reihen und wurde von der IHK Stuttgart mit einem Stern geehrt.

Dank unserer langjährigen Erfahrung, modernster Technologie und eines engagierten Teams sorgen wir für Sicherheit, Effizienz und nachhaltige Lösungen. Mit einem starken Netzwerk und innovativen Ansätzen begleiten wir unsere Kunden in eine sichere und erfolgreiche Zukunft.

WSD Holding – Ihr Partner für ganzheitliche Lösungen.

Name: NAAV DIGITAL
Description:
Consultoria especializada em Otimização de Processos Operacionais.

Etapas do processo de Consultoria:

- Identificação do Desafio
Destacamos o desafio intrínseco à gestão de processos empresariais, visando aprimorar a eficiência operacional e, consequentemente, a competitividade de organizações em cenários complexos.

- Nossa Abordagem
Adotamos uma metodologia embasada em análise de processos e engenharia de processos, aplicando rigoroso mapeamento e análise de fluxos, identificando gargalos e ineficiências, bem como otimizando fluxos de trabalho.

- Soluções Sob Medida
Desenvolvemos soluções customizadas, considerando as particularidades de cada organização, incorporando melhores práticas do setor e aderindo a padrões internacionais de gestão de processos.

- Implementação Estratégica
Além das recomendações, oferecemos uma estratégia de implementação que engloba alocação de recursos, atribuição de responsabilidades e cronogramas rigorosos para garantir a execução eficaz.

- Acompanhamento e Medição
Utilizamos indicadores-chave de desempenho (KPIs) para medir o progresso e avaliar o impacto das mudanças, assegurando que os benefícios sejam sustentáveis ao longo do tempo.

- Retorno Sobre o Investimento (ROI)
Comprometidos com a mensuração do ROI, calculamos e monitoramos constantemente o retorno sobre o investimento, proporcionando clareza sobre os benefícios tangíveis.

- Conclusão e Próximos Passos
Nossa consultoria visa aumentar a eficiência, reduzir custos e otimizar a lucratividade. Estamos prontos para discutir os próximos passos em nossa parceria e adaptar nossa expertise às metas específicas da sua organização.

Nossas Soluções:

- Automação Industrial
- Estudo de Layout
- Estruturação Organizacional
- Gestão de Estoque
- Mapeamento e Otimização de Processo
- Pesquisa de Clima Organizacional

Name: GSC Geophysical Consulting
Description:
GSC Geophysical Consulting is an outstanding company founded in 2007 for soil investigation services including geophysical, geological and geotechnical studies with two main offices in Abu Dhabi (UAE) and Cairo (Egypt). 

*Geoscience has a professional staff with extensive experience for more than 20 years, in particular in the near surface geophysical applications for engineering, environmental, hydrogeological and archaeological purposes. 

*We offer local and international geophysical contracting and consulting services for all types of site investigation on land and in marine. In addition to our consultancy services, we provide professional geophysical work for geotechnical site investigations with totally unbiased and independent advice about the usefulness and benefits of geophysical ground investigation for the site of concern. Our experts have the capabilities to provide high quality data and superior applicable results that best suit the client needs, designs and specifications. 

*Our approach to data analysis includes the correlation of geophysical results with other geological, environmental and geotechnical information, where appropriate, to produce a holistic and thorough interpretation.  

*Our professionals are experienced in the practical application and integration of geophysical techniques within the environmental, engineering, groundwater resources and mineral exploration sectors. 

*We have been dedicated to the provision of services for clients in remote locations through substantial resources of skills, expertise and administrative support, which together provide a comprehensive optimized package of services and solutions to achieve our client’s objectives and plans. We are committed to safety and prosperity of our employees, clients, community and environment.

Description:
Перелік послуг аутсорсингу:

Інвентаризація
Наша команда швидко і якісно проведе точний перерахунок ваших складських запасів спільно з вашим персоналом або тільки своїми силами.

Стікерування
Процес нанесення спеціальних стікерів на продукцію, щоб позначити її особливі властивості або просто виділити її серед товарного ряду.

Вантажні роботи
Наші найкращі працівники виконують підняття різноманітних вантажів з метою їх завантаження чи розвантаження. Роботи виконуються вручну або за допомогою спеціалізованої техніки (кар, рокла, електророкла).

Стрейч-пакування
Запаковування вантажів за допомогою стрейч-плівки. На складах застосовується або ручне стрейчування, або ж автоматичне (із застосуванням спеціальної техніки).

Палетування
Це вид складської переробки вантажу, яка полягає у формуванні товарної партії перед її подальшим відправленням. Наші співробітники разом з піддоном упаковують вантаж в плівку і створюють вантажні одиниці, готові до транспортування.

Аудит персоналу
Цей вид послуги дасть вам впевненість в тому, що ваші витрати на власний складський персонал та виробничий процесс завжди знаходяться на оптимальному рівні.

Копакінг
Укомплектування двох і більше товарів в загальну упаковку для реалізації їх одним пакетом. Дуал-пакінг - різновид копакінга, при якому в одну упаковку формуються два товари.

Комплектування
Співробітники здійснюють збірку товарів за списком (за допомогою накладної або сканеру) для формування вантажної одиниці на палетах.

We do three things: 
1. advocate, inform and educate at all levels for access and Universal Design, we
2. provide access consulting; auditing and advising on environments for operators and destinations, and we
3. provide meaningful marketing and communications for travel experiences so people can plan, visit and share their experiences.

We want people with access needs to travel better and operators and government to recognise this important group.

Name: Grip op projecten
Description:
Grip op projecten: de partner voor projectorganisaties in Oost-Nederland.

Groei je hard als organisatie en wil je groeiperikelen voorkomen of oplossen? Wil jij je projecten met meer plezier en zonder zorgen efficiënt uitvoeren? Wil je exact weten hoe je projecten er voor staan en heb je behoefte aan gereedschappen? Ben je in het vak van project management gerold en kun je wel wat coaching gebruiken? Projectmatig werken hoe doe je dat? Grip op projecten kan helpen bij al deze vraagstukken! 

Grip op projecten is een handelsnaam van Time projecten, een bedrijf van Sander Tieltjes, specialist in projectmanagement, projectorganisaties en projectmatig werken. Met Grip op projecten help ik midden- en kleinbedrijven (MKB) om hun projecten succesvol te realiseren door middel van trainingen, van gereedschappen en advies op maat.

Projectmatig werken is mijn passie. Ik heb ruime ervaring als project engineer, projectmanager en teamleider van een afdeling projectmanagement. Ik weet hoe je projecten effectief en efficiënt kunt plannen, beheersen en afronden. Ik deel graag mijn kennis en enthousiasme met anderen. Kennisoverdracht en werkplezier zijn dan ook de kernwaarden van Grip op projecten. Daarnaast vind ik het ook belangrijk dat werk en privé,  vaardigheden en uitdagingen in balans zijn, en dat je begrip en waardering hebt voor de mensen waar je mee samen werkt.

Er zijn veel verschillende methoden en standaarden voor projectmanagement en projectmatig werken, zoals PMI (PMBOK), PRINCE2, IPMA en ISO. Maar welke methoden passen het beste bij jouw bedrijf en jouw projecten? Grip op projecten helpt je om de juiste keuze te maken, door:

- Advies te geven dat aansluit bij jouw situatie en doelen.
- Gereedschappen te ontwikkelen die passen bij jouw kennis, competenties en informatie.
- Trainingen te verzorgen die afgestemd zijn op jouw behoeften.

Wil je meer grip krijgen op je projecten? Neem dan contact op met Grip op projecten! Ik help je graag verder.

Name: VerbeterBazen
Description:
Wij helpen mkb-bedrijven beter presteren door gedrag, processen en samenwerking blijvend te verbeteren.

Het effect? Minder verspilling, meer flow, betrokken teams en hogere financiële resultaten. Een organisatie waar medewerkers plezier hebben in hun werk, ondersteund en gehoord worden in hun ideeën. Dagelijkse verbeteringen maken het werk eenvoudiger en leuker, wat leidt tot groei. Dit zorgt voor hogere kwaliteit, snellere levertijden, betere productiviteit en een positieve cultuur.

 Herken je dit?
Groeit de frustratie doordat medewerkers weinig ruimte krijgen voor initiatief en hun ideeën niet gehoord worden. Het blokkeert dagelijkse verbeteringen, wat leidt tot inefficiënties en lagere productiviteit. Dit resulteert in ontevreden medewerkers, afhakende klanten en een negatieve cultuur.

 Dan is het tijd voor VerbeterBazen. Plan een kennismaking in en we denken met je mee. Want wij staan voor échte resultaten, geen blabla en dik rapport in de la. Het draait bij ons om actie en impact, concrete verbeteringen die het verschil maken. 

Of ben jij een bedrijfsverbeteraar en zie je razendsnel waar er kansen en verbeteringen liggen bij bedrijven? Plan een kennismaking in en word een VerbeterBaas! (Een club voor veranderaars en gelijkgestemden waar we elkaar inspireren en uitdagen).

Name: JVN Solutions
Description:
About the Owner & Principal

Jess is a community builder, art advocate, and management and operations professional based in Lawrence, MA. She has spent the last decade exploring ways in which underserved communities can leverage resources to reach new levels and take back space on the map. Her interests are focused on the development of the individual with the aim to better align them with their organization’s mission, creating a mutually fulfilling work experience. She also supports local organizations with grant development, program and project management.

Jess is the former Director of the Lawrence Public Library where she focused on re-envisioning the Library to be a community hub for the arts, culture, and life-long learning. She currently serves on the Board of Directors at MASSCreative and is the former Board President at Elevated Thought Inc. 

Jess recently founded JVN Solutions, a local consultancy committed to supporting and strengthening area nonprofits, foundations, and small businesses. She graduated from Northeastern University with a Bachelors in Biology, and holds an M.Ed in Community Engagement from Merrimack College and Masters in Library Science from Simmons University. She has earned certificates in nonprofit management and leadership from the Institute for Nonprofit Practice and LEADS, an executive leadership program presented by the Lawrence Partnership in partnership with Harvard Business School. 

Jess enjoys traveling, hiking, dining, and writing in community with the Common Sage, a community writing group she leads at a downtown coffee shop in Lawrence.

Want to partner? Email Jess@JVNSolutions.com.

Name: Set. To Growth!
Description:
Set to Growth helps businesses achieve AI-enabled operational growth by turning scattered knowledge into clarity, speed, and capacity.

Many growing organisations don’t have a technology problem — they have a capacity problem.

Information is scattered across tools and people, processes evolve organically, and teams spend too much time chasing answers instead of delivering value. As a result, decisions slow down, execution becomes fragmented, and growth often feels like it requires hiring more people before the business is ready.

Set to Growth works with leadership teams to redesign their operating model — starting with business direction, then aligning people, processes, systems, and technology underneath it.

A core part of this work is building a single source of truth for the organisation: a knowledge and decision backbone that humans and AI can actually use. From there, processes are clarified, handoffs are simplified, and AI is introduced deliberately to remove friction — not to replace people.

We believe:

Speed comes from clarity and accessibility

Capacity should be expanded before headcount

AI is a servant leader to human intelligence

Better operations should increase human impact, not reduce it

The outcome is an organisation that can:

Make decisions faster

Execute with less friction

Free up time for high-value work

Serve more customers and innovate — without burning out teams

Set to Growth works best with leaders who want practical, adoptable change, not shiny-object AI.

If you’re exploring how to grow through stronger operations — with AI as an enabler, not the centrepiece — let's have a chat.

A Axioma Dados nasceu com o propósito de conectar inteligência, performance e confiabilidade. Atuamos em duas frentes que se complementam e fortalecem qualquer operação moderna: Dados e Infraestrutura.

No pilar de Dados, transformamos informações em valor estratégico. Desenvolvemos dashboards inteligentes, modelos analíticos e automação de processos, sempre com foco em gerar insights que impulsionam resultados reais. Trabalhamos com ferramentas modernas de BI, integração de dados e visualizações que simplificam a tomada de decisão.

No pilar de Infraestrutura, cuidamos da base que sustenta tudo. Criamos ambientes estáveis, seguros e escaláveis, garantindo que a tecnologia trabalhe a favor do negócio, com alta disponibilidade e performance. Da implementação à manutenção, oferecemos soluções que unem eficiência, segurança e inovação.

Nosso diferencial está também nas pessoas. Contamos com profissionais experientes, com sólida bagagem em setores logísticos e administrativos, que compreendem profundamente os desafios operacionais das empresas. Essa vivência prática nos permite desenvolver soluções que unem tecnologia e realidade de negócio, entregando resultados tangíveis e estratégicos.

Acreditamos que dados e infraestrutura são os dois lados da mesma moeda — um depende do outro para que as empresas possam crescer de forma sólida, inteligente e sustentável.

Na Axioma Dados, cada projeto é tratado como único. Trabalhamos próximos de nossos clientes, entendendo suas dores e construindo soluções personalizadas que entregam resultados consistentes e mensuráveis.

 Missão: Capacitar empresas a tomarem decisões mais inteligentes por meio de dados e tecnologia.

Name: Practisafe B.V.
Description:
Onze missie is het beschermen van de mens als belangrijkste factor in de bedrijfsvoering, door het creëren van een veilige werkomgeving. Een veilige werkomgeving draagt ook bij aan de productiviteit, efficiëntie en duurzaamheid van het bedrijfsproces.

We ontzorgen door samen met de klant praktisch en doelgericht invulling te geven aan arbeidsveiligheid. Door toepassing van toegankelijke middelen leiden we onze klant naar duurzame arbozorg, die in balans is met het bedrijfsresultaat. Wij onderscheiden ons door het geven van kwaliteitsadvies op het gebied van veiligheid: op maat en praktisch toepasbaar.

Expertise: expert in veiligheid word je door een combinatie van kennis en praktijkervaring. Practisafe brengt beide mee.

Veiligheid vraagt maatwerk: voor werkelijke veiligheid moet je alle essentiele factoren meewegen, juist ook die factoren die bij uw bedrijf net even anders zijn dan bij concurrenten. Practisafe werkt dan ook NIET met standaardproducten maar gaat WEL uit van maatwerk.

Toepasbaarheid: een aanbeveling waarvan je niet weet hoe je ermee aan de slag kan, heeft nul waarde. Arbeidsveiligheid verbeterd pas als je ermee aan de slag kunt. Practisafe heeft daarom in alle dienstverlening de focus op praktische toepasbaarheid.

Impact: papier maakt uw bedrijf niet veiliger; maatregelen nemen wel. Bij Practisafe gaan wij niet alleen voor het rapport/analyse i.v.m. aantoonbaarheid maar wij gaan ook altijd voor risico reductie!

A consultoria é fundamentada em conhecimento sólido e melhores práticas de mercado, garantindo resultados tangíveis e mensuráveis em diversas áreas:

GESTÃO DE PESSOAS E LIDERANÇA: Reconhecendo o valor do capital humano, a GV5 Consultoria foca no aprimoramento do desempenho, motivação e engajamento dos colaboradores. Além disso, capacita líderes para liderarem equipes com eficiência.

ESTRATÉGIA DE NEGÓCIOS E RESULTADOS: O sucesso nos negócios é consequência de uma estratégia bem definida e execução consistente. A consultoria auxilia na criação de uma visão estratégica sólida e garante que essa visão se traduza em ações concretas com resultados mensuráveis.

ESTRATÉGIA FINANCEIRA E SUSTENTABILIDADE: A saúde financeira é vital para a sobrevivência e crescimento de uma empresa a longo prazo. Consultores especializados otimizam finanças, identificam oportunidades de economia e estabelecem estratégias financeiras sólidas.

CLIENTE NO CENTRO DO NEGÓCIO: Colocar o cliente no centro das operações é uma abordagem essencial. A GV5 Consultoria ajuda empresas a entender as necessidades dos clientes, melhorar o atendimento e criar estratégias para fomentar a fidelização.

SUCESSÃO E GOVERNANÇA: Em empresas familiares, a transição de liderança pode ser desafiadora. A consultoria oferece serviços de preparação de herdeiros e estabelecimento de conselhos administrativos para garantir uma transição tranquila e bem-sucedida.

DIAGNÓSTICO COMERCIAL E FINANCEIRO: Compreender o estado atual da empresa é fundamental para tomar decisões informadas. A GV5 realiza diagnósticos abrangentes para identificar oportunidades de melhoria e desenvolver planos de ação eficazes.

Name: Call It RevOps
Description:
Call It RevOps isn’t your typical B2B podcast. We don’t talk in buzzwords. We don’t recycle frameworks. And we sure as hell don’t pretend that buying more software will fix your broken go-to-market motion.

This is where real RevOps conversations happen. Raw, unfiltered, and sometimes uncomfortable. Hosted by Akande Davis with Raja Walia driving the blunt commentary, each episode dives into what’s actually happening in revenue operations, marketing ops, and sales strategy. We cover the disconnect between tech and execution, why attribution models fall apart, how ABM platforms get more credit than they deserve, and why MQLs are just glorified engagement scores.

If you’ve ever sat in a meeting wondering why you’re doing something that doesn’t drive impact, or if you’ve been told to “just trust the process” while watching it fail, this is your show.

Whether you're a RevOps leader, a skeptical marketer, or someone just trying to clean up the mess between sales and marketing, Call It RevOps will say what you’re thinking. And then we’ll talk about how to fix it.

New episodes drop weekly. No fluff. Just the hard conversations GTM teams actually need.

Integrated Water Management Inc. (IWMI) is a boutique company based in San Pedro, Laguna offering nationwide expertise in Hydrogeology, Dewatering, Groundwater Exploration, Geotechnics, and Well Drilling.

IWMI applies scientific and engineering principles to conduct technical reviews and support services to the
Mining, Construction, and Energy sectors. IWMI aims to promote integrated water resource management (IWRM) to protect the quantity and quality of the Philippines' water resources.

Our Services
• Hydrogeological, geotechnical, and environmental studies for mine and construction dewatering,
groundwater exploration and abstraction, and environmental compliance and permitting
• Short-term and long-term hydrogeological monitoring systems
• Well drilling and installation of production and monitoring bores
• Pumping tests, packer tests, and slug tests for aquifer characterization and analysis
• Geophysical survey for groundwater exploration and geotechnical investigation
• Geological and hydrological mapping and GIS
• Groundwater monitoring planning, implementation, and review
• Database management
• Training and development

As an agency, we handle your tech stack set up, platform migration, SOP creation, and team training to ensure your business has the right operational setup. That is, we make sure your business is supported by the right people and the right processes.

This could mean restructuring, offshoring, or simply changing the way your team runs meetings. It’s the real human people stuff.

Flora Street Consulting is neurodivergent owned and run. We pride ourselves on developing operating systems that are inclusive and accessible to all. 3. Operations Optimization: The splash zone is the worst place for a submersible or ROV; We develop safe, efficient launch and recovery procedures specific to your vessel.

6. Equipment Advice and Technology Integration:

Tra i servizi che IMPACT offre alle imprese e alle istituzione ci sono studi e ricerche sulla storia delle imprese e sulla storia dello sviluppo industriale del territori; consulenza e formazione nel campo dell'Heritage Marketing e del Corporate Storytelling; la progettazione e la realizzazione di Musei d'Impresa e di Musei di Distretto sia fisici che digitali; la creazione, l'organizzazione e la gestione e la digitalizzazione degli archivi storici delle imprese e di archivi economici territoriali; la realizzazione di filmati, documentari e servizi audiovideo sulla storia delle imprese e dei loro protagonisti; l'organizzazione di attività di turismo industriale con progettazione di itinerari e organizzazione di visite sia alle imprese storiche del territorio che agli stabilimenti attivi. I punti di forza di IMPACT sul piano dell'innovazione e dell'originalità dipendono dal fatto che molti dei nostri servizi sono dei modi molto avanzati e molto innovativi di promuovere la storia e la cultura delle imprese. D'altra parte l'esperienza internazionale dei nostri professionisti ci consente di intercettare e di cogliere tutto quello di più avanzato che viene proposto nel resto del mondo e quindi di proporre alle imprese e alle istituzioni italiane servizi all'avanguardia nei loro settori.

Name: Genesis Partners
Description:
Genesis est une société qui aide les entreprises B2B à structurer leur croissance.

Aujourd’hui, la plupart des entreprises savent vendre : elles connaissent leur marché, leurs clients, et leurs métiers.
Mais ce qu’elles ne savent pas toujours, c’est d’où vient leur performance ni comment la reproduire.

C’est là qu’on intervient.

Notre rôle, ce n’est pas de dire quoi vendre ou comment le vendre.
C’est de mettre en place le système qui fait fonctionner tout cela ensemble : les outils, les données, les process et les méthodes, pour que chaque action contribue à la performance globale.

Notre champ d’action se concentre sur le parcours de croissance, c'est-à-dire de l’acquisition client jusqu’à la génération de revenus.

On structure notre travail en trois grandes étapes :
Construire les bases : poser les fondations du système, les outils, les process et la donnée.
Faire évoluer ces bases : les améliorer en continu grâce aux retours du terrain et à la mesure des résultats.
Industrialiser le système : le rendre autonome, prévisible et scalable.

On n’est pas une agence marketing.
On n’est pas un cabinet de conseil.

On est un partenaire de croissance, celui qui construit les fondations techniques, méthodologiques et analytiques sur lesquelles les entreprises peuvent s’appuyer pour croître avec confiance.

En résumé :
Vous créez la valeur. Nous, on construits le système qui la rend scalable.

Name: HSE Pro Sure Consulting
Description:
HSE PRO SURE Consulting is a specialised Health, Safety, and Environmental consultancy dedicated to helping organisations achieve stronger safety performance, legal compliance, and international certification standards. With a focus on ISO Management Systems and workplace HSE implementation, we support companies in building a safer, efficient, and compliant work environment through practical, customised, and results-driven solutions.

We provide end-to-end support for ISO 45001, ISO 14001, and ISO 9001, including system development, gap assessments, documentation, SOP creation, internal audits, and corrective action planning. Our approach is tailored to the organisation’s needs, ensuring that every process aligns with operational realities and regulatory expectations. Whether a company is preparing for certification or maintaining an existing system, we help strengthen the overall management structure to meet global standards.

Beyond ISO systems, we offer comprehensive workplace safety implementation services such as Hazard Identification & Risk Assessment (HIRA), Permit-to-Work systems, emergency preparedness planning, contractor safety management, and specialised audits including fire, electrical, ergonomics, and compliance inspections. Our goal is to identify gaps early, reduce risks, and help organisations adopt proactive safety practices.

Training and competency development form another core part of our services. We deliver engaging safety induction programs, toolbox talks, awareness sessions, and industry-specific HSE trainings designed to enhance workforce understanding and improve safe behaviour. With strong expertise in NEBOSH-based content and practical field experience, we ensure that training leads to measurable improvements on the ground.

At HSE PRO SURE Compliance Solutions, we believe in building long-term partnerships. Our mission is to provide trustworthy guidance, practical solutions, and continuous support that enables organisations

Name: JUKATEC BV
Description:
Als Enterprise Architect sturen we bedrijven naar verbetering vanuit een integrale kijk.  

Met deze duidelijke missie voor ogen gaan we als een partner aan de slag binnen organisaties. 

We houden steeds onze focus op essentiële waarden die binnen ons DNA passen : 
•	Mensen zijn het echte kapitaal van een organisatie!
•	Focus op het integrale pakket als partner!
•	Mensen oprecht fier maken om deel te zijn van het verhaal en succes!
•	Organisaties waar een familiale sfeer kans heeft!

JUKATEC bestaat uit 3 units van waaruit we op maat van de noden van het project de nodige bouwstenen kunnen samenleggen tot de nodige architectuur. 

•	JUKAdream waar we changetrajecten opzetten en begeleiden. Dit van cultuurwijzigingen naar opzetten van strategieën tot verbeterprojecten. 

•	JUKAdemy waar we opleidingen aanbieden rond changetrajecten, leiderschapstrainingen, teamwork, KPI, OEE, ... Hier willen we de mensen uit de organisaties meenemen in de methodes die we zelf toepassen om zo snel mogelijk zelf zaken concreet te kunnen toepassen. 

•	JUKAtechnic waar we technische expertise aanbieden voor bijvoorbeeld het uitwerken van projecten zoals uitbreidingen, procescontrol, TPM, ... 

We werken steeds vanuit een integrale kijk waar we naast de technische kant van het verhaal even sterk focussen op de menselijke kant. Zij moeten tenslotte met de processen, ... werken om de doelen van de organisatie te behalen. 

De kracht van onze werking zit er in dat we de organisaties en mensen zelf willen versterken zodat ze nadien zelf de trajecten, ... kunnen opnemen zonder afhankelijk te zijn van derden. Dit is zeer belangrijk om een duurzaam effect te kunnen garanderen van de trajecten. 

We creëren zo de mogelijkheid om de stakeholders op te leiden. Dit terwijl ze “stage” kunnen lopen in hun eigen organisatie. Dit met als doel om het traject op een duurzame effectieve manier, blijvend, te kunnen laten leven binnen de organisatie.

Name: Ejendomsdrift Danmark
Description:
Ejendomsdrift hos os handler om mere end bygninger – det handler om mennesker. Vi skaber trygge og velfungerende rammer for dem, der bor og arbejder i ejendommene. Hver opgang, hver gård og hver teknisk installation bliver passet med omhu, fordi vi ved, at de små detaljer gør den store forskel.

Vi sørger for, at varmen er der, når vinteren kommer, og at alt fungerer, som det skal – fra vand og ventilation til adgang og sikkerhed. Vi arbejder med både bolig- og erhvervsejendomme og har fokus på trivsel og personlig kontakt.

Ejendomsdrift er ikke bare teknik – det er ansvar, nærvær og respekt for hverdagen. Og vi er stolte af at være dem, der får det hele til at fungere.

Trabajamos con empresas que están preocupadas porque tienen alta dependencia del CEO para vender, y su método de captación se basa, en gran parte, en el boca oreja. Por lo que no tienen un proceso sistemático de generar oportunidades que puedan activar cuando se necesita.

Montamos un proceso de prospección y ventas B2B escalable y predecible que genera reuniones sistemáticamente, permitiendo tomar decisiones de forma continua.

Hacemos la estrategia y segmentación, configuramos el CRM y automatizamos los procesos y dejamos la máquina de generar reuniones lista. En 6 semanas tenemos el proceso funcionando. 

Rubén García. CEO de Cotera; Startup de Psicología especializada en mejora de rendimiento de equipos en empresas tecnológicas:

“En 1 mes teníamos el sistema montado y empezamos a generar reuniones. En 3 meses habíamos duplicado la facturación para todo el año.
Ahora estamos preparando la empresa para asumir más ventas y seguir creciendo”. 

Si has llegado hasta aquí hay una buena probabilidad de que nos entendamos bien. Conozcámonos!

Description:
