Unser Angebot umfasst:

    Beratung & Consulting
Wir analysieren bestehende Strukturen und Abläufe – von Gebäuden über Veranstaltungen bis hin zu Freizeitaktivitäten – und zeigen auf, wie Barrieren gezielt abgebaut werden können. Dabei greifen wir auf fundierte Fachkenntnisse und über 11 Jahre eigene Erfahrung im Rollstuhl zurück.

    Trainings & Sensibilisierung
Unsere praxisnahen Schulungen, Workshops und Rollstuhlsimulationen ermöglichen einen Perspektivenwechsel und fördern das Verständnis für die Herausforderungen im Alltag von Menschen mit Behinderungen.

    Produktentwicklung
Mit innovativen Lösungen wie dem #ChairInABox schaffen wir neue Möglichkeiten für barrierefreie Mobilität – insbesondere in der Natur und in alpinen Regionen, wo es bisher kaum Angebote gibt.

Wir verbinden persönliche Erfahrung mit fachlicher Expertise und entwickeln praxisnahe, individuell anpassbare Lösungen, die Inklusion dort ermöglichen, wo sie bisher kaum stattfindet.

Description:

Our team brings along an extensive lean and project management experience from a broad range of industries including Network Infrastructure, Rail, Automotive, Healthcare, Construction, Food and FMCG. Our consultants are passionate to work with cross-functional teams and are experienced in identifying and reducing waste throughout the value stream.
We engage with all levels of organization to ensure efforts are aligned to achieve business goals and enable teams by providing the required know-how to achieve operational excellence. We develop and implement practical structured management systems to engage teams and enhance collaboration to proactively manage risks and issues impacting business objectives.

Our Vision 
Be a trusted partner in providing expert solutions to our clients, supporting to achieve strategic alignment, operational excellence, and effective governance within their enterprise
Our Mission
Enable our clients and their teams with required knowledge and tools to achieve operational excellence and be competitive within their markets

Our Approach
- Understand the business needs and objectives, and develop business improvement road map to achieve those objectives
- Develop key performance indicators metrics and key activities indicators in terms of SQCDPE  
- Engage teams to develop supporting processes and RACI
- Support and coach cross-functional teams to understand and eliminate the waste in the processes
- Develop and implement a structured Governance System to manage the performance against agreed objectives, targets and performance indicators and mitigate risks to business objectives with timely escalation and resolution 
- Develop a continuous improvement mindset within the organization through process confirmation, constraints identification and supporting improvement initiatives using structured approach.

Our core competencies include:

- Bottleneck and Crisis Management: Ensuring seamless supply and production continuity in critical situations.

- Task Force Deployments: Immediate operational support to resolve urgent challenges effectively.

- Supplier and Production Relocations: Managing end-to-end relocations, from planning to ramp-up, even under tight timelines.

- Industrialization and Ramp-Up: Driving smooth launches and scale-ups of production processes.

- Production, Logistics, and Quality Optimization: Streamlining processes for efficiency, cost-effectiveness, and quality assurance.

What sets us apart is our team of senior-level experts with deep-rooted experience in the automotive industry. Our consultants bring specialized component, technology, and process know-how, combined with the ability to lead and implement under pressure. We are not strategists offering high-level advice; we are implementers who deliver tangible results.

With strategically positioned offices in Hamburg, Germany and Wroclaw, Poland, we offer direct access to the European market, leveraging local teams to provide swift, cost-efficient support where it’s needed most.

T.A.S. FORCE stands for reliability, excellence, and impact. Whether it’s securing supply chains, stabilizing critical suppliers, or executing complex relocations, we deliver practical solutions that ensure your success. Let us tackle your operational challenges with the precision and commitment you expect.

 Reclaim their identity and restore self-trust

Name: The Empathic Scientist
Description:
Simone Lackner is a multidisciplinary scientist specialized in Complexity and Systems,  a cultural professional with roots in performance art and founder of the consultancy The Empathic Scientist. 
As ReMO Ambassador and the founder of Soapbox Science Lisbon, We and Climate Circle and Salon Luminosa, she is an empathic advocate for Diversity, Inclusion, Equity and Wellbeing in academia and beyond.

After more than 15 years of working in different disciplines, in eleven institutes, across five countries (Austria, Singapore, USA, Japan, Portugal) - as a female scientist and first generation academic - Simone Lackner is strongly aware of the struggles and challenges one faces to progress in a scientific career. She observed and experienced how the academic research culture impacts not only the wellbeing of individual researchers but also the dynamics within research teams and the success of a research institute retaining and sustaining excellence in science. She started to study the available research on this subject, confirming that there are recognized crucial issues in the academic system that need targeted action urgently.

Simone Lackner gives keynote lectures, participate in panel discussions, act as a consultant or conflict mediator and facilitate science-based workshops on resilience, agency, emotional intelligence and non-violent communication as well as burn-out prevention using artistic processes.

Name: Plastic Free Society
Description:
Plastic Free Society est une association qui a pour objectif d'accélérer la transition de notre société vers la fin de la pollution plastique.

Nous sommes actuellement une dizaine de bénévoles, avec des compétences diverses et complémentaires (management des RH, développement de projet ESS, communication, DA, marketing, design produits...), unis par le désir de mettre nos savoirs et savoirs faire au service de la préservation de notre environnement et de la santé humaine.

Notre action s'appuie sur 3 grandes missions :

Sensibiliser à la consommation et aux alternatives « zéro plastique ». Cet axe passe par la communication sur les réseaux, organisation des événements de sensibilisation, mais aussi par l'organisation du "mois zéro plastique", lors duquel nous proposons aux participants de découvrir des nouvelles manières de consommer, tout en cherchant de faire au mieux et non pas d'être parfaits. Nous espérons, en faisant grandir cet événement, que nous pourrons montrer aux marques et industriels que nous sommes nombreux-ses à attendre des alternatives au plastique et les pousser à nous proposer de nouveaux emballages.

Valoriser les efforts individuels et collectifs en faveur du zéro plastique. Cette mission de valorisation s'appuie directement sur l'un de nos principes fondamentaux : les efforts de chacun-e, quel que soit leur ampleur, méritent d'être remarqués et valorisés. Nous souhaitons, en nous appuyant sur ce principe, renforcer positivement l'engagement en faveur de la consommation durable. Cet axe de valorisation passe notamment par une communication positive basée sur une posture d'empathie, par la mise en avant des acteurs engagés dans la démarche zéro plastique, et par la volonté de créer le premier label français "zéro plastique" qui pourra témoigner de l'effort de son posseseur.

Faciliter la réduction de déchets plastiques de tout type de public, via la recherche et l’accompagnement à la mise en place de solutions viables.

Name: Afers Públics - Consultoria social
Description:
Som una consultora centrada en anticipar els riscos i aprofitar les oportunitats generades per contextos d'alta incertesa.

Acompanyem a les organitzacions per construir relacions i complicitats; i ho fem des de l’escolta activa, amb ambició i mirada endavant. Volem avançar-nos al futur!  

Oferim serveis d’acompanyament, assessorament i facilitació a les administracions públiques, empreses i entitats socials. 

Des de l’expertesa i especialització en el sector 
de l’economia social i solidària, centrem la nostra activitat en relacions institucionals, incidència política i posicionament empresarial.

La nostra proposta es fonamenta en un canvi de mirada en la relació entre les administracions públiques, les empreses i les entitats socials, passant de l’interès legítim de cadascuna de les parts a una cocreació real de solucions i respostes per generar polítiques públiques innovadores i transformadores.

Aquest canvi portarà a la generació d’un nou paradigma basat en la voluntat d’incidència política democràtica, honesta i transparent, de totes les parts implicades en una decisió. Estem convençuts que aquest és el model per abordar reptes complexos, garantir l’equitat i avançar cap a una major cohesió social.

Name: PROPONENTS
Description:
We foster transformative change within people, organizations, and systems. 
We offer services for 
1) Individual and leadership support - including Executive Coaching, Thought Partnership, and support for your wellbeing and inner development
2) Organizational development and alignment - Including supporting cultures, practices, and tools for strategic learning & evaluation, 
3) Systems Improvement - Including convening systems actors and developing advocacy strategies and policy agendas. 
 
Woven throughout these offerings is an emphasis on cultivating well-being and discovery.

We create conditions and engage in processes that deepen our awareness, strengthen our interconnectivity, heighten our clarity, intrigue our purpose, explore our alignment, and spur us to step forward with courage. We aim for our work to be both strategic and transformative. We hold space for reflective inquiry and relationship. We support change at both the individual, organizational, and systems level. 

We do our work as coaches, thought partners, analysts, strategists, facilitators, systems conveners, connectors, learners, community members, and partners. 

Some reasons we might work together include: 
*You want to connect with an experienced leader and thought partner around the complexity of leadership, organizational culture, and how to influence change.
*You want to explore wellness and self-discovery practices through an individual or team-building session.
*You want to clarify your vision, purpose, values, theory of change and alignment to them. 
*You want to strengthen your organization’s learning culture and evaluative practices.
*You want to develop an evaluation strategy that aligns with your values and principles.
*You want to refine your advocacy strategies and policy agendas.
*You want to convene systems leaders around a particular issue.

We are your PROPONENT! Your learning and transformation partner that supports you in leading and influencing change.

Name: EDTC - European Diving Technology Committee
Description:
The European Diving Technology Committee (EDTC) came into being in March 1973 as a result of an initiative taken by the United Kingdom’s Society for Underwater Technology (SUT). The society felt that there was a need to promote good standards for diving, to provide a means of improvement if appropriate, and to coordinate where possible, the different standards which existed around the world. 
Membership is open to representatives of any country within geographical Europe. Each country may be represented by a single representative from each of the following categories:
•	Medical,
•	Industry,
•	Government,
•	Unions.

Com inteligência, temos como proposta de valor cuidar desta área para que a sua empresa não coloque em risco o seu produto ou a saúde do paciente e/ou consumidor com impacto em qualidade, bem como a falta do produto no mercado por uma falha neste processo de renovações de inspeções de BPF, gestão com fornecedores, terceiros ou prestadores de serviço.

Oferecemos alto nível de serviço, com profissionais comprovadamente capacitados, soluções completas e inteligentes para ajudar a sua empresa a cumprir com os requisitos legais e assegurar a prevenção, manutenção e conformidade da qualidade por meio de autoinspeção e qualificação de fornecedores, prestadores de serviço ou terceirizados.

Em relação a SSMA, nosso foco é avaliar os riscos para a empresa e mitigar qualquer impacto de SSMA para os produtos, serviços, imagem do cliente e até interrupção do fornecimento.

Name: OJT Associates, Inc.
Description:
OJT Associates helps employers leverage work-based learning opportunities through WIOA. This expands candidate hiring pools and provides significant employer cost savings.

OJT Associates sole focus is assisting clients submit and secure payment for qualified and approved WIOA On-the-Job-Training at no risk to the employer. 

The strong labor market has made it more difficult than ever for employers to find qualified and skilled workers. On-the-Job-Training plays an important role in bringing new hires up to speed quickly and effectively without paying top dollar for a new hire that checks EVERY box.
 
Billions of dollars of Federally budgeted and allocated On-the-Job-Training funds go unused every year.  The Workforce Innovation & Opportunity Act (WIOA) provides funding for employers to conduct On-the-Job-Training (OJT). These funds reduce employer risk by reimbursing a new hires hourly wages and salary during training for up to six months. 
 
OJT Associates and TORQ have developed a “done for you” service platform that makes applying for On-the-Job-Training funds efficient for organizations regardless of size. The program is risk free to employers. The employer pays OJT Associates only for approved OJT applications.

Description:
Somos una empresa de consultoría en Planeación estratégica, PMO y de procesos.   POKA YOKE está inspirada en la palabra japonesa: 
[ ポカヨケ] que significa “a prueba de error humano”.   

Proveemos soluciones hechas a la medida, acompañamos a empresas de los sectores de servicio, manufactura y start up a retar el status quo encontrando soluciones simples y sostenibles, asegurando así que existen las condiciones adecuadas “antes” de que una actividad sea ejecutada.

Nos interesa escuchar las necesidades de nuestros clientes, entender los retos y oportunidades que enfrentan de acuerdo a su posición en el mercado, sus dinámicas y formas de trabajo, para de esta manera ampliar su visión del negocio y definir el rumbo y procesos internos que deberán seguir para lograr sus objetivos de negocio. 

En POKA YOKE desarrollamos una metodología que nos permite recorrer los procesos clave de la organización.  Detectamos oportunidades y generamos un diagnóstico con planes de trabajo en diferentes niveles para asegurar que las estrategias y las acciones están en línea con los objetivos de negocio. 
Nos inspiramos en la metodología Hoshin Kanri y BPM (Business Process Management) que emplea métodos para analizar, medir y optimizar la estrategia y los procesos de negocio. Los principios Six Sigma, Lean y Gestión de Proyectos son ejemplos de metodologías BPM que generan valor a las organizaciones.   
Creemos que las herramientas técnicas son igual de importantes que las humanas, el modelo de POKA YOKE integra una serie de valores y comportamientos que son esenciales para mejorar el desempeño individual y de los equipos de trabajo, de esta forma convertir a los embajadores de manera progresiva en agentes de cambio, autodirigidos y que gestionan las mejoras como parte de la cultura organizacional (ADN).

En SDL México, no somos solo un proveedor, somos tu socio estratégico. Facilitamos tu operación, optimizamos recursos y garantizamos soluciones eficientes con el respaldo de años de experiencia y un equipo altamente capacitado.

Essas equipes são capacitadas para conduzir operações de recuperação de cargas e ativos, utilizando tecnologias avançadas de RF para rastreamento e localização.

With experience in finance, legal services, accounting, management consulting, our operations include in Australia, the United States of America, the United Kingdom of Great Britain, Canada, Dubai, as well as parts of South-East Asia and Europe.

Fairbane is fortunate enough to have had members work with organisations such as: Deloitte, Ernst & Young, the Australian Government in the Departments of Defence, Trade, Health and Aged Care, the United Kingdom Departments of Defence, and National Health Service, various medium to large companies in industries ranging from Finance, Aerospace, Biotechnology, Communications, Computing, Construction and Resources.

Fairbane’s vision is to push the boundaries and reach out to the horizons of scientific and technological boundaries and do so by ensuring there is the freedom and flexibility available to individual businesses and their industries as a whole to compete and prosper. Fairbane is a truly future-oriented organisation with a unique vision for the world.

At Fairbane, the world in the year 2020 is seen through the lens of what the world could and may well be like in the year 2100 and 2200. This means encouraging development of new ideas and providing a foundation for the new technologies that come from them.

Fairbane provides advice to various companies and individuals in the media industry, primarily in the emerging sub-markets and emerging technologies and platforms, particularly start-ups. Our expertise comes from a management consulting perspective and from legal advice to clients and partners, and policy advice to various entities.

A new startup build to facilitate organizations with the right management teams across all functional areas, Vihana Technical Solution is an Indian company, which deals in recruitment of executives, middle & top management personnel for the current business environment and Parallel we have technical team which provide all drone services.
Our team is composed of highly skilled consultants with proven track record in operational activities within diverse industries which enable us to comprehend client's strategic constraints & needs while looking for experts and managers who can deliver maximum value to client.
VTS is also a pioneer in the field of drone services.  We have been providing our clients with game changing data acquired by using the latest in drone technology. Our services include drone inspections, surveys, air quality monitoring, thermal inspections, and software solutions. Our team is made up of dedicated drone pilots, civil and computer engineers, as well as seasoned surveyors to ensure the information we deliver to our clients meets the highest accuracy standards. 
At VTS, we take safety very seriously. Our drone pilots go through an extensive training program that would allow them to be prepared for any eventuality. We are well-versed with local drone regulations which can halt work and incur legal liability if not navigated correctly. We pride ourselves on being hands on with our clients to ensure that they receive the maximum benefit from the acquired data so that they have a great return on their investment. 
We start a project by deep diving into the client’s requirements and we offer a custom-tailored solution accordingly. We then plan our flights and get any necessary approvals followed by our flights, data processing and delivery. Our unmatched experience in this field has allowed us to call some of the largest contractors, engineering firms, real-estate companies, and government agencies our clients.

Name: Trampetti
Description:
You have some ambitious growth and expansion goals to achieve this year - 
Do you have the right partner to plan and execute them?

Meet Michael Trampetti, founder of Trampetti Management Group. 

Year after year, we continue seeing the same thing - strong visions, incredible revenue growth and expansion, but a weak and limited infrastructure to handle it. In addition, the majority of leaders are ill-equipped to properly diagnose the areas of the business that hold them back. 

But we don’t just diagnose, we work with you and your operations team to quickly and effectively troubleshoot, correct, overhaul, and improve all areas of your operations that keep you from your unique vision being made real. Consider TMG your operational special forces - highly experienced and equipped to eliminate the hurdles that keep your company from handling all that you have planned for it.
Wondering if TMG is a good fit for you?

Are you…
Struggling to maintain current business operations while revenue keeps growing?
Wondering if your business systems are able to support your five-year plan?
Feeling pressure to accomplish more than you can handle as a company?
We get it. In our experience, many leaders relate to these. And it’s completely NORMAL. The best leaders and teams don’t have all the answers, but instead share a secret knowledge that sets them apart from the mediocre companies - that the best way to achieve your company vision is to ensure you have the right people, processes and tools to properly scale and expand with your business. And that’s precisely what you get with TMG. The peace of mind to continue growing and expanding while knowing your business is ready for it.

 Transformação prática e sem complexidade

Name: KYKLOS SA

Υ Π Η Ρ Ε Σ Ι Ε Σ 

ΨΗΦΙΑΚΗ ΕΠΙΚΥΡΩΣΗ ΕΓΓΡΑΦΩΝ
Αναλαμβάνουμε τον έλεγχο και όλη την διαδικασία ψηφιακής επικύρωσης μέσω gov.gr όλων των εγγράφων και δικαιολογητικών που απαιτούνται για την ταξινόμηση των οχημάτων σας.
ΤΑΞΙΝΟΜΗΣΕΙΣ ΝΕΩΝ ΟΧΗΜΑΤΩΝ:
Διαχειριζόμαστε όλα τα  έγγραφα  και δικαιολογητικά για την ταξινόμηση νέων οχημάτων, καθώς και  την διεκπεραίωσής τους από το  Υπουργείο ως την τελική παράδοση στον πελάτη την επομένη. 
ΜΕΤΑΒΙΒΑΣΕΙΣ ΚΥΡΙΟΤΗΤΑΣ ΟΧΗΜΑΤΩΝ
Αναλαμβάνουμε την διαχείριση των εγγράφων και όλων των απαιτούμενων διαδικασιών για την μεταβίβαση κυριότητας και  την ολοκλήρωση αγοράς και πώλησης μεταχειρισμένων, σε μία μόνο ημέρα 
BACK OFFICE ΔΙΑΧΕΙΡΙΣΗ
Αν δεν διαθέτετε Back Office ή αν έχετε, αλλά θέλετε μεγαλύτερη ευελιξία, και εξοικονόμηση πόρων, σας προσφέρουμε πλήρεις υπηρεσίες Outsourcing Back Office, σύμφωνα με τις δικές σας προδιαγραφές.
ΔΙΑΧΕΙΡΙΣΗ ΕΙΔΙΚΩΝ ΥΠΟΘΕΣΕΩΝ

Name: DISPO
Description:
Vous voyez ces locaux (commerciaux) fermés, que l’on aperçoit quand on traverse un centre-bourg ? Le rideau métallique baissé, la vitrine couverte d’affiches ? Ils ont un fort potentiel pour la revitalisation et l’animation des petites communes. 

 Alors, ces espaces,on choisit de les qualifier de DISPONIBLES, car c’est un moyen optimiste et engagé d’ouvrir la porte aux projets.

  La boîte à outils de DISPO permet de travailler sur 3 types de missions :
1 Accompagnement des collectivités (AMO) : des diagnostics, des études de programmation, rédaction de cahiers de charges, des temps de consultation & concertation, l'aide à la décision collective et la priorisation, la recherche de porteurs, procédures ORI, PLU(i)...
2 Conseil aux (futurs) occupants de locaux : conseil pour l'aménagement et l'enseigne, pièces de dossiers administratifs (AT, AP, DP...), précision de l'offre en lien avec leurs besoins, ceux du territoire et les contraintes du bâtiment à occuper...
3 Diffusion des outils d’action de lutte contre la vacance commerciale récoltés au cours de la recherche DISPO et au travers des expériences d’accompagnement : atelier, conférence, et rédaction-illustration.

Prenons rendez-vous pour échanger sur vos enjeux, partager nos retours d’expériences  
 contact : dispo.c.vernay@gmail.com

Basée à La Côte-Saint-André, centre-bourg isérois de moins de 5000 habitants, l'agence DISPO sillonne la région Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes.

Activité membre de la coopérative Oxalis Scop  

#AMO #revitalisation #centre-bourg #commerces #PetitesVillesDeDemain #CohésionDesTerritoires #ANCT

Name: MCCIA Electronic Cluster Foundation (MECF)
Description:
The Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY) has announced financial assistance for setting up of Electronics Manufacturing Clusters (EMCs) for promoting Electronics System Design & Manufacturing (ESDM). In Maharashtra, Pune District has been declared as a Brownfield cluster. The scope of the Brownfield cluster under EMC Scheme includes providing financial assistance for the development/ up-gradation of common infrastructure and facilities to enhance the competitiveness of existing units in an area notified as a Brownfield EMC.

Mahratta Chamber of Commerce, Industries and Agriculture (MCCIA), initiated a Special Purpose Vehicle (SPV) with objective of promoting the development of EMC by setting up a Common Facility Centre (CFC) in Pune. This CFC will help the electronics industries in Pune and surrounding areas in terms of latest technology, cost competitiveness, faster turnaround time etc. enabling Pune region to become a default destination for electronics design led manufacturing. This will help in developing an entrepreneurial ecosystem, drive innovation and catalyse the economic growth by increasing employment opportunities and tax revenues.

COMMON FACILITY CENTRE (CFC) STATUS
SPV ‘MECF’ (MCCIA Electronic Cluster Foundation)  submitted the Preliminary Detailed Project Report (DPR) and has received Final Approval from Meit Y. MeitY has approved a Grant In Aid of Rs 50 crores and Government of Maharashtra has approved a ‘Financial Assistance’ of Rs 6.7 crores to MECF in Dec 2017. MeitY has granted an extension of one year in Feb 2019.

Name: INTEGRITY SOLUTIONS - EU PPWR Consulting
Description:
Integrity Solutions is a European consultancy that supports companies navigate EU PPWR effectively and with confidence.

We work with companies across the EU and exporters to the EU to build a packaging strategy that is:

 Compliant – aligned with the EU Packaging & Packaging Waste Regulation (PPWR)
 Cost-effective – optimized for performance, budget and market context
 Credible – backed by data 

________________________________________

 What we help you achieve:

1) A consolidated overview of the PPWR impact: a summary of how the PPWR affects the company’s existing EU packaging portfolio, highlighting main risks, opportunities and grey areas.

2) A consolidated overview of the packaging portfolio audit: an assessment that includes material composition, recyclability potential, recycled content, reuse potential, labelling status, etc.

3) A compliance roadmap: a timeline with key milestones and priorities for achieving compliance with the PPWR by packaging category.

4) A consolidated action plan: for each non-compliant packaging category or material type, outlining required changes and potential options, along with their high-level feasibility assessment and business impact.

5) All together this becomes a decision map for further internal in-depth assessment, project initiation and resource allocation.

________________________________________

 We support you from PPWR assessment to execution and help you:

1 Interpret PPWR requirements for your business
2 Audit packaging portfolios for compliance gaps and identify risks and opportunities
3 Build a tailored roadmap and action plan
4 Guide implementation, sourcing, and certification
5 Perform market analysis

If your organization is looking to turn the complexity (and anxiety) of PPWR into a simplified, comprehensive strategy, let’s talk.

Our primary responsibilities encompass the licensing and supervision of gambling operators, ensuring compliance with legal and ethical standards, and safeguarding the interests of both consumers and the industry itself.

As a regulatory authority, we play a pivotal role in fostering responsible gambling practices, protecting vulnerable individuals, and promoting a fair and transparent gaming environment. Our commitment extends beyond mere oversight; we actively engage with stakeholders, collaborate with government agencies, and invest in community initiatives to ensure the sustainable growth of the gambling sector while contributing positively to the well-being of the Eastern Cape's residents.

At the heart of our mission lies the promotion of responsible gambling, the mitigation of social issues associated with gambling, and the facilitation of a vibrant, well-regulated industry that adheres to the highest standards of integrity. The ECGB is dedicated to achieving these objectives to the benefit of our community and stakeholders alike.

Somos especialistas em dois principais pilares:

1. Turnaround, Reestruturação e Revitalização:

Avaliação detalhada dos desafios financeiros e operacionais enfrentados pelas empresas

Execução Eficaz
Implementação prática das estratégias, incluindo mudanças organizacionais, redefinição de processos e otimização de recursos.

Monitoramento Contínuo:
Estabelecimento de métricas de desempenho e monitoramento constante para garantir a eficácia das ações implementadas.

Identificação de oportunidades de crescimento, tanto através de expansão orgânica quanto por meio de aquisições estratégicas.

Desenvolvimento de planos para entrada bem-sucedida em novos mercados, com consideração de fatores locais e globais.

Due Diligence:
Realização de due diligence abrangente para avaliar riscos e oportunidades associados a aquisições potenciais.

Integração Eficiente:
Gerenciamento eficaz do processo de integração após a aquisição, minimizando impactos negativos e otimizando sinergias.

Desempenhamos um papel vital no fortalecimento e crescimento sustentável das empresas, proporcionando soluções adaptadas às necessidades individuais de cada cliente.

Name: Amazon Advies
Description:
Waarom Amazon?

Met maar liefst 150 miljoen Prime leden is Amazon niet alleen een shopping platform, maar een volledig ecosysteem in e-commerce. Elk jaar groeit het platform in gebruikers, landen en het assortiment.

Amazon heeft een wereldwijd logistiek netwerk opgezet waar jij als e-commerce verkoper gebruik van kunt maken. Zo heb je in een klap een markt van niet 17 miljoen (sorry bol.com) maar 600 miljoen klanten te pakken. Dit getal zal de komende jaren aanzienlijk blijven groeien. Zowel in Nederland als de rest van de wereld. Wil jij een markt van 600 miljoen consumenten laten liggen?

Waarom Amazon Advies?

Wij willen dat klanten één aanspreekpunt hebben voor al hun Amazon zaken. Zowel op het gebied van internationale btw aangiftes, als alles binnen het Amazon platform zelf. Op deze manier kunnen wij de klant een complete service aanbieden.
Zodra je begint met verkopen op Amazon heb je te maken met een gecompliceerd werkend Amazon Seller Central platform. Daarbij kom je ook in aanraking met internationale wetgeving omtrent BTW verplichtingen en andere legale vraagstukken.
Met een hands-on mentaliteit geven wij niet alleen advies, maar voeren wij het ook uit. Zo kunnen wij je complete Amazon ambities waarmaken. Een team van Amazon specialisten en belasting experts helpen jou het meeste uit Amazon te halen.

Wat bieden wij?
Een gevarieerd team met jarenlange Amazon ervaring;
Van Amazon inhoudelijke vraagstukken tot volledige internationale btw administratie, Amazon Advies heeft het allemaal in huis;
Geen "wordt snel rijk" geroep, maar een rationale en data gedreven aanpak;
Een persoonlijke, informele en efficiente werkwijze met de focus op output.

Name: Growers Without Borders
Description:
The Growers Without Border is a organization that brings a diverse series of interviews, articles, conversations and media with interesting individuals in the cannabis industry from across the globe with the goal to help educate and inform all those that wish to learn more.

We will be speaking with not only experienced veterans to the profession but those who are attempting their first venture into the industry, students and advocates wishing to improve there current knowledge and techniques, and the sharing of traditional methods that are not currently well known.

Growers Without Borders is a collective of knowledgeable and experienced cannabis professionals who believe in the concept of open-source education. Most of the emerging cannabis industry experience came from informal Socratic methods such as mentor-ships, online sources, and conversations between like minded individuals. All conducted in the shadow and secrecy of oppressive governments around the world.

The struggle of the cannabis community to grow under prohibition created a bond between those seeking to grow their knowledge and educate themselves in pursuit of the plant, as well as created a sense of responsibility to continually share what had been tested and learned from experience in order to aide others.

Growers Without Border continues that mentality by trying to offer education and insight into the expanding cannabis world, regardless of the laws in the area we operate in.

Name: Marc Exchange
Description: A MarcExchange surge com um legado sólido, respaldado pela experiência de seu fundador, João Marcelo, adquirida em mais de 38 anos de atuação com passagens por conceituadas Instituições Financeiras no País, destacando: Banco Mercantil do Brasil, Banco Rural, Banco Máxima e, mais recentemente, OURIBANK S.A. Este último, sendo um banco com mais de 40 anos de experiência, consolidando-se como referência no mercado de câmbio Brasileiro. A MarcExchange simboliza a junção das experiências de seu fundador, João Marcelo com as do OURIBANK, que fará parte dessa jornada de sucesso, como nosso parceiro estratégico.Considerando a nossa expertise na atuação no Mercado Cambial Brasileiro, pudemos identificar que a burocracia excessiva gera insegurança e processos onerosos e ineficientes, o que contribui dificuldades para a efetivação de transações no segmento. Em razão dos desafios impostos pela burocracia no setor cambial, desenvolvemos métodos inovadores e eficientes, visando otimizar o câmbio e a movimentação de capitais estrangeiros de nossos clientes e parceiros. Essas soluções buscam não apenas reduzir os custos operacionais e a complexidade dos processos (que envolvem etapas desde o cadastramento de clientes até a recepção e análise de documentos que respaldem as transações cambiais pretendidas), mas também, garantir maior agilidade, eficiência, conformidade e segurança nas transações.

Name: Victory Cybersecurity Consultancy (VCC)
Description:
Listen to our podcast Hacked By Halftime here: https://open.spotify.com/show/3AbiBF1mdLsQC91vFbeziS?si=3p8A24fqRYe9FI9eGtk6Lg.

Victory Cyber Consultancy (VCC) was founded on a simple but crucial idea: cybersecurity shouldn’t be out of reach for businesses. After watching her husband pursue a Ph.D. in cybersecurity, Sara Whitesel, Founder and CEO, questioned why security solutions were so expensive and how organizations were expected to afford them. This sparked a mission to make cybersecurity accessible by focusing on processes, not just tools.

At VCC, we integrate security across your entire business by leveraging the tools you already own, ensuring cybersecurity isn’t just an IT function but a seamless, organization-wide strategy. We specialize in sports, healthcare, and academia, industries that often face unique cybersecurity challenges yet struggle to find cost-effective solutions. Backed by Ph.D.-level expertise and military cyber operations professionals, VCC delivers Affordable, Actionable, and Adaptable security solutions. No challenge is too big or too small—if you need help, we’re here.

Description:
NATURAL HARMONY Pvt. Ltd. specializes in producing high-purity (95–98%) Steviol Glycosides a natural, plant-based, zero-calorie sweetener extracted from dried Stevia leaves using innovative, eco-friendly technology. 

Th problem we are solving
1. Consumer Taste Barriers: The characteristic bitter aftertaste of Stevia affects its sensory appeal and market acceptance, particularly in mainstream food and beverage applications. 
2. Quality issue, Supply Chain Gaps & Import Reliance: Despite increasing demand for natural, zero-calorie sweeteners due to rising health consciousness, there is limited domestic availability of high-quality and pure Steviol Glycoside. Industries such as nutraceuticals, pharmaceuticals, cosmetics, and F&B face: 
o Inconsistent quality of imported extracts 
o Unstable supply chains 
o High import costs 
o Pressure to reduce the environmental impact of traditional sugar usage 
3. Outdated and Unsustainable Extraction Methods: Existing Stevia extraction technologies are environmentally harmful and economically inefficient. They rely on harsh solvents and outdated purification methods, resulting in low yields and a high ecological impact.

Name: Disability Content Consulting
Description:
Architecting access across three pillars:
1. Hiring & Workplace Equity: Dismantling barriers from application to promotion.
2. Content & Media Integrity: Guaranteeing representation and access in every message.
3. Strategic DEI Implementation: Making belonging a measurable business outcome.
Design with us.Learn more: disability-consulting.org
Schedule a call: https://app.reclaim.ai/m/hebatullah-issa/flexible-quick-meeting

We’re a disability-led consultancy that believes inclusion is a verb. It’s not a checkbox, a statement, or a distant goal. It’s the systems you build, the content you create, and the people you hire today.

In a world racing toward AI and automation, we put humanity back at the center. We partner with organizations ready to move beyond talk and into action. We audit gaps, train teams, and redesign processes to be accessible from the inside out.

Our work bridges the critical gap between intent and impact. We specialize in:
• Inclusive Hiring & HR: Auditing job descriptions, reforming interview processes, and dismantling biased AI in recruitment.
• Authentic Media & Content: Sensitivity reading, accessibility auditing, and ensuring your storytelling represents the full human experience.
• Strategic DEI & Belonging: Developing actionable policies, leading neuroinclusion strategy, and building cultures where everyone can contribute.

We don’t believe in perfection; we believe in progress. Our expertise is rooted in lived experience, sharp strategy, and the conviction that access is a right, not a privilege.

 #AccessibilityConsultant #InclusiveWorkplace  #DEIStrategy  #DisabilityInclusion  #InclusiveCommunications

Name: Thomas Consulting Co.
Description:
At Thomas Consulting, we provide comprehensive services to help companies plan for, design, and develop electric vehicle (EV) infrastructure.

We understand the critical role of charging infrastructure in adopting electric vehicles and transitioning to an all-electric future. Our services encompass the entire spectrum of EV asset adoption challenges for businesses, from charging to strategic planning and implementation. Working closely with our clients, we assess current infrastructure, evaluate charging needs, and develop customized strategies to tailor your EV strategy that fits your needs. With our expertise, we optimize placement, capacity, and type of charging stations, ensuring efficient and reliable charging experiences. 

Additionally, we offer economic modeling services to help companies understand the financial implications of transitioning to an EV fleet or providing access to infrastructure to employees and customers. We empower our clients to make informed decisions and develop robust business cases for sustainable transportation solutions by analyzing the total cost of ownership, return on investment, and potential cost savings.

We layout charging incentives and opportunities for companies to take full advantage of, as well as highlight additional revenue capture from existing assets, as well as offer insights into Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X), Virtual Power Plants (VPP), and Distributed Energy Resources (DERs). These technologies unlock the full potential of EV fleets, integrating them into energy management systems and leveraging them as grid-supportive assets. We help develop strategies to maximize value, giving insights into a demand response program participation, grid balancing methods, and energy market opportunities. 

Contact Thomas Consulting today, and let's embark on a journey toward a greener and more sustainable future together.

Beneficiază de serviciile SSM, SU-PSI, RSVTI & verificări electrice P.R.A.M.  cu ,,ZERO COSTURI’’!

Societatea noastră, prin statutul său de unitate protejată, îți poate oferi serviciile de SSM, SU-PSI, RSVTI & verificări electrice P.R.A.M. cu un “cost zero”, costul acestora fiind suportat din valoarea fondului de dizabilități datorat lunar către stat. 
Acest fapt este stabilit de Legea nr. 448 din 2006 – articolul 78 și aduce cu sine beneficii directe nu doar pentru comunitate, ci și direct pentru companiile care aleg să lucreze cu o companie încadrată ca unitate protejată. 

Cum funcționează? 
Pe scurt, o companie care nu angajează persoane cu dizabilități este obligată să plătească lunar statului o sumă de bani. Dar, în același timp, poate alege să folosească jumătate din această sumă de bani pentru a achiziționa bunuri sau servicii de la companii care sunt autorizate ca unitate protejată. 

Protejează-ți afacerea de INFLAȚIE alegând Servicii SSM, SU-PSI, RSVTI & verificări electrice P.R.A.M., cu COSTURI 0 prin UNITATE PROTEJATĂ - ELECTRO SSM GROUP S.R.L.

Name: SOLVED Collective
Description:
About SOLVED Collective

SOLVED Collective is an operations design firm that helps growing, people-driven businesses bring clarity, structure, and momentum to how they run.

We partner with founders and leadership teams at pivotal stages of growth — when the business has outgrown its current operating model, complexity is creeping in, and execution starts to feel heavier than it should.

Our work sits at the intersection of strategy, operations, and leadership. We take a clear-eyed look at how work actually flows across people, projects, and priorities, then design operational structure that supports the next stage of growth without unnecessary bureaucracy or rigidity.

We don’t believe in cookie-cutter systems or forcing businesses into predefined frameworks. Every organization is different. Our approach is adaptive, relational, and grounded in reality — designed to strengthen execution while protecting the culture and creativity that made the business successful in the first place.

Whether through fractional operations partnership, operational assessments, focused sprints, or strategic facilitation, our role stays the same:
to bring order without slowing momentum, and clarity without flattening what makes a business unique.

At SOLVED Collective, operations stop being a bottleneck and become the backbone of sustainable growth.

Beneficiază de serviciile SSM, SU-PSI & verificări P.R.A.M.  cu ,,ZERO COSTURI’’!

Societatea noastră, prin statutul său de unitate protejată, îți poate oferi serviciile de SSM, SU-PSI & verificări P.R.A.M. cu un “cost zero”, costul acestora fiind suportat din valoarea fondului de dizabilități datorat lunar către stat. 
Acest fapt este stabilit de Legea nr. 448 din 2006 – articolul 78 și aduce cu sine beneficii directe nu doar pentru comunitate, ci și direct pentru companiile care aleg să lucreze cu o companie încadrată ca unitate protejată. 

Cum funcționează? 
Pe scurt, o companie care nu angajează persoane cu dizabilități este obligată să plătească lunar statului o sumă de bani. Dar, în același timp, poate alege să folosească jumătate din această sumă de bani pentru a achiziționa bunuri sau servicii de la companii care sunt autorizate ca unitate protejată. 

Protejează-ți afacerea de INFLAȚIE alegând Servicii SSM, SU-PSI & verificări P.R.A.M., cu COSTURI 0 prin UNITATE PROTEJATĂ - OH & S ENGINEERING GROUP PARTNER S.R.L.

Description:
A WGB é uma empresa de assessoria e consultoria em e-commerce e marketplaces, especializada na estruturação, organização e escala de operações digitais, atendendo desde projetos em fase inicial até operações já estruturadas.

Na assessoria para operações em fase inicial, a WGB atua de forma completa na construção do e-commerce, publicação de anúncios em marketplaces (Mercado Livre, Shopee, Amazon, etc), indo além da mídia paga. O foco está em organizar a operação como um todo, apoiando sellers na definição de uma base sólida para crescimento sustentável. A atuação pode envolver:

- Estruturação operacional (processos, equipamentos e equipe)
- Definição de precificação, estoque e logística
- Criação de loja própria (e-commerce da marca)
- Estruturação e gestão de Ads em Meta (Facebook e Instagram) e Google Ads
- Criação e otimização de campanhas pagas, incluindo criativos
- Gestão de anúncios nos principais marketplaces, como Mercado Livre e Shopee

Já na consultoria para operações em andamento, a atuação é focada exclusivamente em mídia paga, com uma abordagem estratégica e orientada por dados, atuando tanto no canal de vendas próprio do seller como nos marketplaces. O trabalho envolve diagnóstico, análise e otimização contínua para melhorar performance, ROAS e eficiência, sempre com foco em escala sustentável e previsibilidade de resultados.

Na WGB, o objetivo não é apenas anunciar mais, mas construir operações de e-commerce eficientes, lucrativas e escaláveis, alinhando estratégia, execução e resultado.

Name: EnviroSim USA
Description:
About Us:
EnviroSim USA is at the forefront of transforming wastewater treatment plant operations with our Expert Collaborative Hybrid Operations (ECHO) platform. We specialize in helping municipal and industrial utilities and operations companies achieve unparalleled outcomes in effluent compliance and process optimization. By combining our world-class expertise with cutting-edge ECHO, we empower utilities to maintain regulatory compliance, improve operational efficiency, and reduce costs.

Our Approach:
Our ECHO platform is a subscription-based service that integrates the best of both worlds—operational experience at the plant level and advanced expertise. In collaboration with the operations staff, EnviroSim’s process experts remotely monitor and analyze plant performance using intensive dynamic process simulation, ensuring optimal operations and performance. This hybrid collaborative model allows our experts to work closely with your plant management and operations staff, providing continuous support and driving innovation in your treatment processes.

Our Innovative Technology:
At the heart of our operations is the cloud-based BioTwin wastewater process simulator platform. BioTwin connects seamlessly and securely with your plant’s SCADA system, enabling real-time data integration and predictive operation scenarios. This advanced technology marks a significant evolution from traditional offline process simulation to a comprehensive hybrid operations model, delivering predictive modeling results, daily performance analysis, and on-call access to experts.

Our Commitment:
We are committed to providing the highest level of continuous support for your wastewater treatment operations. Our ECHO platform empowers your team to maintain compliance and mitigates financial risks from operational unpredictability. With our emphasis on data security, you can trust EnviroSim USA to deliver reliable, efficient, and secure solutions that drive long-term operations excellence.

Name: Anaitis NV
Description:
Ever wonder how much of a profit margin you can make? Are you now on 95% of the absolutely highest attainable or only at 10? 

How much of your effort is going into costly passion projects? Don't forget all the allocated time in meetings and discussions. Is this really worth it? Do you know what your pareto optimum is? How much is this passion worth to you? 

Can you really budget your revenue? You can persuade your consumer to buy more, but you cannot make them. You can, however, control your expenses. Do you confidently know which expenses affect your revenue? Do you know what to cut in case of a crisis? 

Some businesses create reports which attempt to inform decision makers on questions like those above. In many cases such reports are very financial, neatly listing performance and comparing it to last year and the budget. While important, what good does it do when this information is presented (lets be optimistic) 5 days into the new month? Its presenting a reality that can be 35 days old if not more. Will your actions be as effective then as they would have been in the heat of the moment? 

Do you merely use the reports to verify you are turning a profit (yay!) and prefer to wrap up the monthly meeting and continue with business as usual? 

There is so much more to be done. With us, you will discover how to shift the focus from creating mandatory reports to actually using your internal data and periodic reports for decision making. Have all those financials serve the business and not only the annual external audit. Intrigued? Let's talk!

Name: MY Coffee Guide
Description:
Nuestra historia empezó en Mayo de 2019 con la guía Barcelona Coffee Guide (@bcncoffeeguide), la plataforma que tiene como objetivo conectar a los amantes del café con las tiendas de cafés especiales de Barcelona y Europa. 

A través de un sencillo mapa, tenemos más de 2.000 locales registrados y a lo largo de estos años, hemos creado relación con toda la cadena: desde los productores del café de especialidad, los tostadores, proveedores y locales hasta los consumidores finales. 

Con toda la experiencia que hemos adquirido en estos años, creamos la Coffee XP en 2022, un hub de negocios y educación que busca profesionalizar el sector, dar a conocer el café de especialidad en Europa y ofrecer experiencias increíbles al consumidor final, a través de tecnología, consultorías, cursos para profesionales y consumidores, eventos y representación de marcas.

Nous analysons vos problématiques actuelles et identifions les leviers pour améliorer vos processus internes.

2 Plan d’Action sur-mesure
Nous développons une stratégie adaptée à votre structure : outils performants, process structurés, et accompagnement personnalisé.

3 Accompagnement au changement
Nous collaborons avec vos équipes pour implémenter les solutions et garantir leur adoption efficace.

Ce que vous gagnez :
 Des fondations solides pour soutenir votre croissance.
 Des process simplifiés et pérennes.

Gino Giovanetti, Consultor Senior Lean Six Sigma | Ingeniero Civil Industrial | Relator SENCE +25 años liderando programas de excelencia  operacional y mejora, en industrias productivas. Especialista en cambio cultural, liderazgo operativo y desarrollo de competencias.

SmoothScale is a boutique Revenue Operations (RevOps) consultancy helping Australian startups turn messy tech stacks into connected go-to-market systems that actually drive growth.

We work with founders and revenue leaders who feel the strain of scattered data, manual workarounds, and reports nobody fully trusts - the signs of real RevOps debt. Customer Relationship Management (CRM) systems used as contact lists, automations held together with duct tape, and teams all telling different versions of the numbers.

Instead of quick fixes, we design and implement whole-of-system RevOps - across people, process, and platforms. HubSpot sits at the core, with tools like Make.com or N8N orchestrating the rest of your stack into one calm, powerful revenue engine that your teams enjoy using.

Our work focuses on outcomes, not features:
	•	Clean, structured data and trustworthy reporting
	•	Forecasts that reflect reality, not wishful thinking
	•	Automated handoffs between marketing, sales, success, and finance
	•	Clear visibility for leaders and less admin for go-to-market teams

We bring deep experience in HubSpot, integrations, and automation together with practical operator mindset and clear communication. The result is a quieter, more predictable operation where everything clicks and growth feels manageable again.

Based in Sydney and focused on the Australian market. If you are scaling and your systems are struggling to keep up, connect with us at smoothscale.io or here on LinkedIn.

Name: Sabiq Advisory
Description:
About Sabiq

Sabiq Advisory FZE, licensed by the Dubai World Trade Centre Authority, specializes in Project Management Services, Project Development Consultancy, and Verification of Compliance in Islamic Banking and Finance. Established in May 2021, Sabiq has quickly become a leader in providing Shariah-compliant solutions, particularly in Commodity Murabaha (CM) transactions.

What Sets Us Apart

As the first advisory firm focusing on Shariah operational aspects, Sabiq excels in offering CM execution and agency services. We are integrated with multiple CM brokers, ensuring compliance with regulatory and Shariah standards. Our digital platform, Sabiq Core, automates CM transactions, streamlining the process for our clients.

Our Expertise

Sabiq’s services extend beyond CM transactions. We provide Shariah-driven infrastructure for investment purposes, including establishing Special Purpose Vehicles (SPVs) or Segregated Portfolio Companies (SPCs). Our Sabiq Orbit platform supports Shariah-compliant private market investments, ensuring robust and efficient processes.

Our Team

Our team comprises experts in Islamic banking, finance, and project management with extensive experience in Shariah consultancy, advisory, audit, screening, and investments.

Join us in pioneering Shariah-compliant financial solutions and driving innovation in the Islamic finance industry.

Name: R2 Breeding Solutions
Description:
Our future depends on a sustainable production of plant based food, feed and fuel, which requires efficient improvement of crops through plant breeding. With stagnating yield gains, shrinking profit margins, and a climate that is rapidly changing, it is more important than ever that crop breeding programs can deliver successful varieties while keeping costs under control.

Breeders today have access to an unprecedented array of data-intensive genomic and phenomic methods, as well as powerful analytic and simulation platforms. Yet, understanding how to use these tools in practical breeding with all its inevitable real-world constraints - biological, logistical, and financial - requires expertise and experience. And, after 15+ years of developing and managing cost-efficient prediction-based breeding programs in a range of crops, this is exactly what R2 Breeding Solutions provides.

Our vision is simple: to make the power of data-driven predictive breeding accessible to any breeding program regardless of size, budget, or crop. Whether you are a major company with global reach, or a smaller business serving a regional market we can find a solution that fits your needs

Do you want to increase your gain without breaking your budget? We help you do that!
Get in touch at letstalk@rsqrsolutions.com

Name: Child Nutrition Solutions, LLC
Description:
You know that feeling, where nothing is going right? You have staff callouts, milk is late, an oven breaks down and it’s not even 7 am yet!

Well, we do. 

We’ve been in your shoes and it’s not easy. There is a reason, there is a dedicated day for school lunch heroes. 

We’re Christine and Mary, two “lunch ladies” who lived it and lived to tell about it. Our experience has been vast and diverse. Having worked in school districts, large and small, and state agencies, we’ve seen it all. 

After many convos about the struggles, challenges, and disruptors in our jobs, the common theme, no matter, the job, was that our “superheroes” needed more solutions to make the job easier. 

Through experience, experimentation, and many tears, we discovered techniques, methods, and best practices that worked! 

So now, we are long-term colleagues turned friends, turned business partners that want to share this knowledge with you! 

We believe that the passion for these programs has kept us and many people in this industry. Professionals, who want to provide students with the most nutritious and delicious foods while developing a community of ‘superheroes’ who battle against all challenges and never miss a beat.

Name: DS Consultancy Group
Description:
DSC provides services in the realm of Project Controls, to both contractors and owners; we provide creative, innovative, and efficient solutions customized to meet and exceed all the project controls needs for your project, agency or corporation.

We pride ourselves on having a thorough working knowledge of the requirements for most capital projects, which combined with our technical expertise, allows us to tailor Project Controls processes that will give the required vision to complete your project on time and under budget.

Our services include but are not limited to, CPM schedule analysis and oversight, total float management, cash flow forecasting, delay and claim analysis, master integrated scheduling, executive schedule briefing, estimation of change orders (time and cost), and document controls.

We provide on-site support for all Project Controls functions, as well as on-call scheduling support. With our on-call scheduling support, we can either create and manage schedules from baseline to project completion or assist and train your schedulers to excel on their positions – giving you the certainty that your client’s expectations are being met.

Scheduling Services (Online & On-Site) 

CPM Schedule Analysis & Oversight
-Preliminary, Initial, Baseline, Periodic Updates, Progress Evaluation, Completion Status Monitoring

Total Float Management
-Float Path Analysis to Identify and Prioritize Most Critical Work, Float Trending, Variance

Executive Schedule Briefings
-Presentation Quality Schedule Materials and Graphics to Brief Senior Leadership and Executives

Delay and Claim Analysis
-Fragmented Networks (Fragnets), Time Impact Analysis (TIA), Prospective Analysis, Project Acceleration, Early Completion, Extension of Time (EoT)

Cash Flow Forecasting
-S‐Curves, Schedule Variance Control (SVC) Diagrams, Placement Projections, Incremental Funding Tracking

CPM Construction Scheduling Training

At AIDA, we believe no child is “average.” 
Every student carries potential — not just to pass exams, but to thrive with purpose. 
Yet, most educational systems aren’t built to meet learners where they are. 
That’s where AIDA steps in — not as a tuition centre, but as a mentorship ecosystem.

AIDA: Academy of Excellence was born out of one simple question: What if learning was personal again?

Since then, we've walked alongside 1500+ students and 20+ schools with one promise: to mentor with care, clarity, and consistency.
Our Signature Programmes:
1. Brilliance Blueprint – Academic mentorship for Grades 1–10 with custom EOC Concept Check Sheets, real-time feedback, and school-aligned learning plans.
2. Career Companion+ – A full-circle career guidance journey for Grades 8–12, including psychometric testing, stream mapping, mentoring, and a personalised toolkit.
3. Pathways – End-to-end study abroad guidance that supports students from intent to interview across global destinations.
4. Ascend – Dynamic training for teachers and school leaders, combining pedagogy, leadership, and parent engagement.
5. School Impact Lab – Strategic consultancy for schools with CCCIS implementation, curriculum audits, and system design.
6. Family Flourish – Parent workshops and toolkits that empower homes to support academic and emotional development.

We’ve helped:
- Turn failing grades into board distinctions
- Guide confused teens to confident career decisions
- Equip teachers to teach with strategy, not just survival
- Help schools transform chaos into culture
- Support parents feeling lost in their child’s journey

If you're a parent, school, or student looking for more than just marks — AIDA is your partner.

AIDA isn’t a tuition centre. It’s a movement — mentoring minds, guiding futures, and transforming schools with care, clarity, and confidence. 
If your child or school deserves more than the ordinary, we’re ready to walk the journey with you.

Disruption only sometimes starts with a negative. And, when managed appropriately, disruption is not necessarily a bad thing.
We serve our clients by providing analytical and operational support that they will apply to increase their resilience to disruption, regardless of its cause.
We must be open, honest, and direct with our clients, people, and partners.
That integrity, whether in assessing the current situation or applying our experience and expertise, is the ultimate measure of our worth.

Name: GTM Base
Description:
For post-PMF B2B companies sitting on valuable data they're not using.

Your CRM is messy. Your systems are disjointed. Your reps spend hours on manual research instead of selling.

You have first-party data: CRM records, product usage, acquisition databases.
You have access to third-party data: public business data, funding news, job changes, hiring announcements.

But you're not leveraging any of it—while competitors turn the same data into advantages.

We transform your data into strategic GTM assets.

Through three layers:

→ Data Foundation
We audit and structure your first-party data, identify valuable third-party signals, then enrich everything with agentic custom research and 100+ data sources. The result: context-rich data in your CRM, ready to scale.

→ Systems Infrastructure
We build the right GTM infrastructure—selecting tools, designing workflows, and building automations specific to your context. From lead routing and account scoring to ABM, multichannel sequences, and smart automations. The result: systems built for scalable growth.

→ GTM Plays
The right play, to the right audience, at the right time—fueled by your data and systems. We leverage our library of 100+ proven plays, customized to your specific context. The result: pipeline without adding headcount.

Name: NOEL. Mittelstandsberatung
Description:
NOEL. ist eine Unternehmens- und Digitalberatung für kleine und mittlere Unternehmen in Oberfranken, deren Hauptaugenmerk darauf ausgerichtet ist, der heimischen Wirtschaft den Rücken zu stärken. 

Die Schwerpunkte liegen hierbei im Finanzmanagement, der Digitalisierung von Unternehmensprozessen sowie der Stabilisierung während kritischer Unternehmensphasen. 

Aufgabe ist es, Unternehmen dabei zu unterstützen, ihre Potenziale zu entfalten, Herausforderungen zu meistern und nachhaltiges, aber vor allem gesundes Wachstum zu erzielen. 

Mit einem engagierten Team von Experten bietet NOEL. maßgeschneiderte Beratungsdienstleistungen, um individuelle Ziele zu erreichen.

Dabei steht das vertrauensvolle Agieren auf Augenhöhe von Beginn an im Vordergrund. Unterstützung bedarfsgerecht, pragmatisch sowie operativ und strategisch anzubieten gehört zum Leistungsversprechen von NOEL.

Durch eine sehr klare Kommunikation und eine hohe Transparenz schafft das Team dabei von Beginn an eine vertrauensvolle Basis für alle beteiligten Stakeholder.

Oberste Prämisse ist immer eine mittel- und langfristig ausgelegte positive Entwicklung. 

Kernbestandteil während der Beratungen ist es, Wissen weiterzugeben, Unternehmen besser zu machen, Arbeitsplätze zu sichern und neue zu schaffen.

Gemeinsam interpretieren wir mit Ihnen die Realität und analysieren Chancen und Risiken.

Damit der Mittelstand auch in Zukunft eine Chance hat.

Name: Wastewater Microbiology Solutions
Description:
Led by Toni Glymph-Martin, Wastewater Microbiology Solutions is a premier resource for understanding the complex microbiological ecosystem that exists in Wastewater, as well as how this information can be utilized in order to transform and optimize your Wastewater Treatment Processes.

Our services include Microscopic Analyses, In-depth Training Courses, and Compliance and Control Consultations with Toni.

As a wastewater microbiologist and certified operator who has spent more than 40 years working, teaching, and researching in the field of wastewater microbiology, Toni has gained considerable knowledge of  wastewater treatment design and operation. She has gained international recognition as an expert in her field, receiving numerous awards for her work, including:

- The State of Wisconsin John C. Brogan Award for Outstanding Environmental Achievement in assisting operators to achieve and maintain compliance of treatment system requirements.

- The USEPA National “Spark Plug Award” for Operator Trainers presented to the person or group that is at the forefront of the Operator Training Program and has made positive things happen to ensure the program’s continuation.

- The prestigious George Bernauer Award -- the highest honor awarded by the Wastewater Operators Association. Toni was selected for her efforts in training and assisting wastewater treatment plant professionals with troubleshooting and optimizing wastewater treatment plant performance.

- 2014 IWEA Laboratory Analyst Excellence Award to acknowledge an individual for outstanding performance, professionalism, and contributions to the water quality analyses profession

to name a few. Throughout her career, Toni has consistently been recognized as an excellent teacher with the ability to forge meaningful connections with her audiences, as she has travelled the country teaching wastewater treatment courses for the U.S. Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) and other state and national organizations.

Name: The Forge Advisory
Description:
At Forge Advisory, we don’t do corporate theater.
Businesses don’t need another glossy deck or a consultant who hides behind buzzwords. What they need is clarity, accountability, and momentum — and that’s what we deliver.

Too many companies stall out because:
• Everyone “helps” with operations, but no one owns it.
• Leaders avoid conflict because they want to be liked.
• Employees stay silent, not out of agreement, but because they’re calculating the cost of speaking up.
• Standards are unclear, so teams default to compliance instead of commitment.

We fix that.

Reset Sprints: 4–6 weeks of direct operational intervention. We step in, tackle the biggest problems fast, stabilize processes, and align the workforce. By the third week, sharper focus and momentum are visible across the floor.

Fractional Leadership: Not every business needs (or can afford) a full-time VP of Operations. We embed as fractional leaders, bringing structure, discipline, and scalable systems without unnecessary layers of bureaucracy.

Interim Executive Support: Hiring for Director/VP of Operations? Instead of paying recruiters to hand over resumes, we fill the leadership gap while helping identify, vet, and onboard the right long-term hire. That means immediate stability and a stronger future leader.

Who we are: Forge Advisory is built on decades of operational leadership — turning small and mid-sized businesses into scalable, efficient, people-first organizations. Our team includes industrial and process engineers, commercial project managers, and industry-specific specialists we tailor to each client’s unique needs. We don’t just advise; we embed expertise directly where it matters most.

Here’s what we believe:
• Titles don’t build accountability — clarity does.
• Culture isn’t a ping pong table — it’s shared values and behaviors.
• A stable, respected workforce outpaces any capital investment.

Description:
We are a consulting firm that provides comprehensive training and risk mitigation/suppression investigative services to sports organizations, law firms, and law enforcement entities. 

There are 3 broad areas in which we can help:

1)	Training: Educational outreach for athletes/team personnel as a resource for existing Player Development programs or as an organization's new Player Development programming. We assist and supplement player development initiatives to help players and team personnel avoid common serious pitfalls before problems arise by providing training on issues like legal problems, financial dangers, professionalism, leadership and followership, continuing education, career development and networking, handling media and social media, mental health, and family.

For law firms, we provide comprehensive trial advocacy trainings.

For law enforcement entities, we provide training on a host of constitutional and practical policing issues.

2)	Confidential proactive “red flag” investigations for sports teams' personnel decision-makers. We perform in-depth investigations into issues surrounding potential future acquisitions that help personnel decisionmakers to understand where problems and issues might be before they arise and before they make those decisions that can drain an organization of financial or roster-related resources.

3)	Confidential reactive investigations for organizational leadership. We help sports organizational leadership to comprehensively understand existing problems or issues so that they can make better informed decisions about current personnel and procedures in a manner that helps them avoid or mitigate potential personnel, legal and PR crises.

With an award-winning federal prosecutor as CEO and almost two dozen decorated former agents from FBI, ATF, DEA, and other law enforcement agencies as affiliated members, the collective experience of our personnel numbers in the hundreds of years.

Naše chráněná dílna se specializuje na zaměstnávání osob se zdravotním postižením, přičemž zajišťujeme kompletní proces náboru a výběru vhodných OZP uchazečů. Poskytujeme přátelské pracovní prostředí a pomáháme začlenit tyto jedince do pracovního procesu.

Chráněná dílna je specifický druh pracoviště, které poskytuje zaměstnání osobám se zdravotním postižením. Jedná se o koncept, který vznikl za účelem integrace lidí s různými druhy zdravotního postižení do pracovního procesu a společnosti jako takové. V chráněných dílnách se tyto osoby mohou zapojit do produktivní činnosti, přičemž je jim poskytována adekvátní podpora a přizpůsobené pracovní prostředí, které zohledňuje jejich specifické potřeby.

30+ Jahre Führungserfahrung in komplexen Situationen

Wenn es intern knirscht, Ressourcen fehlen oder Entscheidungen vertagt werden. Ich komme nicht erst, wenn alles brennt – sondern dann, wenn man spürt: So wie bisher kann es nicht weitergehen.

Aqui na Negócios de Alto Valor, nossa missão é simples, mas poderosa: guiar você na jornada para transformar sua visão em resultados concretos e impactantes. Não se trata apenas de aumentar o faturamento, mas de construir uma empresa com propósito, que gere valor real para clientes, colaboradores e para o mercado.

Muitos empreendedores se sentem sobrecarregados, sem um mapa claro para o sucesso sustentável. E eu entendo perfeitamente essa sensação. O caminho para o alto valor exige clareza, estratégia e, acima de tudo, uma mentalidade que não se contenta com o mediano.

Nós acreditamos que seu negócio pode ir muito além. Por isso, compartilhamos insights práticos, ferramentas acionáveis e as estratégias que realmente funcionam para elevar o nível da sua atuação. Pense: sua empresa está preparada para ser uma referência no seu segmento? Você está atraindo os talentos certos e os clientes ideais?

Nossa abordagem é direta, sem enrolação, focada no que você precisa fazer para gerar resultados exponenciais. Queremos que você pare de apagar incêndios e comece a construir um legado. Afinal, um negócio de alto valor é aquele que não apenas fatura alto, mas que também entrega um impacto significativo.

Se você busca mais do que o comum, se deseja transformar sua paixão em um empreendimento verdadeiramente próspero e relevante, então você está no lugar certo. Conecte-se conosco, acompanhe nossas publicações e prepare-se para elevar o padrão do seu negócio.

O futuro do seu empreendimento começa com as escolhas que você faz hoje. Vamos juntos construir um caminho de sucesso e propósito!

Description:

Helping Veterans Navigate the World of Franchises, One Step at a Time

As a U.S. Army Desert Storm veteran and the founder of Harriman Solution Group LLC, I understand the unique challenges veterans face when transitioning into civilian business ownership. My journey through franchise ownership has been marked by determination, resilience, and a commitment to finding sustainable success in a new venture. Through trial, error, and expert advice, I’ve come to appreciate both the triumphs and the pitfalls that come with starting a franchise business.

My mission is simple: help veterans looking for financial freedom, career flexibility, and the satisfaction of business ownership—especially through franchising. Through my own experience and network, I share practical, no-nonsense advice on franchise opportunities, financing options (like SBA loans and grants for veterans), and the critical questions to ask before signing a franchise agreement. I’m here to support fellow veterans by sharing insights from my journey, so they can start on a stronger footing and grow toward long-term success.

What I Offer:

Real-life insights on franchise ownership from a veteran's perspective
Guidance on finding the right franchise fit based on your background and goals
Step-by-step advice on securing financing, negotiating agreements, and avoiding common pitfalls
A focus on veteran-friendly franchises that align with flexible, semi-absentee ownership for those balancing work or family commitments
Connect with me if you’re exploring the world of franchise ownership or seeking veteran-focused guidance on starting a business. Together, we’ll turn the challenges of entrepreneurship into rewarding opportunities.

JLS Engineering Concepts LLC is a premier engineering consulting firm providing innovative solutions in Equipment Procurement, Quality Management, Industrial & Design Engineering (Material Handling Systems), Warranty Engineering and Field Quality Support Services, and Specialized Delivery Services. Backed by over 25 years of hands-on industry experience, we serve manufacturing, government, and healthcare sectors with technical precision, compliance, and dependable service.
Our services include:

1. Equipment Procurement for Federal & State Agencies
JLS provides complete procurement solutions for government and commercial operations. From project planning and sourcing to contract compliance and timely delivery, we support replacement parts, capital equipment, and facility upgrades with efficiency and reliability.

2. Warranty Engineering and Field Quality Support Services
JLS Engineering Concepts offers a specialized Warranty Engineering & Field Quality Support services designed to help OEMs and Tier 1 suppliers reduce warranty costs, resolve field issues faster, and enhance product reliability. Our services include returned part analysis, root cause investigation, warranty data analytics, field campaign coordination, and DFMEA integration.

3. Industrial & Design Engineering (Material Handling Systems)
We specialize in layout development, flow analysis, and AutoCAD-based drafting for optimized material handling. Our engineering support includes conveyors, AFTs, tuggers, forklifts, and manual handling systems customized for logistics, manufacturing, and government operations.

4. Specialized Delivery Services (Including Hot Shot Delivery)
JLS offers secure, on-demand delivery of prototypes, tooling, medical equipment and contract materials. Our cargo van and Hot Shot delivery services are DOT-compliant and ideal for urgent, high-value shipments. We serve Manufacturing, Medical, and Government clients with professional handling and precise, time-sensitive transport.

Name: Casseday Clinical Consulting
Description:
Casseday Clinical Consulting bridges the gap between sponsors CROs by helping small biotechnology and biopharmaceutical sponsors fulfil their regulatory obligations for oversight of clinical trials both in the US and abroad. 

By bringing together highly experienced professionals, CCC provides a “plug and play” drug development team that can be right-sized to fit your needs as a sponsor. Structured with flexibility in mind, we provide the customized solution you need to move your clinical trials forward. 

Per the US Code of Federal Regulations, sponsor oversight in clinical trials is required to ensure patient safety and well-being, protection of patients’ rights,  trial data integrity, reliability of study results, and trial conduct in accordance with good clinical practice and regulatory expectations. A further principle described in ICH E6(R3) addresses sponsor responsibility for activities when delegated, that such delegation should be clearly documented, and that the sponsor retains oversight of delegated responsibilities.  While these facets are widely accepted in the industry, many companies do not have sufficient in-house expertise or resources to oversee third-party vendors.

This is where we can help!

Specializing in early phase drug development, CCC helps you provide oversight of:
- Project and Trial management
- Vendor selection, management and contract negotiation
- Investigational product supply and distribution
- Protocol review, trial design and endpoint selection
- Clinical Site monitoring 
- Medical monitoring/CMO Services
- DSMB/SRC setup
- Data Management 
- Biostatistics and Statistical analysis 
- Medical writing 
- Regulatory affairs and execution 
- Quality systems 

CCC is also present on SAM.gov capable of supporting studies funded by government grants, including NIH sponsored studies.

Name: Pilot Consultations & Marine Services L.L.C
Description:
Pilot Consultation & Marine Services, based in Abu Dhabi, UAE, specializes in delivering top-tier marine inspection and consultation services tailored for the marine and offshore industries. Our expertise spans IMCA-certified inspections of commercial surface supplied air diving systems and comprehensive marine vessel assessments, ensuring safety, reliability, and regulatory compliance aligned with international standards.

We pride ourselves on conducting thorough inspections, function tests, and vessel condition evaluations, assisting clients with class diving notation and overseeing vessels through building, rebuild, and major repair phases. Our services also include bunker fuel quality and quantity inspections, eCMID inspections up to IMCA marine division requirements, and pre-hire vessel surveys, all aimed at safeguarding operational excellence and environmental responsibility.

Our team of certified and experienced professionals uphold the highest levels of quality, safety, and professionalism, empowered by our ISO 9001:2015 certification and industry-leading accreditations. We are committed to providing actionable insights that empower our clients to make informed, confident decisions, emphasizing quality management, occupational health, and environmental sustainability.

At Pilot Consultation, we seek to be the UAE and regional leader in marine inspection services, delivering precise and reliable inspection reports that contribute to the safety, compliance, and success of our clients’ operations. Partner with us to navigate your marine business towards unparalleled safety and operational excellence.

Contact us for premium marine inspection and consultation services that meet and exceed your expectations.
