La mission aziendale è quella di offrire servizi idonei a valorizzare le attività istituzionali dei fondi pensione, contribuendo a fornire l’assistenza per la corretta e adeguata implementazione dei modelli organizzativi e di governance e dei processi di gestione dei rischi.
ELLEGI Consulenza S.p.A., nata su iniziativa di soggetti che hanno ricoperto negli anni importanti incarichi nell’ambito delle istituzioni preposte al governo ed al controllo delle forme pensionistiche complementari, è leader di mercato per lo svolgimento della Funzione di Compliance e Controllo Interno nei Fondi Pensione Contrattuali. Nell’anno 2016 è stata insignita del “Premio Awards 2016 - Pensioni e Welfare Italia” come Fornitore di Servizi di Internal Auditing dell’anno.

Vous souhaitez résoudre une problématique, trouver une solution technique, organisationnelle, un besoin de ressource en expertise complémentaire à vos équipes, permettant de dévoiler de nouvelles solutions...un projet d’industrialisation, d’amélioration.
Comme beaucoup de manager, de dirigeant, vous manquez de temps dans le quotidien, vous n’abandonnez pas ces sujets, vous les travaillez, au coup par coup, ou pire les « reportez » consciemment (ou non) ainsi que les actions qui devraient être engagées.
Vous êtes éligible au CONSULT'OP !
L’objectif ?
Proposer l’offre de AMO-Iⓔ : 
• Vous écoutez, pour satisfaire votre besoin, mais aussi pour respecter vos valeurs, votre vision, et conserver l’identité de votre société.
• Vous délester de tâches, qui bien que ponctuelles sont chronophages, 
• Vous permettre d’agir et progresser maintenant, avec l’apport de solutions pragmatiques, ou expertises adaptées à votre situation, 
Comment ? 
Prenons contact : l.massavie@amo-ie.fr ou au 06 17 34 50 54 et voyons ensemble comment nous pouvons collaborer et satisfaire vos besoins, ainsi que ceux à naître.

Description:

Services we offer include, but are not limited to:

_Perform due diligence in foreign real estate acquisition & develop budget of property acquisition
_Provide real estate data for each country of the world to determine attractiveness of markets abroad
_Research Top Real Estate Agencies in all countries of the world to continuously aggregate database
_Pairing international buyers with verified international agencies, agents, lawyers, attorneys
_Ensuring clients are being quoted a fair market value for properties abroad

Name: Make My Year
Description:
Make My Year  Explorer le monde & se créer le sien

Dans un monde en constante évolution, où la diversité culturelle et l'ouverture d'esprit sont des compétences clés, Make My Year se distingue par son approche sur mesure pour accompagner les jeunes dès 15 ans dans leur exploration du monde et d'eux-mêmes.

 Une initiative novatrice pour un développement global : Make My Year offre un large éventail d'expériences à l'étranger et d'ateliers interculturels, adaptés aux jeunes et jeunes adultes. Conçus en fonction de leur âge, niveau linguistique, envies et budget, nos parcours et notre accompagnement personnalisé aident à renforcer la confiance en soi, développer des compétences nouvelles, et bâtir un avenir personnel et professionnel en adéquation avec leurs aspirations.

 Un accompagnement personnalisé pour chaque parcours

Pour les parents : Make My Year propose des opportunités pour initier leurs enfants dès 15 ans à la richesse de l'interculturel, du voyage et de l'apprentissage de l'anglais.

Pour les jeunes : Que ce soit pour une année de césure, un séjour linguistique, un pied dans le monde professionnel, ou encore pour s'engager dans une cause qui leur tient à cœur à l'étranger, nous construisons sur mesure l'aventure à l'étranger qui leur correspond tout en assurant un accompagnement personnalisé tout au long de la période à l'étranger.

Pour les établissements d'enseignement supérieur privés et universités : Nous collaborons avec les écoles et universités souhaitant enrichir leur offre de mobilité à l'international avec des parcours internationaux innovants.

Pour en savoir + rendez-vous sur le lien URL !

Description:
The purpose of the VDTB association is to promote and support the common interests of its members, which consist of diving and salvage companies and related businesses.

The following tasks are carried out for this purpose:
- Acting as a central point of contact for companies, authorities, private individuals and others.
- Examination and compilation of topic-specific information for dissemination to interested parties in cooperation with, for example, the Chamber of Industry and Commerce, employers' liability insurance association (BG), etc. - in particular with regard to the topics of further education, training and safety
- Co-operation with other groups working in related fields and representation of the German diving and salvage industry in contacts with government, authorities and scientific institutions (e.g. marine technology, research, ...)
- Cooperation with national and European associations and organisations, also with the involvement of members
- Reviewing and negotiating potential contracts with various organisations that are of interest to members
- Compiling and producing specialist articles, giving interviews etc. and publishing them.

Effiziente Fabrikplanung:

Wir bieten Lösungen zur Verbesserung der Infrastruktur in Industriegebieten, um den Materialfluss und die Logistik zu optimieren.

Nachhaltige Arealentwicklung: 
Unsere Projekte zielen darauf ab, Industrieflächen nachhaltig zu entwickeln und umweltfreundliche Lösungen zu integrieren.

Kosteneffizienz: 
Wir maximieren die Effizienz in der Fabrikplanung, um Bau- und Betriebskosten zu minimieren.

Technologieintegration: 
Wir nutzen fortschrittliche Technologien wie 3D-Modellierung und Simulation, um Planungsprozesse zu verbessern.

Umweltschutz: 
Wir setzen auf umweltfreundliche Baupraktiken und nachhaltige Energiequellen, um die Umweltauswirkungen zu minimieren.

Flexibilität und Anpassungsfähigkeit: 
Unsere Lösungen sind flexibel und anpassbar, um sich den sich ändernden Anforderungen des Marktes anzupassen.

Sicherheit und Compliance: 
Wir legen höchsten Wert auf Sicherheit und gewährleisten die Einhaltung aller relevanten Vorschriften und Normen.

Name: BOOST ALTERNANCE
Description:
Trouver une alternance, ce n’est pas de la chance. C’est une méthode.

Boost Alternance, c’est une histoire de terrain.
Une initiative née de jeunes en master commerce, stratégie et marketing qui en ont eu marre de voir leurs potes galérer à trouver une entreprise.

On a connu les CV sans réponse, les entretiens qui tombent à l’eau et les promesses jamais tenues.
Alors on a décidé de créer l’agence et la communauté qu’on aurait aimé rencontrer quand on cherchait notre alternance.

 Notre mission :
Simplifier la recherche d’alternance pour les étudiants et faciliter le recrutement pour les entreprises, tout en créant un réseau d’entraide et d’opportunités.

 Ce qu’on fait :

-On accompagne les étudiants dans leur prospection (CV, pitch, mindset, IA, entretiens).

-On connecte les entreprises locales avec des profils motivés.

-On collabore avec les CFA et écoles partenaires pour booster les placements.

-On anime une communauté active : alternants, formateurs et recruteurs partagent conseils, offres et retours d’expérience.

 Notre différence :
On est à la fois la nouvelle génération et des experts du terrain.
Pas de jargon RH, pas de blabla institutionnel : juste du concret, de l’action et des résultats.

 Notre approche :
Une méthode humaine et digitale, qui combine prospection, storytelling et IA.
Chaque contact devient une opportunité, chaque candidature une stratégie.

 Notre vision :
Trouver une alternance, ce n’est pas un hasard.
C’est une stratégie. Et ça commence ici.

BOOST ALTERNANCE — Créé par des alternants, devenu une communauté qui s’entraide, partage et fait bouger les lignes.

Name: f²m Consulting
Description:
A f²m Consulting nasceu de uma inquietação pessoal: como transformar erros e acertos de uma trajetória executiva em aprendizados que realmente ajudem outras empresas a crescer de forma estruturada?

Depois de mais de 15 anos atuando em Supply Chain e Operações em setores críticos, percebi que muitas empresas de médio porte e start-ups em expansão geralmente se deparam com a mesma encruzilhada: o que as trouxe até aqui não é suficiente para levá-las adiante.

É justamente nesse ponto que a f²m atua, focada em Gestão Operacional e Supply Chain, trabalhando em conjunto com os times internos para que o conhecimento seja transferido e os resultados sustentados.

Mais do que estudos e recomendações, conduzimos a jornada completa — do real entendimento da operação até a transformação efetiva. Com método, técnica e execução assertiva, apoiamos empresários e gestores a estruturar processos, redesenhar operações, implantar governança e desenvolver pessoas, sempre com foco em resultados sustentáveis.

Nossos serviços incluem, mas não se limitam a:

- Projetos de eficiência e performance;
- Iniciativas de redução de custos e melhoria de nível de serviço;
- Implantação de governança, processos e controles;
- Suporte em sourcing, inovação e integração de tecnologias.

Com base prática, experiência executiva e visão de futuro, nosso propósito é simples: entender para transformar e deixar um legado de excelência operacional.

Vamos conversar?

Mande uma mensagem aqui no LinkedIn, um e-mail para fabio@f2mconsulting.com.br, ou acesse o link a seguir e marque um horário com a gente: http://bit.ly/4gXA3xb.

Nossas frentes de atuação:

 Gestão de Compras por Demanda
Assumimos o processo de ponta a ponta, desde a análise da necessidade até a negociação e entrega. Indicamos fornecedores qualificados, garantimos melhores condições e acompanhamos todo o fluxo.

 Estruturação de Processos e Treinamento
Ajudamos sua empresa a montar um processo de compras eficiente, organizar fornecedores, criar controles e treinar a equipe com boas práticas e métodos de negociação.

Acreditamos que a compra certa é um dos caminhos mais rápidos para aumentar a lucratividade de qualquer negócio.

Se sua empresa ainda não tem uma área de compras estruturada ou precisa comprar com mais estratégia, conte com a SoluCompras.

Name: Nadlanitaly
Description:
As a company specializing in real estate brokerage and consulting in Israel for many years (originally from Rome, Italy), we have been dreaming of purchasing a property for both vacation and investment purposes.

After conducting private research on real estate investments in Italy and choosing the northern Lazio region,  South West Tuscany and west Umbria we started receiving inquiries from many friends and family members who also wanted to buy property. Gradually, we began providing advisory services for purchases in our area of Italy (Rome and northward).

We chose this region due to its proximity to the large city of Rome, the city where we grew up and love, and also because we found accessible business opportunities that made the deal viable and attractive.

So, what do we offer?

First, we will introduce you to the region, the prices, the business opportunities, and the lifestyle. As experienced and well-connected real estate professionals, we will then assist you in identifying the property that best fits your requirements, considering all the relevant parameters.

Our services include close guidance through the various processes of property search and acquisition, including help with opening a bank account, renovation, and maintenance. We can also offer the option to rent out the property for short or long-term periods after the purchase. Above all, we not only introduce you to the region and its business potential, but we also provide a simulation of the returns and the business viability for each transaction.

We will be there with you, ensuring that you receive a fair price for the property, and that the asked amounts are accurate and reasonable. We will be your representatives, providing you with peace of mind in Hebrew and professional support for all aspects related to the property purchase. We can also provide you with recommendations and comprehensive information on all the topics related to the purchase, renovation, and management of the property.

Welcome to Peak Productivity, a lean consulting business that helps organizations optimize their operations to achieve peak performance.

At Peak Productivity, we believe that every organization has the potential to achieve greatness. That's why we work with businesses of all sizes and industries to streamline their processes and operations using the lean methodology. Our customized, innovative solutions deliver measurable results that drive sustainable growth.

Our team of experienced consultants brings a wealth of expertise in lean methodologies, process improvement, and change management. We're committed to working in partnership with our clients to deliver results-driven solutions that are tailored to their unique needs and objectives.

We specialize in a wide range of services, including lean process improvement, value stream mapping, waste elimination, problem-solving, and operational excellence. Whether you're looking to improve efficiency, reduce costs, or enhance quality, we have the skills and expertise to help you achieve your goals.

At Peak Productivity, we're passionate about what we do, and we're committed to delivering exceptional results for our clients. If you're looking to take your organization's performance to the next level, we would love to hear from you. Contact us today to schedule a consultation and see how we can help you achieve peak productivity.

Name: Audiencia Primero
Description:
Sabemos que un negocio exitoso se debe al conocimiento de su mercado.

Por tal motivo, conocer muy bien a tu audiencia te ayudará a crear el mayor valor posible para, no solamente conectar con ellos, sino ofrecerles soluciones de lo que más necesitan: Tu producto o servicio diseñado a la medida de tus clientes.

Te ayudamos a ti como profesionista emprendedor o empresario a descubrir cómo atraer, convertir y fidelizar clientes para escalar tu negocio hacia un modelo de Negocio de Alto Valor.

* Emprender desde cero:

Partimos del hecho que la mejor forma de validar tu negocio sin invertir grandes sumas de dinero es aprendiendo a desarrollar y descubrir las problematicas de tu mercado para ofrecerles un producto o servicio acorde a sus necesidades.

Serás capaz de desarrollar una audiencia y monetizarla, teniendo una ruta clara para validar tu idea de negocio.

Podrás crear un proyecto o negocio que sea para ti, que encaje contigo, que haga un match perfecto entre tu, tus conocimientos y habilidades, asumiendo conscientemente los riesgos que puedas administrar.

* Lanzar un producto o servicio:
Si ya tienes un producto en desarrollo o validado, la mejor forma de monetizar tu audiencia es lanzarlo al mercado.

Para ello, usaremos la metodología de Formula de Lanzamiento para llegar a los resultados esperados.

Serás capaz de crear un modelo de negocio y una escalera de valor apta para tu propósito de transformación masiva.

* Escalar un negocio:

Cuando tienes ventas, y un producto validado, tienes la posibilidad de duplicar tus ingresos.

Conocer el comportamiento de tu audiencia, es decir, de tus clientes, te ayudará a descubrir la mejor forma de rentabilizar y potenciar tu negocio.

Serás capaz de crear experiencias únicas y diferenciadoras para tus clientes a través de tus diferentes equipos, logrando así mejores cierres de venta y de atención post-venta.

Podrás crear lanzamientos digitales que te mantengan generando ingresos constantemente.

Name: Sociální podnik NewCare
Description:
Naše chráněná dílna se specializuje na zaměstnávání osob se zdravotním postižením, přičemž zajišťujeme kompletní proces náboru a výběru vhodných OZP uchazečů. Poskytujeme přátelské pracovní prostředí a pomáháme začlenit tyto jedince do pracovního procesu.

Chráněná dílna je specifický druh pracoviště, které poskytuje zaměstnání osobám se zdravotním postižením. Jedná se o koncept, který vznikl za účelem integrace lidí s různými druhy zdravotního postižení do pracovního procesu a společnosti jako takové. V chráněných dílnách se tyto osoby mohou zapojit do produktivní činnosti, přičemž je jim poskytována adekvátní podpora a přizpůsobené pracovní prostředí, které zohledňuje jejich specifické potřeby.

Name: Samthan Shedge
Description:
Samthan Shedge – Redefining Clean Seas & Sustainable Aquaculture

At Samthan Shedge, we deliver cutting-edge, chemical-free solutions for biofouling and biosecurity control across the marine and aquaculture industries.

As the exclusive dealer for ultrasonic antifouling devices (made in the USA) in Scandinavia and exclusive retailer for Europe, we guarantee measurable, sustainable results for any kinds and size of ships, vessels, oil & gas platforms, and aquaculture systems of every scale.

Our ultrasonic systems prevent algae, barnacles, and biofilm formation — improving efficiency, reducing maintenance, and protecting marine ecosystems. In aquaculture, we provide innovative technologies to control biofilm, bacteria, fungi, and algae, ensuring healthier fish and cleaner water without chemicals.

Samthan Shedge bridges marine science and technology to promote a cleaner, smarter blue-green economy.

We collaborate with research institutions and industry partners across Europe to advance non-chemical biosecurity, antifouling, and fish health innovation.

Sustainable. Smart. Proven.
We protect what powers the world — the ocean.

Name: Elevate & Align Co.
Description:
━━━━━━━━━━━
PROBLEM AREAS

CEO’s, CFO’s, Board of Directors, Operations Executives:
If something “feels off” in your business, you can’t shake the feeling of something must change if you are going to the next level, or if sh!t is just hitting the fan – it’s time for us to talk about it.
Do these 4 trouble areas resonate with you?
If so, reach out:  heather@heatherodonnell.llc

b.	Strategic
i.	Competitive Edge
•	Trouble maintaining a competitive edge in a crowded marketplace?
•	Unsure what markets need what you’re offering?
ii.	Talent Acquisition/Retention
•	High turnover?
•	Teams not cohesive and cross-functional?
•	Lack of appropriate leadership?
Businesses should be viewed with a “teaching hospital” mentality.
•	Is your HR team robotic?
Did they forget the “human” part of their title?
Do your recruiters really understand the position functions and the right personalities that may fit them?
c.	Operational 
i.	Supply Chain Disruptions
•	Supplier relationships damaged?
•	Bottlenecks, shortages, cost increases affecting production?
•	Issues within Sourcing, Procurement, Purchasing, Inventory, Quality, Warehousing, or Logistics?
ii.	Cost Control
•	AP/AR issues?
•	Money loss due to unintentional mismanagement?
(You don’t have time to educate everyone on cost accountability).

iii.	Inefficiencies
•	Lack of productivity and process?
•	Missed deadlines and targets?
•	Are your ERP systems aligned with the plan?  Is there a formidable plan?

iv.	Risk Management
Let’s face it.  Literally everything in business is a risk.
•	Safety Issues?
•	Do you have documented processes to minimize your business risk?
Or … is your business still functioning from undocumented employee tribal knowledge?  Talk about risk … 

d.	Company-wide Communication
My motto: “We don’t communicate, we over-communicate!” (I learned this from my Dad).  It’s important in supporting cross-functionality in business, too.

e.	Technology 
Still running your company out of spreadsheets?
Location: Raleigh, Durham, Chapel Hill (RTP), North Carolina

We have the important mix of extensive national children’s services experience and crucial social worker expertise, that mesh together to ensure the voices of your children and young people are heard.
Because we understand the numerous important partnerships that need to work together for a robust safeguarding environment, we can be comprehensive, authoritative and detail orientated in finding solutions for your organisation. We bring practical, on the ground knowledge to our work, balanced with encouragement, support and insight.

Safeguarding reviews and investigations

Studio Cecilia | Dr. Cécile Van de Voorde

Siamo in grado di valutare la reale efficienza di un impianto individuando i punti critici e proponendo soluzioni per massimizzare la produzione. Sappiamo riconoscere i punti deboli dei componenti che possono compromettere le prestazioni, valutiamo il rischio incendio e tutti i rischi relativi alla sicurezza del lavoro.
Lavoriamo con passione e il nostro obiettivo è ottenere il massimo dagli impianti rinnovabili riducendo le perdite di produzione per inefficienza e ottimizzando i costi di gestione.
Flo.Ren sviluppa anche nuovi impianti ed esegue Technical Due Diligence di progetti fotovoltaici in fase di sviluppo.
Oltre ai progetti nel rinnovabile, Flo.Ren si occupa di Battery Energy Storage System, di Energy Management e di rimborso delle accise sul gasolio.

Name: DRRC UI
Description:
Disaster Risk Reduction Center (DRRC) atau Pusat Pengurangan Risiko Bencana (PRRB) Universitas Indonesia berdiri sejak tahun 2014 berlandaskan Surat Keputusan Rektor UI Nomor 0140A/SK/R/ UI/2014 yang menyatakan berdirinya Pusat Riset dan Respons Bencana (Disaster Research & Response Center) Universitas Indonesia (DRRC UI) pada tanggal 4 Februari 2014. 

Namun, semenjak keluarnya Surat Keputusan Rektor Universitas Indonesia Nomor 909/SK/R/UI/2020 tentang pembentukan Disaster Risk Reduction Center Universitas Indonesia, Pusat Riset dan Respons Bencana berubah nama menjadi Pusat Pengurangan Risiko Bencana Universitas Indonesia dan ditetapkan sebagai Unit Kerja Khusus Pelayanan dan Pengabdian Masyarakat Fleksibilitas Penuh di Universitas Indonesia.

Unit Kerja Khusus Pelayanan dan Pengabdian Masyarakat Fleksibilitas Penuh (UKK PPM FP) Pusat Pengurangan Risiko Bencana atau Disaster Risk Reduction Center (DRRC) UI merupakan unit kerja yang bergerak dalam bidang pelayanan dan pengabdian masyarakat dalam bidang kebencanaan.

UKK PPM FP DRRC UI diharapkan dapat memberikan layanan terkait kebencanaan, training dan online learning bagi tenaga-tenaga kebencanaan, produk digital jasa dan pelayanan kebencanaan, inovasi-inovasi terkait kebencanaan, konsultasi dan advokasi kebencanaan di Indonesia sekaligus dapat memberikan profit bagi Universitas Indonesia.

DRRC UI membangun kapasitas untuk meningkatkan ketahanan masyarakat, menyelamatkan nyawa dan populasi yang terkena dampak bencana. DRRC melatih para pemimpin, melakukan penelitian, dan berkolaborasi dengan mitra untuk mempromosikan praktik terbaik dalam kesiapsiagaan, respons, pemulihan. Untuk menyelamatkan nyawa, aset berharga, properti, menjaga reputasi perusahaan dan negara, melindungi terjadinya pencemaran lingkungan. Mengelola risiko dan membangun masyarakat yang tangguh melalui Manajemen Bencana dan Manajemen Kelangsungan Bisnis.

Ecco un po’ dei miei traguardi:

•  Nel 2012 sono stato tra i membri fondatori della Nazionale Calcio Amputati, con la quale ho disputato un Mondiale (Messico 2014), un Europeo e diversi tornei internazionali.

•  Nel 2020 ho lanciato “The Right Foot Project- Camminiamo insieme”, portando stampelle e ausili per la mobilità nei paesi più bisognosi.
•  Nel 2021 sono diventato fondatore e Presidente dell’ASD Roma Calcio Amputati, la prima squadra della Capitale nel calcio Amputati
•  Nel 2022 ho coniato la parola “Proabilità”, per proporre un nuovo approccio alla disabilità; a seguito ho fondato l’Academy Proabile la prima società di integrazione sportiva 
•Ho scritto ad oggi 7 libri

Falcon Consulting helps service-based companies scale delivery operations as they grow—without losing control of utilization, margins, or predictability.

Service margins tighten. Forecasting becomes less reliable. Senior leaders spend more time firefighting delivery instead of leading growth.

Today, Falcon Consulting partners with SMB and mid-market service organizations looking to build scalable delivery operations that support growth without constant rework or leadership intervention.

Clarity comes first.

Ready to scale smarter?

Name: Dynamet Insights
Description:
Dynamet is a specialist modelling and process analytics company that helps organisations de-risk, optimise, and accelerate complex process development and operation. 

We develop time-based, data-driven digital models that capture transient system behaviour and support decisions throughout the project lifecycle, from R&D and pilot trials to full-scale operations. Rather than offering off-the-shelf software, we co-develop bespoke models tailored to each client’s data, plant configuration, and business goals.

Our solutions are delivered as consultant-led studies or packaged as user-friendly standalone or web-based tools for secure client use. With more than 80 years of combined project and modelling experience, Dynamet’s collaborative approach ensures tailored, practical results without requiring clients to build in-house modelling expertise.

Core capabilities: 
• Steady-state modelling for conceptual design, feasibility assessment, and process optimisation.
• Dynamic modelling framework capturing real process behaviour and transient dynamics.
• Hybrid modelling that blends first principles physics with data-driven learning for accuracy, speed, and robustness.
• Process simulation integrating laboratory, pilot, or plant data for continuous calibration and validation.
• Flexible, client-specific modelling using proprietary technology within a powerful integrated software environment.
• Collaborative, deployable models that deliver Dynamet’s expertise without software licenses, embed client knowledge, and can be packaged for independent use.

Name: Usideias
Description:
A USIDEIAS - Usina, Ideias e Projetos Ltda - EPP fundada em 1986,  tem como missão "Ser Elo na construção de uma sociedade do Bem-Viver", conceito cunhado a partir da teoria crítica de Alberto Acosta, traduzidos como "vida plena" ou "vida em harmonia", que prioriza o ser humano, a equidade social, a sustentabilidade ambiental e a autodeterminação dos povos. 

O Bem Viver, portanto, sugere uma reorientação das políticas e práticas socioeconômicas para valorizar o respeito pela diversidade cultural, o equilíbrio ecológico e a busca por uma vida digna e comunitária.

A partir dessa perspectiva, nos dedicamos a colaborar no PLANEJAMENTO E GESTÃO ESTRATÉGICA de governos e instituições que atuem com projetos que alterem a vida das pessoas para o Bem-Viver, que tenham, por tanto, compromissos na construção de políticas que garantam os direitos fundamentais da pessoa humana, os direitos civis e a construção da democracia como forma de empoderamento dos sujeitos sociais. 

Nesses 38 anos de existência, a equipe Usideias atuou como consultora para promover ideias e projetos em diferentes áreas, e somos comprometidos com processos e resultados que desatamos.
Temos dedicado especial atenção ao planejamento estratégico na aplicação do Sistema Participativo de Gestão Estratégica que desenvolvemos e, neste espaço, desejamos compartilhar com você.

Te convidamos a nos conectarmos,  a compartilhar e partilhar conosco suas experiências, e a seguir nossa jornada, encontrando conexões com as quais possa agregar nossa missão a sua missão.

We are a neutral sounding board that thinks along how this technology can help you further and also helps with the adoption by your organization.

We unburden you on various levels;
First, together we look for the needs within your organization where we think XR can be a valuable solution.

Name: HSEkruettler
Description:
Praxisnahe HSE-Expertise für Industrie, Chemie und Pharma

Als diplomierter Fachmann für Arbeitssicherheit komme ich aus der Praxis – und genau darin liegt meine Stärke. Ich weiß aus Erfahrung, dass praxisorientierte Lösungen oft wirkungsvoller sind, um sicheres Verhalten zu fördern, als rein theoretische Ansätze, die sich ausschließlich an Richtlinien, Gesetzen und Standards orientieren. Vor Ort setze ich deshalb auf realistische, umsetzbare und gleichzeitig regelkonforme Lösungen.

Mein Ansatz:
HSE_Kruettler versteht sich nicht als Hindernis für Ihre Arbeit, sondern als Partner, der durch kompetente und leistungsorientierte Beratung Ihre Projekte sicherer macht. Dabei begleite ich Sie in allen Fragen der Arbeitssicherheit und des Gesundheitsschutzes (Management) – fachlich auf höchstem Niveau, stets ziel- und kundenorientiert, mit Menschlichkeit, Respekt und Ehrlichkeit als Grundprinzipien.

Ihr Vorteil:
Sparen Sie Zeit und Ressourcen bei allen Aufgaben rund um Arbeitssicherheit und Gesundheitsschutz in Ihrem Unternehmen, auf Baustellen oder in Projekten. Bei Bedarf definiert und bewertet mein erfahrenes Team Ihre Risiken und Gefährdungen, entwickelt Maßnahmen zur Minderung, überwacht deren Umsetzung und übernimmt sämtliche HSE-Aufgaben in Ihrem Projekt. Zusätzlich erstellen wir maßgeschneiderte Lerneinheiten für Ihre Mitarbeitenden – digital oder als Präsenzschulung.

Leistungsschwerpunkte:

Betreuung gemäß Gesetzen, Richtlinien, Standards (u. a. ISO 45001, OHSAS 18001)

Arbeitssicherheits- und Gesundheitsschutzkoordination auf Baustellen, Projekten und in Betrieben

EHS- / HSE-Management

Erstellung von Gefährdungsbeurteilungen

Durchführung von Unterweisungen, Schulungen und Trainings

Einbindung von Spezialisten für Arbeitssicherheit

Sichere und gesunde Arbeitsbedingungen sind nicht nur eine gesetzliche Pflicht, sondern auch eine moralische Verantwortung.

„Do it safely, or not at all.“

Como atuamos
Trata-se de um completo acompanhamento gerencial e técnico, que envolve diferentes frentes de atuação, partindo desde a análise dos requisitos e planejamento até o acompanhamento final da execução dos projetos.


Nossa especialidade
A G-Solutions possui grande expertise na tecnologia PON (Passive Optical Network). Com equipe treinada e altamente especializada, oferece todo o suporte à configuração de OSPF, BGP e todo o escopo de roteamento e switching.

O que é ISP
ISP, em inglês Internet Service Provider, ou Provedor de Serviços de Internet, pode ser definido como uma empresa especializada em fornecer conexões à Internet, seja ela um Provedor de Internet ou não. Por meio de tais conexões, são oferecidos diversos serviços como acesso à web, servidores de e-mail, computação em nuvem, streaming de vídeo, entre tantos outros que podem ser consumidos nos âmbitos residenciais ou corporativos.

Mission
Our mission is to empower businesses with actionable insights and innovative solutions that enhance the efficiency, sustainability, and competitiveness of their supply chains. We are committed to delivering customized consulting services that enable clients to streamline operations, reduce costs, and achieve strategic growth.

Problem
Many businesses face challenges such as inefficient route to market strategies, high logistics costs, inaccurate demand forecasting, and lack of supply chain visibility. These issues often result in missed opportunities, stockouts, excess inventory, and reduced profitability.

Solution
Flip Consulting offers end-to-end supply chain consulting services that address these challenges by providing expert audits, lean process design, strategic planning, demand forecasting improvements, and cost analysis. Name: Heather O'Donnell, LLC
Description:
━━━━━━━━━━━
PROBLEM AREAS

CEO’s, CFO’s, Board of Directors, Operations Executives:
If something “feels off” in your business, you can’t shake the feeling of something must change if you are going to the next level, or if sh!t is just hitting the fan – it’s time for us to talk about it.
Do these 4 trouble areas resonate with you?
If so, reach out:  heather@heatherodonnell.llc

b.	Strategic
i.	Competitive Edge
•	Trouble maintaining a competitive edge in a crowded marketplace?
•	Unsure what markets need what you’re offering?
ii.	Talent Acquisition/Retention
•	High turnover?
•	Teams not cohesive and cross-functional?
•	Lack of appropriate leadership?
Businesses should be viewed with a “teaching hospital” mentality.
•	Is your HR team robotic?
Did they forget the “human” part of their title?
Do your recruiters really understand the position functions and the right personalities that may fit them?
c.	Operational 
i.	Supply Chain Disruptions
•	Supplier relationships damaged?
•	Bottlenecks, shortages, cost increases affecting production?
•	Issues within Sourcing, Procurement, Purchasing, Inventory, Quality, Warehousing, or Logistics?
ii.	Cost Control
•	AP/AR issues?
•	Money loss due to unintentional mismanagement?
(You don’t have time to educate everyone on cost accountability).

iii.	Inefficiencies
•	Lack of productivity and process?
•	Missed deadlines and targets?
•	Are your ERP systems aligned with the plan?  Is there a formidable plan?

iv.	Risk Management
Let’s face it.  Literally everything in business is a risk.
•	Safety Issues?
•	Do you have documented processes to minimize your business risk?
Or … is your business still functioning from undocumented employee tribal knowledge?  Talk about risk … 

d.	Company-wide Communication
My motto: “We don’t communicate, we over-communicate!” (I learned this from my Dad).  It’s important in supporting cross-functionality in business, too.

e.	Technology 
Still running your company out of spreadsheets?

Die Zukunft erfordert mehr als den optimalen Einsatz von Personalressourcen. Es geht darum, die individuellen Bedürfnisse und Fähigkeiten der Menschen zu erkennen und zu berücksichtigen, um langfristig wettbewerbsfähig zu bleiben. Klassische Vereinbarkeitsmodelle zum Beispiel stoßen hier an ihre Grenzen. Es ist an der Zeit, den Schritt zu echt gelebten, familien- und sozialbewussten Strategien zu machen – Strategien, die die Bereicherungspotenziale einer ausgewogenen Verbindung von Beruf und Privatleben anerkennen und fördern.

Bei Kraft Consulting, in Zusammenarbeit mit unseren Partner*innen, haben wir die Konzepte von Familienfreundlichkeit und Vereinbarkeit weiterentwickelt. Wir setzen auf die Integration von Menschlichkeit und digitaler Transformation. Durch die Entwicklung von Unternehmenskultur, unterstützt von digitalen Tools und Frameworks, schaffen wir eine Arbeitswelt, in der Beruf und Privatleben sich nicht ausschließen, sondern gegenseitig bereichern. Dies ist unser Beitrag zur sozialen Nachhaltigkeit und einer sicheren Zukunft.

In diesem und weitern Kontexten, begleiten wir auch Führungskräfte und Mitarbeiter*innen direkt und individuelle bei ihren Herausforderungen mit Coachings, Mediationen und (Team-)Workshop-Veranstaltungen!

Name: Circular Packing Solutions
Description:
We advise and accompany you in the ecological transition of your packaging at all levels, covering the different phases from the initial brand strategy and design to the operational execution for implementation, in order to cover the active purpose of the Organization or Impact Brand.

Our method is based on Closing the Loop to measure the holistic impact of packaging on the planet and its inhabitants. 

All our analysis projects and strategies are based on positive circular impact, which we also call Life Cycle Design, comprising all those strategies, activities, tasks and measures that, as a whole, are aimed at;
• minimizing the extraction of raw materials. With a future tendency to eliminate it.
• efficiently produce products and services with the longest possible life cycle and the smallest carbon footprint with the lowest energy consumption.
• maximize the recycling of end products. In this case, the trend should be to reduce as much as possible the waste produced and even eliminate it.
• enhance the Brand's visibility vectors in a transparent without greenwashed manner.

Our Services

Packaging Consulting primary, secondary or collective and tertiary.
Our team of professionals with a variety of skills for each project and a wide range of services offers you a 360° view to act with coherence and consistency according to your casuistry.

Industrial Automation

A KETI KETA é uma marca focada na (re)conexão dos humanos, pequenos e crescidos, com a (sua) Natureza. Através do desenvolvimento de um modelo pedagógico que permite às crianças brincar diariamente na natureza (à luz de um Jardim de Infância), oferecemos um espaço seguro para ser - individual, criativo, autêntico -, das crianças aos pais, dos cuidadores formais aos informais, da natureza, através da natureza, em cooperação com a natureza. Trazendo os humanos de volta à (sua) natureza.

A nossa abordagem holística ao desenvolvimento humano é co-criada por uma equipa multidisciplinar de cuidadores formais, que procuram criar um solo rico para que as crianças se desenvolvam, floresçam e explorem a sua natureza interna e externa. Fazemo-lo através de serviços de consultoria e capacitação de técnicos, gestores, cuidadores, formais e informais, em qualquer parte do país. Pretendemos ser catalisadores comunitários para a mudança, o seu parceiro em psicopedagogia com e pela natureza, integrados no contexto português de educação (assentes nas OCEPE e no Perfil do Aluno).

Ao contrário do sistema educacional tradicional atual, a abordagem da KETI KETA passa por capacitar crianças e adultos para criarem a sua própria realidade enquanto agentes regenerativos comunitários para um futuro sustentado na Terra.

Name: QM Consulting
Description:
We are a consulting company that represents owners, stakeholders, and general contractors that have large financial interests in building quality projects. We are based on a simple principle: People should always get what they pay for! If you spend a dollar you should get a dollar worth of what you are buying.

We at QM Consulting have realized that a large percentage of commercial construction projects have issues with quality control measures, and more times than not, the owners and stakeholders of these projects are not even made aware of the issue and decisions that will affect the longevity of their buildings are being impacted without their input or consent. 

The biggest issue currently being faced is a major lack of accountability for the entities responsible for ensuring quality throughout the project. We hold all parties accountable and ensure that projects are being done correctly through oversight and communication. 

This oversight is being provided for the sole reason to protect the owner's best interest. We do not concern ourselves with the potential impact our findings have on the entities contracted to provide the work, our only goal is to ensure the project is done properly per the contract documents, period.

Name: Facilit-Office
Description:
Vous croulez déjà sous les urgences, le manque de main d’œuvre, le manque de moyens et les clients mécontents…

Fille et femme de dirigeants, moi-même cheffe d’entreprise, je sais vos difficultés.
Couteau suissse de terrain depuis 25 ans, j’ai les solutions.

Je suis animée par la volonté d’améliorer le cadre de travail des dirigeants de PME en leur permettant d’accéder à des ressources et méthodologies structurantes et innovantes. Parce que j’ai la conviction que le bien-être au travail commence par l’organisation.
Pour des bénéfices nombreux et immédiats
Responsabilisation des collaborateurs : chacun sait ce qu’il fait, pourquoi il le fait et comment il le fait : vous retrouvez du temps pour vous consacrer au développement de votre buisness (c’est pour ça non que vous êtes devenus patron ?
Attractivité : les meilleurs s’unissent au meilleurs, devenez une organisation performante, la meilleure, vous attirerez les meilleurs candidats sur le marché du travail
Diminution du turn-over et de l’absentéisme : cultivez le bien être en entreprise et la qualité, un salarié heureux et considéré est un salarié performant.

Je n’ai pas la prétention de penser que ma méthode est universelle et imparable. Elle n’est pas non plus facile ni aisée, et je ne pratiquerai ni condescendance ni langue de bois. Mais je serais à vos côtés pour vous aider à grandir.

Je vous propose de nous rencontrer pour organiser un audit de terrain, qui nous permettra de constater ensemble les pistes d’amélioration potentielles. A l’issu je vous remettrai un compte rendu écrit qui vous permettra de décider si vous souhaitez que vous accompagne sur la voie du changement et de la performance ou pas. 

Pour travailler mieux, contactez moi!

 Precision Insights: Our APSIM-powered models reduce G×E uncertainty by 75% in severe droughts

Practicas de Clase Mundial: herramientas de vanguardia como World Class Manufacturing (WCM), RCMII, Lean Enterprises y Gestión de Activos basada en ISO 55000.

¿Qué problemas resolvemos? Convertimos operaciones desordenadas en unidades de negocio rentables y predecibles. Nuestra intervención se enfoca en resultados medibles que impactan directamente el P&L.

Excelencia Operativa: Incrementamos el OEE y la eficiencia de línea (con registros históricos del 15%) mediante la eliminación de desperdicios.

Supply Chain & Logística: Elevamos el nivel de servicio (OTIF) hasta un 93.2% y garantizamos una asertividad de inventarios superior al 99%.

Gestión de Activos: Maximizamos el ciclo de vida de la maquinaria, reduciendo costos de mantenimiento anual hasta en un 18% y entregando proyectos con un ROI de 3.8 a 1.

Rentabilidad Estratégica: Especialistas en reducción de mermas (ahorros documentados de hasta $900M) y optimización de costos operativos.

Especialidades: Optimización de Operaciones, Consultoría en Logística,

Name: AC Carbon Solutions
Description:
AC Carbon Solutions is a leading provider of carbon credit solutions for businesses committed to reducing their environmental impact. We seamlessly connect companies seeking carbon credits with project owners worldwide, enabling them to offset their emissions and contribute to a sustainable future.

With a presence in over 90 countries, we have established a robust network of project developers, ensuring direct access to a wide range of carbon credits. Our expertise extends beyond mere transaction facilitation, as we also assist in project development and verification, ensuring the quality and authenticity of the carbon credits we offer.

Unlike conventional carbon credit markets, we provide access to credits that are below market prices and not readily available on traditional platforms. These credits, verified by the most prestigious certifiers including VCS, Gold Standard, and the UN, offer our clients a competitive edge and contribute to their environmental goals.

Our mission is firmly rooted in the Sustainable Development Goals set by the UN, aligning our endeavors with the global movement to combat climate change and foster a more sustainable planet. We are passionate about empowering businesses to make a positive impact on the environment, driving innovation, and contributing to a healthier world for generations to come.

Partner with AC Carbon Solutions and embark on a journey towards environmental stewardship. Let us help you offset your emissions, support sustainable projects, and make a tangible difference in the fight against climate change.

Name: Hubeen
Description:
Nós acreditamos que apenas vender benefícios , serviços ou vantagens ao RH é algo incompleto.

O RH tem diversas outras necessidades e a principal é ser estratégico. 

A área de gente e gestão vem se tornando o pilar principal para que as empresas alcancem as suas metas de crescimento, sustentabilidade e faturamento.

O papel da Hubeen é muito simples, ser o único fornecedor para o RH. 

Nós sabemos que o time de gente e gestão é bombardeado diariamente de e-mails, ligações e propostas que se eles fossem parar e responder a todos, provavelmente não fariam mais nada. 

A intenção dos fornecedores é clara, vender seus produtos e serviços. 

Mas será que eles sabem o que realmente faz ou não faz sentido para a empresa? Será que eles supõem as estratégias da empresa e baseado nisto, oferecem os seus serviços?

O que nós fazemos é ir na contra mão do processo de vendas, primeiro a gente entende quais são os planos da estratégicos da empresa e para onde ela quer ir.

Com isso analisamos todas as caixinhas de produtos, serviços, tecnologias e benefícios para saber se todos os fornecedores estão devidamente alinhados com o planejamento de médio e longo prazo da empresa.

Nós analisamos os contratos e precificação de todos os fornecedores e se encontramos inconformidades rodamos um grande BID de mercado para propiciarmos a empresa aderência, precificação justa e atendimento de qualidade. 

Enquanto o RH cuida de gente, nós cuidamos da gestão de todos os fornecedores, garantindo a eles maior performance e foco no que realmente importa. Suas pessoas! 

A Hubeen é braço direito dos RH´s.

Name: Drones.Consulting
Description:
Drones.Consulting was founded by Markus, an experienced drone pilot holding multiple piloting certifications in the UK, Europe and the US.

Markus started flying initially with fixed-wing planes in 2013. Before the mainstream advent of "drones" (or so-called UAVs, Unmanned Aerial Vehicles), he built, programmed and flew his own drones. Since 2017, he has been moving into turn-key solutions and is an avid flyer of smaller drones such as the DJI Spark, DJI Mavic Mini, the DJI Mini 2 and, most recently, the DJI Mini 3 Pro.

Drone.Consulting deploys exclusively sub-249g sUAVs, which typically are equipped with high-definition video (2K - 4K), Zoom capabilities, stabilised gimbals and provide around 30 - 35 minutes flight time (subject to weather conditions, flying styles and sUAV configuration).

Moving on from simple capturing of high quality aerial photos and videos, Drone.Consulting has - by combining light-weight turn-key sUAV solutions with third party applications for autonomous flight missions - developed unique sUAV workflows.

Description:
Our Vision: A Malawi where all institutions and communities are strategically designed and operationally managed to ensure genuine gender equity and full inclusivity.
Our Mission: To partner with and empower Malawian and international organizations, government bodies, policymakers, and grassroots movements to embed and integrate gender equity and inclusivity principles into their core strategies, policies, and operations through tailored consultancy, training, policy development, research, and collaborative action.

Our Four Programme Pillars (Services):
1. Policy and Systems Transformation (PST) 
-Policy Audits: Reviewing existing organizational policies for gender and inclusivity gaps.
-Policy Drafting & Legal Alignment
-Implementation Strategy: Guiding organizations on the practical, day-to-day enforcement of new policies, including reporting mechanisms
2. Gender Competency Training & Capacity Building (GCT) 
-Training for senior management on gender-responsive budgeting and strategic planning.
-Mandatory training on unconscious bias, sexual harassment prevention, and inclusive communication.
-Training of Trainers (ToT)
3.Grassroots Engagement & Empowerment (GEE) 
-Organizational Development: Training on proposal writing, financial management, governance, and monitoring & evaluation (M&E).
-Advocacy Strategy Support: Assisting local groups in developing and executing targeted advocacy campaigns on key gender issues 
-Resource Mobilization: Connecting local groups with relevant funding opportunities and networks.
4.Evidence-Based Research & Knowledge Production (ERP) 
-Sectoral Gender Audits: Producing reports on the state of gender equality within specific sectors 
-Policy Briefs: Translating complex research findings into accessible recommendations for policymakers and practitioners.

Benefits of Railwhiz:
Real-time Location Tracking:
Track car locations in real-time with customizable views by car type, customer, product, class, location, etc.

Historical Data Analysis:
Access detailed historical data with a glance at the last 100 pings and customizable time frames.

Geofencing & Alerts:
Define virtual boundaries (geofences) around yards, origins, destinations, and more.
Receive immediate alerts via text or email when cars enter/exit geofences, exceed speed limits, or dwell at a location for too long.

Enhanced Visibility:
Monitor car speed and temperature.
Share live car locations with authorized parties (e.g., short lines, customers) via secure, time-limited links.

Cycle Time Reporting:
Generate comprehensive reports on car cycle times for improved efficiency analysis.

Demurrage Charge Automation:
Automatically trigger demurrage charges based on pre-defined dwell time limits at specific locations.
Receive alerts so you can generate invoices for excessive dwell times.

Ask the Whiz AI (coming soon):
Utilize AI-powered insights to quickly answer critical questions about your rail operations, such as:
Where do cars dwell the most?
Are there specific days/times when cars are more likely to be delayed?
How long do cars typically dwell at a particular customer's location?

Improved Efficiency:
Gain valuable insights into your rail operations to identify bottlenecks, optimize routes, and minimize delays.

Enhanced Collaboration:
Share data with key stakeholders (e.g., short lines, railroads) to improve overall rail performance.

Data Security & Control:
Your data is securely stored and you maintain complete control over who can access it.

Para muitas organizações, a SSO é um centro de custo – um conjunto de obrigações legais que geram despesas. Nós vemos de forma diferente. Vemos uma oportunidade estratégica.

Nossa metodologia proprietária transforma programas obrigatórios, como PCA e PPR, em motores de lucratividade e vantagem competitiva. Não entregamos laudos; entregamos ROI.

Nossa Atuação se baseia em 4 Pilares de Geração de Valor:

1. ROI FINANCEIRO E OTIMIZAÇÃO TRIBUTÁRIA: Reduzimos drasticamente os custos mais impactantes da folha de pagamento, incluindo o adicional de insalubridade e, principalmente, a alíquota do FAP/RAT. A economia gerada se torna lucro.

2. EFICIÊNCIA OPERACIONAL E PRODUTIVIDADE: Combatemos os custos invisíveis do presenteísmo e do absenteísmo, criando ambientes de trabalho onde equipes mais saudáveis e focadas produzem mais. Essencial para a competitividade da indústria, agronegócio e logística.

3. BLINDAGEM JURÍDICA E PREVENÇÃO DE PASSIVOS: Estruturamos uma defesa técnica e documental robusta, protegendo o patrimônio da sua empresa contra os riscos de passivos trabalhistas e previdenciários.

4. FORTALECIMENTO DE MARCA E IMPACTO ESG: Transformamos obrigações, como a Lei de Cotas (PcD), em uma poderosa ferramenta de cultura e posicionamento de marca, alinhando sua empresa às melhores práticas de ESG e atraindo os melhores talentos.

Name: GIMS - Global Independent Marine Surveyors
Description:
GIMS is a UK-based company delivering specialized Marine Survey and HVAC-R solutions for the maritime and offshore sectors. Founded officially in 2015 but with professional roots dating back to 1965 in Genoa (Italy), GIMS leverages decades of experience and a global network to serve shipowners, insurers, shipyards, and offshore operators across over 1,100 ports worldwide.

Marine Survey Services
We offer technical inspections, damage assessments, insurance surveys (H&M, P&I, Cargo), and legal advisory. Our certified surveyors ensure fast, compliant, and accurate operations globally, including judicial and court-appointed surveys.

HVAC-R Solutions
Our engineers deliver worldwide maintenance and installation of marine HVAC-R systems, including compressor overhaul, commissioning, and support for systems such as CARRIER and YORK. We also provide duct cleaning with robotic tools on navy, passenger, and cargo vessels.

Offshore Platforms
GIMS provides specialized technical services for offshore platforms and marine energy infrastructure. Our services include: Inspections, Testing, Maintenance/Repairs of any type of compressor, diesel engines, electric equipment, final Commissioning for Offshore Installations, Technical Support for Energy Production Systems, including HVAC-R, auxiliary systems and A/C ducts cleaning

With a team of over 600 technical professionals, GIMS stands out for its operational reliability, regulatory compliance, and ability to offer tailored, high-quality solutions across all major maritime regions.

In July 2025, we expanded our international presence by establishing GIMS B.V., a Dutch private limited company based in the Rotterdam area. This new entity expands our reach in Northern Europe, enhancing support to shipowners, insurers, and shipyards with local expertise and faster response times. 

Contact us to explore how GIMS can support your technical operations at sea or offshore.

Our services aim to improve product longevity, safety, and sustainability through optimized testing and analysis. Naszym celem jest również ograniczenie strat, budowanie solidnych podstaw produkcji i zarządzania higieną oraz zwiększanie zysków firm, szczególnie w przemyśle kosmetycznym i spożywczym.

Dołącz do nas i podnieś standardy higieny w swojej firmie, aby zyskać na efektywności i dochodowości.

Jesteśmy zespołem doświadczonych ekspertów w dziedzinie higieny, zarządzania, zarządzania jakością oraz mikrobiologii. Posiadamy wieloletnie doświadczenie w branży, dzięki czemu doskonale rozumiemy potrzeby i wyzwania stojące przed firmami. Nasza wiedza i doświadczenie pozwalają nam oferować najwyższej jakości szkolenia i konsultacje, które pomagają firmom podnosić standardy higieniczne, zapewniać bezpieczeństwo swoich produktów oraz tworzyć fundamenty do dużych zysków ze sprzedaży.

Todo o desenvolvimento dos processos e estratégias que compõem a engenharia comercial de uma empresa é baseado em dois pilares:

Momento do negócio: Consideramos o mercado, o volume de vendas, a maturidade e o tamanho do time comercial para construir um escopo compatível. Afinal, não adianta tentar impor soluções complexas em negócios simples e em processo de amadurecimento, assim como não faz sentido aplicar estratégias simples em negócios mais robustos e maduros.

O tripé comercial da empresa: Chamamos de 3P’s (Pessoas, Processos e Produtividade). Sempre olhamos para o uso de recursos, tecnologias, treinamentos e estratégias adequadas, alinhadas com a cultura e os objetivos da empresa.

Name: NanoTactiX
Description:
At NanoTactiX, we are dedicated to assisting companies in strategically transitioning their innovative concepts in nano- and micro-device technologies from the initial idea stage through to cleanroom prototyping and manufacturing. Our focus is on delivering a seamless, cost-effective process, enabling our clients to efficiently move from concept to production. We address the common challenges of high costs and complex processes in cleanroom-based R&D, offering customized design strategies, effective benchmarking, and streamlined fabrication to enhance quality and yield. This approach supports our clients in thoroughly assessing the feasibility of their forward-thinking projects.

Founded by a team with decades of combined experience in high-precision nanofabrication and measurements, NanoTactiX exclusively provides specialized guidance in a range of sectors with high impact missions. Our expertise extends to evaluating nanofabrication facilities, advising on methodological practicality, and assisting in the identification of intellectual property in microchip design and manufacturing. Our goal is to offer more than just consultancy; we strive to work alongside our clients from the start of their project to the final stage, ensuring they retain both control and comprehension of their innovations. At NanoTactiX, we are committed to being a supportive partner in our clients' journeys towards achieving high-volume production and successful funding rounds.

Why Choose On Point Readiness?

Our Process:

Take the Next Step:
Preparedness is not just about surviving but about thriving. Visit onpointreadiness.com to learn more.

Name: The Meeting Medic
Description:
Good meetings can't be emails.

Meetings are unique spaces where groups gather to connect with each other, brainstorm and ideate together, gain clarity through asking questions which also generate buy-in, and make decisions let everyone know who is responsible for what and when.

If that’s not happening at your meetings, call me!

Agendas don’t have to be overwrought, they don’t have to take a ton of time to create, and there is a secret to good meetings. 

And you don’t have to sign up, pay me, or wait to find out that secret I’ll tell you right now: the secret is facilitation.

Together, we’ll break down the who/when/what of your meetings and then determine the *how’s* for your next agenda. 

Facilitation is the key to great meetings, workshops, or gatherings of any kind/size. Being intentional about how we approach the situation, how we want to get answers, and how we’re asking everyone to engage with both the materials and each other, we can create more opportunities for success.

Everyone loves leaving a meeting feeling like it mattered they were there! Let’s make plans that guarantee that will happen.

Name: SCHICKER - Inspiring Pioneers GmbH
Description:
Sie haben schon mal von Legal Tech gehört, wissen aber nicht, wie Sie anfangen sollen? Oder Sie wollen Ihre Kanzlei durch effiziente Prozesse nachhaltig aufstellen, kennen aber die nächsten Schritte nicht? Kein Problem! Bei Inspiring Pioneers GmbH sind wir darauf spezialisiert, Ihnen genau dabei zu helfen.

Mit unserer umfangreichen Erfahrung im Bereich Legal Innovation unterstützen wir Sie dabei, die Potenziale von Legal Tech zu erkennen und effektiv zu nutzen. Wir bieten maßgeschneiderte Workshops, die speziell auf Ihre Bedürfnisse und Herausforderungen zugeschnitten sind. In diesen Workshops erlernen Sie, wie moderne Technologien wie Künstliche Intelligenz in die juristische Praxis integriert werden können, und wie sie die Effizienz und Qualität Ihrer Dienstleistungen steigern.

Darüber hinaus begleiten wir Sie bei der Transformation Ihrer Kanzlei oder Rechtsabteilung. Wir verstehen, dass der Wandel hin zu digitalisierten Prozessen und der Implementierung neuer Technologien eine Herausforderung darstellen kann. Deshalb stehen wir Ihnen als erfahrener Partner zur Seite, um diesen Übergang reibungslos und effektiv zu gestalten.

Neben der Beratung und Begleitung bieten wir auch Unterstützung beim Doing von täglichen Projekten in Ihrer Kanzlei oder Rechtsabteilung. Wir helfen Ihnen, die passenden Legal Tech-Lösungen zu implementieren und sicherzustellen, dass sie optimal in Ihren Arbeitsalltag integriert werden. Dabei achten wir stets darauf, dass diese Lösungen nicht nur effizient, sondern auch benutzerfreundlich und auf die spezifischen Bedürfnisse Ihres Teams zugeschnitten sind.

Kurz gesagt, bei Inspiring Pioneers GmbH finden Sie einen verlässlichen Partner, der Ihnen hilft, Ihre Kanzlei oder Rechtsabteilung zukunftsfähig zu machen. Kontaktieren Sie uns, um mehr darüber zu erfahren, wie wir Sie auf dem Weg zu einer innovativen und effizienten juristischen Praxis unterstützen können.

Description:
Delta Q Process è un’azienda specializzata nella consulenza e nell’ottimizzazione dei processi produttivi per il settore della meccanica di precisione CNC. Ci occupiamo di migliorare l’efficienza delle lavorazioni meccaniche su macchine utensili CNC, intervenendo su cicli di lavoro, cicli CAD-CAM, layout produttivi, gestione dell’utensileria, delle attrezzature e digitalizzazione dei processi.

Il nostro obiettivo è massimizzare l’efficienza, ridurre i costi e aumentare la qualità e i margini operativi delle unità produttive.

Forniamo supporto alle aziende attraverso:
	•	Ottimizzazione dei cicli produttivi su macchine utensili CNC per ridurre i tempi ciclo e migliorare l’efficienza delle lavorazioni anche con lo studio del percorso CAM più idoneo.
	•	Analisi e ottimizzazione del layout produttivo per garantire flussi di lavoro più fluidi e ridurre i tempi di movimentazione.
	•	Gestione avanzata del parco utensileria con parametri di lavorazione ottimizzati per aumentare la durata e le prestazioni degli utensili.
	•	Ottimizzazione del tooling e delle attrezzature per il bloccaggio dei pezzi e l’automazione delle operazioni di produzione.
	•	Digitalizzazione dei processi produttivi per il monitoraggio in tempo reale, l’analisi dei dati e il miglioramento continuo delle performance produttive.

Grazie a un approccio pragmatico e orientato ai risultati, aiutiamo le aziende a trasformare le sfide della produzione in opportunità di crescita e innovazione.

Sunalei is more than just another nonprofit organization, we are a powerhouse aiming to revitalize the American spirit of ingenuity to reclaim the nation’s global leadership through innovation, specialized job creation, and social inclusion. 

America’s Industries once hummed with amazing inventions, and scientific breakthroughs lit the future, thriving communities – and the nation – on the fruits of American-made ingenuity. But, for several decades, the winds of change known as “outsourcing” have carried jobs and dreams overseas, leaving behind echoes of what was.

We envision a future where America bursts back onto the global stage as a beacon of success, reclaiming its mantle as a Science, Technology, Engineering, and Mathematics (STEM) leader, illuminating the path forward with groundbreaking innovation, and fostering prosperity on domestic soil.

Our mission is to identify and execute ideas and possibilities that can truly promote holistic benefits for the national industry to create jobs instead of outsourcing opportunities, for local communities to retain their talents, and for STEM professionals to find well-paid and rewarding opportunities in the USA.

Unimos a experiência de quem já esteve no seu lugar com o poder da tecnologia. Integramos ferramentas de digitalização e análise de dados aos processos de qualidade, transformando informações antes perdidas em planilhas em insights estratégicos para o seu negócio.

Name: RosaP Cadeia de Produção Justa
Description:
Você já pensou em quem faz e como é feita a sua roupa? Quantas etapas, processos, quais os materiais utilizados, quem são as pessoas que fazem cada detalhe da sua roupa para que ela fique do jeito perfeito para você. Todas essas perguntas nem passam pela nossa cabeça quando estamos escolhendo uma peça para comprar. Apesar do glamour que a moda traz ao nosso imaginário, nem sempre a indústria da moda possui uma preocupação em responder todas essas perguntas de forma transparente e justa.
Depois de se deparar com o trabalho alusivo à escravidão em uma facção no RJ em 2013, Fabio, um dos fundadores da organização, põe suas energias em fazer nascer em 2015 a RosaP. Em homenagem a ativista norte americana, a costureira negra Rosa Parks que se recusou a levantar do banco de ônibus para ceder seu lugar à pessoa branca e que iniciou, com sua atitude, mudanças sobre os 2direitos civis da população negra. A RosaP nasce com o desejo de promover uma transformação na triste realidade presente na cadeia da produção da moda, atuando de modo a intermediar de maneira justa as relações entre marcas e produtores da moda priorizando a inovação, qualidade e sustentabilidade social.

Name: APELYON
Description:
„Život je plný paradoxov. Aj ten biznisový. To čo nás na ňom láka, nás aj najviac vyčerpáva. Tak je to aj s procesmi. Na jednej strane ich odmietame, na druhej strane ich však potrebujeme.“ (A.Adámek, zakladateľka značky APELYON)

Veríme, že múdri ľudia problémy neriešia, ale múdro im predchádzajú. V neznámych situáciách robia múdre rozhodnutia.  Aktívne využívajú príležitosti a s prehľadom menia náhodné interakcie na múdre reakcie. Vďaka tomu si seba-vedomo užívajú to, čo je na podnikaní najlepšie. Pocit, že ich podnikavý talent opäť uspel.

Našim cieľom je, aby dôležité veci boli zrejmé. Preto o veciach hovoríme jednoducho a zrozumiteľne. Mapujeme firemné i podnikateľské prostredie systemickým prístupom a zrozumiteľným jazykom spájame svety procesov a IT s tým ľudským.

#APELYONprístup 
Na celý biznisový systém nazeráme v širokom kontexte. Vyhodnocujeme nielen jeho súčasti samotné, ale aj to, ako spolu všetky subjekty a systémy koexistujú. Pri spolupráci odhaľujeme skrytú dynamiku týchto systémov a pracujeme s predpokladom, že sa navzájom neustále ovplyvňujú. Pri spolupráci vnímame ako interné tak externé faktory a učíme vás využívať zdroje na to, aby sa vaše náhodné interakcie zmenili na vedomé a úderné reakcie. Spoluprácu s klientom vedieme tak, aby naplnila jeho očakávania a stanovené ciele. Veríme tomu, čo robíme a sme schopní niesť zodpovednosť za výsledky našej spolupráce
V APELYON dbáme na úroveň našej spolupráce. Neustále pracujeme a zdokonaľujeme vlastné interné postupy, aby vaša skúsenosť bola hodná múdreho rozhodnutia, ktoré do nej investujete.

Name: Pulse QA Consulting
Description:
Redefining Quality Management in Industry

Pulse QA, founded by an industry expert with a background in quality management, is a trailblazing consultancy dedicated to excellence, innovation, and sustainability. The founder's journey began in 2019 as a Quality Manager for a startup, leading to the company's acquisition by a multinational giant. Post-acquisition, our founder became the Quality and Standardization Leader, successfully implementing a robust quality management system focusing on ISO 9001, 14001, and 45001 standards. The tenure concluded in 2023 by establishing a comprehensible Quality Management system as well as quality control protocols for nanotechnology in graphene materials manufacturing.

Collaboration, Learning, and Expertise

Beyond consultancy, our founder actively collaborated with the ISO TC 229 Nanotechnology Committee and the IEC TC 113 Nanotechnology for electrotechnical products and systems, contributing to global standards for graphene materials. Continuous learning is fundamental for us, the founder has undertaken various ISO courses and certifications. From ISO 9001 introductory and middle-level courses in 2019 by KIWA and DNV in Norway to certification level courses as Auditor for ISO 9001 by DNV. Currently, she is pursuing international certification as Lead Auditor in ISO 9001, 14001, 45001, and 22000 by ITESM. 
Our commitment to professional growth is unwavering. With over 8 years of experience as a Project Leader in the chemical manufacturing industry specializing in graphene materials. She has closely collaborated with the Research Council of Norway, Innovation Norway, and different Research Institutes and companies across Europe, the USA, and Canada. 
Pulse QA offers a unique blend of quality management expertise and practical industry insights. 
Choose Pulse QA for a consultancy that not only meets but exceeds the highest quality standards, combining innovation, sustainability, and a commitment to excellence.

Name: EBF guidance & consulting, s.r.o.
Description:
Ineffective processes, overwhelmed staff, lack of leadership, and poor communication—these are common issues that slow down business growth. We believe that well-designed internal processes and structured financial management form the backbone of a successful company. We won't overburden you with complicated terms or technical jargon. Instead, we’ll point you in the right direction so that together we can identify savings for your business and let your team thrive. 

What does working with us bring you?
    • Stronger financial management
We’ll design a functional and transparent system that supports growth and helps you make data-driven decisions.
    • Optimisation of team structure and processes
We’ll help identify weak spots in your team, tools, and communication. We’ll highlight key obstacles to growth and offer practical solutions.
    • Change management and leadership
We support you in your leadership role and help build team trust. Together, we’ll create a culture where people understand what to do—and why.

Ways we can work together
1. Individual mentoring (not only) for finance professionals
A safe space to talk about challenges. Ideal for consulting on specific issues or providing guidance in leadership and operations.
2. Tailored trainings
One-day custom programmes based on a short analysis and ending with a clear One Pager summary for your team.
3. Team check
We look at the overall performance of your accounting or finance team. We analyse the resource inefficiencies, such as the use of employees' time for unnecessary tasks, undersized or oversized departments, outdated systems, non-functional communication channels, and mutually contradictory guidelines and regulations. We uncover automation and digitisation potential and help put improvements into practice. If needed, we step in as interim CFOs. In our work, we place a strong emphasis on leadership since we believe it's the key element of a successful team.

Let’s move your business forward together!

Name: JustMinds GmbH
Description:
JustMinds GmbH, based in Vienna, is a specialized consultancy and technological startup dedicated to revolutionizing human performance in high-reliability industries. Currently in development, our flagship project—the SYNAPSE Engine—is a cutting-edge socio-technical system simulator designed to integrate human and system performance variables. It will optimize operations in air traffic management (ATM) and other industries such as maritime, energy, and healthcare.

A key area of our expertise is Fatigue Risk Management. At JustMinds, we develop leading fatigue risk management systems that not only comply with regulatory standards but also significantly enhance human performance and safety. Our systems help organizations proactively manage fatigue risks, improving workforce well-being and operational efficiency in critical environments.

Our expertise is backed by years of scientific research into human behavior, cognitive performance, and system demands. Once launched, the SYNAPSE Engine will allow air traffic control centers, aviation training schools, and regulatory bodies to model and optimize workforce planning, manage fatigue, and enhance operational safety. Our mission is to ensure that AI and automation can be safely integrated into ATM without compromising the human element that drives these critical systems.

At JustMinds, we also provide consulting services in psychology, human factors, human performance, and fatigue risk management. Our expertise in quantifying human performance through data enables organizations to achieve better safety outcomes, compliance, and operational efficiency.

Stay tuned for the launch of the SYNAPSE Engine, which will set a new standard in integrating human and system performance for sustainable and safe operational excellence.

Name: Cockpit Boosters
Description:
Nous pourrions dire que nous sommes des consultants, mais nous nous voyons plutôt comme des boosters d'entreprises !

Nous aidons les entreprises à améliorer leur manière de fonctionner pour devenir plus efficaces, plus performantes et in fine plus pérennes,  en utilisant au mieux leurs ressources (comme le temps, l'argent, la main-d'œuvre, etc.) pour obtenir les meilleurs résultats et atteindre leurs objectifs.

Parfois, les entreprises rencontrent des problèmes tels que des processus inefficaces, des coûts élevés, des retards, ou des erreurs fréquentes. C'est là que nous intervenons. Notre travail consiste à analyser en détails comment votre entreprise fonctionne actuellement. Nous examinons vos processus, vos méthodes de travail, vos systèmes, et vos ressources. Ensuite, nous identifions les points faibles, les inefficacités et les domaines où des améliorations peuvent être apportées.

Une fois que nous avons compris ces problèmes, nous vous fournissons des recommandations et des solutions pour les résoudre. Ces recommandations peuvent inclure des changements dans les processus et l'organisation, l'utilisation de nouvelles technologies, la formation du personnel, ou d'autres stratégies.

L'objectif final est d'aider votre entreprise à devenir plus compétitive, plus fluide, à produire des produits et des services de meilleure qualité plus rapidement, et à satisfaire davantage vos clients.

Name: Zero To One Capital
Description:
Zero to One pools funds from various investors to acquire equity stakes in private companies or invest in various assets. The primary goal is to generate substantial returns for its investors over a specific investment period. These firms often bring strategic and operational expertise to the companies they invest in to drive growth and improve performance.

Our specialties vary based on their investment strategies and the industries they target. These include:

1. Leveraged Buyouts (LBO): Acquiring companies using significant debt financing.
2. Growth Capital: Investing in established companies to support expansion.
Venture Capital: Funding early-stage startups with high growth potential.
Distressed Investments: Acquiring underperforming companies with turnaround potential.
3. Real Estate: Investing in commercial, residential, or industrial properties.
Infrastructure: Funding projects related to infrastructure development.
4. Mezzanine Financing: Providing a combination of debt and equity financing.
5. Technology: Focusing on tech-related companies and startups.
6. Healthcare: Investing in medical providers, biotech, and pharmaceutical firms.
6. Education: Supporting companies and institutions involved in education.
7. Financial Services: Investing in banks, insurance companies, and other financial institutions.
8. Transportation and Logistics: Investing in transportation companies.

Name: brotherHUB
Description:
Somos una consultora especializada en estrategia y operaciones. Nos especializamos en la implantación de herramientas del lean manufacturing. Aportamos nuestra experiencia y colaboramos con usted en la simplificación de sus operaciones, su logística y su cadena de suministro. 

Tanto si está inmerso en un proceso de reestructuración, como de mejora, le ayudaremos a identificar las actividades que le hacen ganar más dinero, a enfocar en ellas sus esfuerzos, evitando que lo demás le distraiga. Le ayudamos en la redefinición de su propuesta de valor, posicionamiento y plan estratégico. Guiaremos y desarrollaremos su organización, de manera acompasada con las capacidades de la misma.

Somos especialistas, en simplificar la gestión de compañías industriales de mediano tamaño (20M€, 200 empleados, 20.000m2) y cadenas de suministro de elevada complejidad. 

Le ayudamos en su proceso de mejora, y en la selección de las herramientas de lean manufacturing y tecnologías de la industria 4.0, que produzcan los máximos impactos en su compañía.

Si en lo que está pensando es en mejorar la gestión de sus líneas de ensamblaje, células robotizadas o almacenes, también podemos ayudarle. Desde la (re)definición de su layout, la selección de la rutina de operaciones estándar y el equilibrado de las mismas. Solo después de eso, y tras intentar eliminar por completo las actividades que no añaden valor y/o exigen un alto esfuerzo físico a sus empleados, elegimos las soluciones tecnológicas que le permitan librarse de las mismas.

Le guiaremos en la selección e implantación de AGVs, ARMs, sistemas para GtP y otro tipo de robotización. 

Podemos simplificar la gestión de su cadena de suministro, mediante la adopción de tecnologías combinadas RFID, BT y NFC que alimenten a su sistema de gestión de almacenes (WMS), en combinación con el resto de los sistemas de captura de datos en planta. Introducimos herramientas de IOT, BI y ML.

¿Hablamos?

Name: SRF Interim en Training
Description:
Na een carrière van 27 jaar in het bedrijfsleven is het tijd om alles wat ik heb geleerd op een andere manier in te gaan zetten. Ik zet mijn opgedane kennis graag in als interim manager. 
Mijn specialisatie zit voornamelijk op het vlak van cultuur en gedragsveranderingen in turbulente tijden binnen organisaties en teams.

Waar ik jou of jouw organisatie goed bij kan helpen;

Verandermanagement | Post merger integration | Reorganisaties | Outsourcing | Inkoop van flex | Interim (businessunit) manager | Interim directeur | Interim Teamlead | Strategisch recruitment | Diversiteit en inclusie | Training | Employer Branding | HR thema's

Ik kan jou tijdelijk operationeel en projectmatig helpen, adviseren of bijdragen aan de ontwikkeling van strategie en beleid. Daarbij verzorg ik ook trainingen op het gebied van Leiderschap, DE&I en DISC.

Wat goed is te weten over mij: 

Ik ben een energieke no-nonsens type. Ga voor mijn doelen, ben resultaat gericht en wil waarde creëren voor mijn opdrachtgevers. Rode draad in mijn carrière is altijd teams ontwikkelen, sterker maken en verder helpen in onrustige tijden. Een echte bouwer dus en geen beheerder.
Ik weet rust te brengen in teams, de dynamiek snel te zien en daar op in spelen. 
Mijn leiderschapsstijl is faciliterend. Liever langer bouwen maar wel sustainable.
Een voorbeeld van leiderschap wat ik van nature laat zien is de leer van Simon Sinek.

DISC ==> DI profiel (rood/geel)
MBTI ==> ENTJ profiel

Cybersecurity & Risk Management — security assessments, incident response, and governance frameworks.

We partner with SMEs and enterprises to translate regulation and technical complexity into clear, actionable plans — helping you protect value, operate with confidence, and scale responsibly in South Africa’s evolving regulatory landscape.

Name: Offshore Steel Experts
Description:
Offshore Steel Experts is a specialized platform dedicated to offshore structural engineering, fabrication quality, welding engineering, and steel integrity.
We provide high-value technical insights, real-project experience, and practical guidance to support engineers, inspectors, and project teams within the offshore wind and oil & gas industries.
Our mission is to strengthen the offshore sector through accurate engineering knowledge, transparent discussions, and practical, field-oriented solutions.
Core Competence Areas
Structural Engineering & Steel Selection
We focus on the critical aspects of offshore structural design, including:
Selection of structural steel grades for offshore environments (S355–S500, M/L grades, Z-quality steels).
Evaluation of steel requirements based on water depth, fatigue, temperature, and dynamic loads.
Material selection aligned with project design standards (DNV, IEC, ISO, EN 10225).
Review of fracture toughness requirements, CTOD performance, and weldability considerations.
Alignment of steel procurement with welding methods, heat input limitations, and production capabilities.
These topics are essential to ensuring long-term structural performance, fatigue resistance, and safety of offshore foundations and topside structures.
Other Technical Areas We Cover
Offshore steel construction & fabrication processes
Welding engineering (GMAW, FCAW, SAW, mechanized welding)
QA/QC, fabrication control, and project-specific inspection strategies
NDT methodologies and acceptance criteria
Weldability, heat input control, hardness, CTOD, and fracture mechanics
Offshore wind foundation components (TP, MP, jackets)
Coating systems, corrosion protection, and fabrication tolerances
J-tubes & I-tubes, secondary steel, and interface management
Contact
For more information or engineering queries, feel free to contact us:
 offshore.eagles.engineering@gmail.com
