Nos especializamos en optimizar la gestión organizacional, potenciar la eficiencia operativa y profesionalizar los equipos de trabajo. A través de un enfoque humano, personalizado y basado en resultados, acompañamos a las empresas en cada etapa de su evolución, desde la planificación estratégica hasta la implementación de mejoras concretas.

¿Qué nos diferencia?

En Pharo no ofrecemos soluciones genéricas. Creemos en diseñar estrategias a medida, enfocadas en las verdaderas necesidades de cada empresa.

Trabajamos con una mirada integral: no solo analizamos números, sino también personas, procesos y cultura organizacional.

Actuamos como un socio estratégico de nuestros clientes, aportando nuestra experiencia, pero respetando su identidad y visión.

Nuestros servicios incluyen:
 Diagnóstico organizacional y de gestión.
 Planificación estratégica.
 Profesionalización de equipos de trabajo.
 Implementación de procesos de mejora continua.
 Capacitación y formación a medida.
 Acompañamiento en la gestión del cambio.

Creemos que cada empresa tiene un enorme potencial de crecimiento si cuenta con las herramientas, el acompañamiento y la estrategia adecuada.
Por eso, en Pharo apostamos al desarrollo genuino de nuestros clientes: buscamos construir relaciones de confianza y aportar valor a largo plazo.

¿Te gustaría transformar tu empresa?
Conversemos. Estamos para ayudarte a construir el futuro que imaginás para tu negocio.

Name: SummaOps
Description:
Lo que más le duele hoy a tu empresa no siempre son las ventas: es la rotación, los costos invisibles, la calidad de servicio y los clientes que se van en silencio.
Cuando tu equipo se desgasta y la calidad de atención baja, lo primero que se resiente es el crecimiento.

En SummaOps ayudamos a CEOs, CPOs y dueños de empresas medianas en expansión a transformar esos dolores en oportunidades de crecimiento sostenible.

El problema:
– Rotación alta de colaboradores que frena la operación.
– Quejas de clientes que se multiplican y afectan la reputación.
– Costos que crecen por procesos poco claros y equipos desmotivados.
– Dificultad para delegar y formar líderes que puedan sostener el ritmo.
- Imposibilidad de seleccionar colaboradores al ritmo de operaciones

La solución:
Creamos un sistema probado que combina diagnóstico, plan de acción, mejora continua y cierre estratégico. No es consultoría de “powerpoint”: es acompañamiento real, capacitación, selección de personal y mentoring para que los equipos se motiven, los líderes ganen confianza y los procesos se ordenen.

El resultado:
– Equipos motivados y comprometidos.
– Operaciones ordenadas y eficientes.
– Experiencia de cliente (CX) elevada a su máximo nivel.
– Crecimiento sostenible y rentable.

Con más de 20 años de experiencia en operaciones de cliente  y 15 años de liderazgo en B2B y B2C, en startups de alto crecimiento y corporaciones en LATAM, incluido equipos de más de 600 agentes en 15 países en PedidosYa, sabemos lo que significa escalar sin perder calidad.

En SummaOps no solo optimizamos métricas: transformamos culturas, desarrollamos personas y liberamos a los líderes para que puedan enfocarse en hacer crecer el negocio.

Motivamos equipos. Ordenamos operaciones. Elevamos tu CX.

If we are truly to meet the needs of all people, the transformation of our health systems must be grounded in authentic connection, equity, and partnership. As a corollary, then, we must honor the expertise that comes from peoples' lived experience and build our systems not for, but with, the people those systems are intended to serve. At Ault-Riché Consulting, we believe the answers to healthcare's stickiest challenges can come from truly listening to patients and their families.  

We are a consulting firm founded and operated by Gabrielle Ault-Riché, MPH, a health systems leader with over a decade of experience serving Medi-Cal, Medicare, and under-insured consumers. Gabrielle is dedicated to improving health systems through innovative, equitable, and data-driven approaches grounded in the wisdom of consumers’ lived experiences.

Services focus on stakeholder partnerships, collaborative problem-solving, strength-based team building, and thoughtful process improvement:

• OPTIMIZING CONSUMER EXPERIENCE - current state analysis and recommendations on consumer advisory committees, consumer engagement, measurement of the consumer experience, performance of consumer-facing teams, process improvement, and organizational culture building to value the wisdom of consumers’ lived experiences.

• FACILITATION & STRATEGIC PLANNING for teams and stakeholders to align on goals and core barriers, and to brainstorm effective and “upstream” solutions. This includes strategic planning on health equity, culture building, and exceeding consumer expectations.

• PROJECT MANAGEMENT - organization, planning, and management of new implementations and improvement efforts using a PDSA (Plan-Do-Study-Act) approach.

• BUILDING & LEADING HIGH PERFORMING TEAMS - coaching for leaders & teams, employee engagement efforts, and guidance for recruiting, onboarding, and retention, particularly of direct service teams.

Sie brauchen Leads für Ihr Produkt oder Ihre Dienstleistung, vertrauen aber Online Werbeanzeigen (Ads) nicht komplett?

Suchen Sie nach Mitarbeitern oder neuen Teammitgliedern?

Kein Problem, dafür war die Plattform ursprünglich gedacht und dafür kann man Sie auch heute noch mit vielen verschiedenen Wegen nutzen, die nur wenige richtig zu gehen verstehen.

Was auch immer Sie planen. Mit uns GeLinkeds.


Das professionelle LinkedIn Consulting beinhaltet vier Angebotspakete:

Die LinkedIn Academy
Das LinkedIn SetUp

Name: CETOR
Description:
CETOR is a technology firm specializing in transforming traditional businesses through innovative tech solutions, data science, and AI implementations. Our team consists of STEM graduates from the University of Warwick, with expertise honed through advanced dissertations, projects, and specialized modules in Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence.

CETOR stands for Complexity-Science, Ergodic Theory, and Operational Research—key principles that shape our approach. Complexity-Science helps us navigate intricate systems, Ergodic Theory supports data-driven decision-making over time, and Operational Research optimizes resources and efficiency. These disciplines are the foundation of our name and our commitment to delivering scientifically driven solutions.

Our core values—Security, Efficiency, and Robustness—guide everything we do. We prioritize Security to protect client data, strive for Efficiency to maximize resource use, and ensure Robustness to create resilient solutions that stand the test of time.

Name: Consulting Off-Piste
Description:
Consulting Off-Piste helps growth-stage SaaS, marketplace, and tech-enabled services companies build the RevOps and GTM foundations they need to scale. With deep experience leading and transforming revenue organizations, we partner with CEOs, CROs, CFOs, and Sales leaders to bring clarity, structure, and momentum to their teams.

We step in as fractional RevOps and GTM leaders to fix what breaks when companies grow quickly: fragmented systems, unclear processes, misaligned incentives, territory confusion, unreliable forecasting, and data leadership cannot trust. Our work spans Salesforce and HubSpot transformations, territory strategy, forecasting and compensation design, TAM and segmentation architecture, and end-to-end GTM process design.

We also guide founder-led and early sales teams as they transition to scalable, repeatable revenue engines. Our approach is practical and stage-appropriate. We meet companies where they are, define where they need to go, and create a realistic, achievable path forward.

Representative expertise includes:
- Salesforce and HubSpot transformations that rebuild data foundations, standardize sales processes, and improve forecasting visibility.
- Post-acquisition commercial integration, including system consolidation, data migration, and scalable GTM process alignment.
- TAM, segmentation, compensation, and territory strategies that reduce noise, align incentives, and improve execution.
- Transitioning founder-led teams into scalable organizations by establishing the systems, processes, and operating rhythms needed for growth.
- Fractional RevOps leadership that stabilizes GTM operations and builds commercial infrastructure for repeatable, efficient execution.

Our mission is to help companies move quickly, confidently, and sustainably toward their growth goals.

•	Equipment Selection and Integration: We assist clients in selecting and integrating optimal equipment and technologies for their processing needs, ensuring cost-effective solutions that maximize performance and reliability.
•	Environmental Compliance and Sustainability: With a focus on environmental stewardship and sustainability, we develop strategies to minimize environmental impact, reduce waste generation, and optimize resource utilization within mineral processing operations.
•	Training and Capacity Building: Through customized training programs and workshops, we empower plant personnel with the knowledge and skills needed to implement best practices, operate equipment effectively, and ensure a safe and productive work environment.
Our Approach:

GoodStart is voor alle bedrijven en organisaties (overheid, onderwijs en woningcorporaties) die iets doen of willen doen met duurzaam ondernemen en innovatie. Voor iedereen die wil leren van de best practices van andere bedrijven en graag inzicht krijgt in de business case, cijfers en beoordelingen. Daarnaast is GoodStart voor bedrijven en partners die zaken willen doen met GoodCompanies. Voor media, belangengroepen, ondernemersverenigingen, werkzoekenden en andere geïnteresseerden die meer willen doen met de besten.

Warum ist uns das wichtig? 

Wir wissen alle, wie anspruchsvoll es ist, ein Unternehmen zu führen. Aufgrund unserer fundierten Erfahrungen in der digitalen Kunden- und Mitarbeitergewinnung fühlen wir uns verpflichtet, Unternehmen mit unserem Wissen zu unterstützen. Unser Ziel ist es, Unternehmen zu planbarem Wachstum zu verhelfen, was zu mehr Planbarkeit, Stabilität und Entlastung der Geschäftsführung führt.

Wie erreichen wir das? 

Schritt 1: Definition der Zielgruppe
Schritt 2: Ansprache der richtigen Zielgruppe (potenzielle Kunden oder Mitarbeiter)
Schritt 3: Überzeugen durch einen unverwechselbaren Auftritt
Schritt 4: Generierung von Kontaktdaten und automatisierte Selektion
Schritt 5: Kontaktaufnahme mit Interessenten

Unsere Leistungen 

 High-Performance Kundengewinnung
 High-Performance Recruiting

Description:
IndTech Group is a team of engineers, IT/OT architects, and environmental experts on a mission to innovate through technology, engineering, and sustainability practices, to achieve positive Climate Change.  In our pursuit, we leverage cutting-edge technologies, cloud-based solutions, and software as a service (SAAS) models, to assist our clients with technology adoption through ClimateTech solutions, together with various industry sustainability best practices for real change.

Imagine if you had a perfect digital copy of your physical operations, assets, supply chains, environmental objectives, and many more, in digital twins.  These twins would enable you to collaborate virtually and simulate conditions quickly.  Understand what-if scenarios clearly, predict accurately, and output instructions to collaborate with the physical world.  Ensuring assets are utilised to their full capabilities, maintained efficiently, and predicting any quality issues.

Our approach to ESG encourages organisations to innovate and adopt efficient practices that ultimately increase competitiveness through operational efficiency, sustainable materials, and waste solutions through a Circular Economy. Clients have expanded demand within their supply chain for greater environmental accountability while discovering new and efficient ways to deliver goods and services in a sustainable way.

Digital Twins and Reporting Platforms have evolved and utilise CAD, PLM, AI, ML, and other applications together with Data and Analytics across a visualisation platform.  They can simulate any aspect of a physical object or process.  They can operate across the supply chain from design to consumer.  They can take many forms, capturing and utilising data that represents the physical world to avoid errors, lower costs and improve performance.  

Clients have created market differentiation through the reduction of energy, water, and the use of sustainable materials.  By doing more with fewer resources!

Name: OptiMetric Energy Consultants
Description:
OptiMetric Energy Consultants is a premium solo consulting practice led by Rob Varone, a senior facilities and engineering leader with over 20 years of hands-on experience. We specialize in high-level HVAC and electrical energy efficiency specifically tailored for hotels, resorts, and complex commercial facilities.
Our core mission is to empower property owners and asset managers with senior-level engineering oversight. We bridge the gap between complex mechanical operations and financial performance by eliminating operational waste, optimizing mechanical systems, and transforming utility expenses into capital recovery.
Our Technical Approach
We deliver measurable, verifiable cost savings through a rigorous 5-step engagement process:
Data Collection: We analyze utility bills, BAS trends, and equipment inventory to establish a baseline.
Assessment: We perform deep-dive technical on-site or remote system diagnostics.
Savings Modeling: We quantify potential savings to justify every recommendation with data.
Prioritization: We categorize actions into immediate No/Low-Cost "Quick Wins" versus long-term capital projects.
Executive Reporting: We provide strategic recommendations designed for immediate decision-making by ownership.
Core Specializations
HVAC Performance & Controls: Deep-dive analysis of plant operations and building envelopes.
Optimization Review: Correcting scheduling drift and override issues that inflate costs.
ROI Validation: Independent, third-party verification for capital project performance.

Implementation Oversight: Expert representation to ensure technical execution and vendor accountability.

At OptiMetric, our brand promise is simple: Precision Measurement. Proven Efficiency. We ensure your mechanical systems are running for the bottom line, not just the building.

Name: Opex Lean

Somos uma equipa focada em excelência operacional e acreditamos que a melhoria só acontece quando quem vive o processo participa na mudança. A nossa abordagem é prática, colaborativa e adaptada à realidade de cada equipa.

Não trazemos soluções prontas: construímo-las com as pessoas, com base em factos, dados e bom senso. O objetivo?
Menos complicação e mais valor ,para os clientes, para a gestão e para quem está na linha da frente.

Name: JAValentino Consulting, LLC
Description:
*Not accepting new clients at this time*

Jo Anne Valentino is a senior executive with over 25 years of leadership in pharmaceutical and biotechnology operations. She currently serves as Senior Vice President of Comprehensive Cell Solutions, a business unit of New York Blood Center Enterprises, where she leads strategic growth, regulatory affairs, and operational excellence for a rapidly expanding CDMO focused on cellular therapy.

Jo Anne has guided organizations through major transitions, including facility acquisitions, FDA inspections, and commercial product launches. Her recent consulting work supported a successful FDA pre-license inspection for a now-approved cell therapy product.

Previously, she held key roles at Minaris Regenerative Medicine, including Chief Operating Officer, USA, and Global Head of Quality. She led multimillion-dollar expansions, stabilized inherited underperforming sites, and built global quality structures across the US, Germany, and Japan. Her leadership helped clients advance through Phase 3 trials and BLA submissions.

At Novartis, Jo Anne oversaw external supply quality across the Americas, managed compliance for high-revenue products, and directed site transitions and health authority inspections. Earlier roles at Merck and Schering-Plough built her foundation in manufacturing, quality systems, and regulatory strategy.

She holds an M.S. in Management from Stevens Institute of Technology and a B.S. in Chemical Engineering from Manhattan College. Jo Anne is known for her deep expertise in cGMPs, inspection readiness, and leading cross-functional teams through transformation and growth.

We also support prison ministries that exist among the incarcerated population whether thru the chapel programs or thru coaching and mentoring of individuals and study groups.

We believe that reentry starts with relationships. Since we believe in leading without looking behind to see who is following, we build rapport with the men and women on the inside thru our Onesimus Letters which is meant to inspire, edify and educate. Although our methodologies and philosophy are rooted in the teachings of Jesus, we seek to serve all populations on the inside who reaches out to us.

We affirm the humanity of the men and women incarcerated and work to see them return home not as liabilities but as valuable assets to the community.

Name: E-Girişimci
Description:
E Girişimci, Amazon platformu üzerinde satış yapmaya yönelik eğitim ve danışmanlık hizmeti sağlayan bir firma olarak 2019 yılında faaliyete girmiştir. Kurucusu olan Muhammet USTA ise 5 yıldır bu sektörün içindedir. Bireysel olarak başlanmış olan bu süreç, farklı kurumsal firmalara danışmanlık hizmeti sağlanması ile devam etmiş; daha sonrasında ise bireysel danışmanlık hizmeti sağlayan bir firmaya dönüşmüştür.                        

     E Girişimci’nin amacı yalnızca Amazon üzerinden satış gerçekleştirmekten ziyade danışanları ile bir marka oluşturmak ve bu markanın büyümesine yönelik birlikte adımlar atmaktır. Süreç içerisinde ise bu adımlar daha çok danışanlara her adımı birebir olarak öğreterek ve uygulayarak ilerlemektedir. 

      Sadece Private Label modeline odaklanan firmamızın danışmanlığa bakış açısı ise sürecin birebir görüşmeler ile desteklenerek uygulamalı bir şekilde bir satış ortaklığı edası ile yönetilmesidir. Ayrıca sürecin tek taraflı yürütülmesinden ziyade atılan tüm adımların ortak bir karar ile risklerin minimalize edilerek atılmasıdır.

E Girişimci Danışmanlığın süreç yönetim politikası sadece satış eğitimlerinden ibaret değildir, daha çok süreci işlevsel bir şekilde yönetmeye odaklı bir firmadır.

Large firms may offer robust training programs, but are unable to meet the unique needs of new-to-business agents or seasoned agents stuck on a plateau trying to make it to the next level.

Individual agents are struggling to receive customized coaching support that aligns with their core values and needs.

We have a solution at SMART Real Estate Consulting.

Name: Vertical, circularity everywhere
Description:
Vertical, circularity everywhere accompagne les industriels linéaires à pivoter vers des modèles circulaires et les industriels circulaires à passer à l’échelle.

Avec seulement 6,9% de l’économie mondiale circulaire (source : Circular Gap report), le potentiel de transformation est immense. Et avec 86% des startups industrielles issues de la recherche, dont 1/3 de greentech (source : Bpifrance), le sujet de l’industrialisation et du ramp-up d’opérations circulaires est clé.

Pour adresser ces enjeux, Vertical travaille sur 3 types de projets, avec « verticalité », de l’investisseur aux équipes sur le terrain :
- Réaliser l'amorçage de business modèles et d’opérations circulaires pour des industriels et des participations de fonds à impact.
- Accompagner les startups industrielles circulaires dans leurs projets d’industrialisation, de ramp-up opérationnel et de levée.
- Structurer et porter des programmes d’accélération par grappes d’entreprises, en intégrant la circularité et l’opérationnalisation au coeur des approches.

Vertical combine des postures d'operating partner et d'investisseur, avec un objectif : bifurquer et faire émerger dans les 5 ans des chaines de valeur circulaires, dans tous les secteurs, à l’échelle industrielle. 
Circularity everywhere, at scale.

Name: Fertility Clinic Innovators
Description:
Fertility clinics work hard to help patients in their family-building journey, yet patient and nurse retention are difficult to maintain 

 At Fertility Clinic Innovators, we help clinic leaders build operational efficiencies to retain patients and reduce wait times for patients without changing core elements that foster high quality care 
 We partner with mission-driven organizations—from multi-hospital systems to rural hospitals and community health centers—to drive financial performance, operational efficiency, and better outcomes for both patients and staff.

ABOUT YOU 
You're a leading fertility clinic. Patient retention is top of mind, and challenges with staff retention and training efforts are piling up
You want better for your patients, your nurses, and a reputation as an industry leader. But you're up against:
 Stalled priorities that never reach the front line
 Sliding performance eroding margins
 Siloed teams working hard, but not together
 Resource drain with little ROI
 Compassion fatigue among nurses and APPs

Nearly 60% of patients leave due to inefficiencies in the clinic, and up to 40% of nurse burnout is caused by these inefficiencies, not because they’re flawed, but because current operations don't optimize patient-centric care. And when clinics don't do this, dissatisfied patients affect front-line clinic providers.

YOUR EXECUTION ENGINE: ACT 
1 Assess and Align: Evaluate and align clinic goals with patient needs. 
2 Collaborate and Create: Foster interprofessional care to enhance services.
3 Transform and Track: Implement change and measure progress

RESULTS YOU CAN EXPECT
 Traction on your top initiative in 45-60 days 
 Embedded or fractional support that supports patient and nurse retention.
